Existing efforts try to utilize Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as problem pre-solvers to produce or refine textual guidance for the VGM. However, textual descriptions fail to capture intricate spatiotemporal details, and VGMs often struggle to faithfully execute fine-grained or long-tail instructions even with a valid plan. While VLMs struggle as solvers, they possess strong perception capabilities to evaluate process-constraint satisfaction and final-goal achievement. Leveraging this strength, we introduce a paradigm shift that transitions the role of VLMs to "teachers". Specifically, a VLM teacher extracts task-specific rules to formulate differentiable rewards, guiding a VGM Reasoner via test-time online optimization of a lightweight LoRA module. This strategy enables adaptive test-time optimization and extends the reasoning capabilities beyond the VGM's intrinsic boundaries. Evaluations on symbolic (VBVR-Bench) and general-purpose (RULER-Bench) video reasoning benchmarks show that the proposed method yields a 16.7-point average performance gain, outperforming the VLM-as-Solver paradigm (+0.4 points) and Best-of-N scaling (+2.2 points) by a large margin at comparable test-time cost. These findings reveal that integrating VLMs as test-time teachers offers a promising paradigm for achieving generalizable video reasoning. Project Page: https://VLM-as-Teacher.github.io/

</details>


### [289] [Policy-based Foveated Imaging and Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02565)
*Howard Xiao,Jan Ackermann,Boyang Deng,Gordon Wetzstein*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种实时、预测性、任务感知的注视点成像系统，利用双流传感器架构，在图像采集时动态分配有限的像素带宽到任务相关区域，同时保持低分辨率全局上下文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超高分辨率图像传感器能够捕捉精细空间细节，但在实际带宽、延迟和功耗约束下，获取和处理所有全分辨率像素通常不可行。现有方法通过空间或时间下采样等采集策略解决这一问题，但这些策略在评估任务相关性之前就不可逆地丢弃了信息。

Method: 将注视点采集建模为传感器注意力策略学习问题，利用新兴的双流传感器架构，动态分配有限像素带宽到任务相关感兴趣区域，同时保持低分辨率全局上下文。通过过去观测指导决定未来测量的动作，形成感知-采集闭环。

Result: 通过多个感知任务的广泛模拟，该方法在严格像素预算下实现了高任务性能，显著优于相同带宽下的相关基线方法。在2亿像素双流传感器上的真实世界视频采集验证了系统在实际带宽和延迟约束下的可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了任务驱动、采集时注视点成像的实用可行性，为在现实约束下实现高效视觉感知提供了新方法。

Abstract: Ultra-high-resolution image sensors offer the potential to capture fine spatial details critical for many visual perception tasks, but acquiring and processing all pixels at full resolution is often infeasible under realistic bandwidth, latency, and power constraints. Existing approaches address this challenge through acquisition strategies such as spatial or temporal downsampling, which irrevocably discard information before task relevance can be assessed. In this work, we introduce a real-time, predictive, and task-aware foveated imaging system that operates directly at image acquisition time. Leveraging emerging dual-stream sensor architectures, our method dynamically allocates limited pixel bandwidth to task-relevant regions of interest while maintaining a low-resolution global context. We formulate foveated acquisition as a sensor attention policy-learning problem, in which past observations guide actions that determine future measurements, closing the perception-acquisition loop. Through extensive simulation across multiple perception tasks, we demonstrate that our approach achieves high task performance under strict pixel budgets and significantly outperforms relevant baselines operating at the same bandwidth. We further validate our system on a 200-megapixel dual-stream sensor, capturing real-world videos under realistic bandwidth and latency constraints, demonstrating the practical feasibility of task-driven, acquisition-time foveated imaging.

</details>


### [290] [AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02569)
*Haowen Hou,Zhen Huang,Zheming Liang,Qingyi Si,Chenglin Li,Shuai Dong,Kele Shao,Ruilin Li,Dianyi Wang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdaCodec提出了一种预测性视觉编码方法，通过仅在场景变化显著时传输完整参考帧，否则传输紧凑的帧间变化描述，显著减少了视频MLLMs的视觉令牌冗余，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频多模态大语言模型通常将每个采样帧编码为独立的RGB图像，导致相邻帧之间高度冗余的视觉内容被重复编码。这种冗余编码浪费了宝贵的视觉令牌资源，降低了处理效率。

Method: AdaCodec采用预测性视觉编码接口：仅在条件预测成本高时使用完整视觉令牌编码参考帧；否则，将帧间变化（包括运动和预测残差）编码为紧凑的P-tokens。这种方法动态选择编码策略，减少冗余。

Result: 在11个基准测试中，AdaCodec在相同视觉令牌预算下优于Qwen3-VL-8B逐帧RGB基线。在仅使用1/7令牌预算（32k vs 224k）时，在所有长视频基准上超越基线；在5个通用视频基准上提高平均分数，同时将首令牌时间从9.26秒大幅降低至1.62秒。

Conclusion: AdaCodec通过预测性视觉编码有效解决了视频帧间的冗余问题，显著提高了视频MLLMs的效率和性能，为视频处理提供了更高效的编码范式。

Abstract: Video is temporally redundant: adjacent frames usually share most objects, background, and layout. Yet existing video multimodal large language models (video MLLMs) usually encode each sampled frame as an independent RGB image, causing visual tokens to repeat content already present in earlier frames. This suggests a more direct video interface: send a full reference frame only when the scene cannot be predicted well from prior context, and otherwise transmit a compact description of inter-frame changes. We call this interface a \emph{predictive visual code}, and instantiate it for video MLLMs as \textbf{AdaCodec}. AdaCodec spends full visual tokens on a reference frame only when its conditional predictive cost is high; otherwise, it encodes inter-frame changes, including motion and prediction residuals, as compact P-tokens. Across all eleven benchmarks, AdaCodec improves over the Qwen3-VL-8B per-frame RGB baseline at a matched visual-token budget. Even at $1/7$ the budget, AdaCodec with 32k tokens surpasses the 224k baseline on all long-video benchmarks; on five general-video benchmarks, it raises the average score while substantially cutting time-to-first-token from 9.26s to 1.62s.

</details>


### [291] [VISReg: Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization for JEPA training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02572)
*Haiyu Wu,Randall Balestriero,Morgan Levine*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VISReg提出了一种新的自监督学习正则化方法，用Sliced-Wasserstein-based sketching目标替代协方差项，解耦尺度与形状控制，结合了VICReg的灵活性和sketching方法的分布严谨性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法中，VICReg的协方差项仅捕获二阶统计量，无法强制完整的分布形状；而sketching方法（如SIGReg）虽然能对齐各向同性高斯分布，但缺乏灵活性且在崩溃时梯度消失。需要一种既能控制分布形状又保持灵活性的正则化方法。

Method: VISReg（Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization）将VICReg中的协方差目标替换为基于Sliced-Wasserstein的sketching目标，该目标强制完整的分布形状，同时保留方差项进行尺度控制。这种方法解耦了尺度和形状的约束。

Result: VISReg具有线性扩展性，在低质量数据集上优于现有正则化方法，对长尾和低秩情况具有鲁棒性。在ImageNet-1K预训练后，在分布外数据集上达到SOTA；在ImageNet-22K预训练后，使用10倍少的数据即可匹配DINOv2的OOD性能。

Conclusion: VISReg通过解耦尺度与形状控制，结合了VICReg的灵活性和sketching方法的分布严谨性，提供了一种更稳健的自监督学习正则化方法，在多种数据条件下表现优异。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning methods prevent embedding collapse via modeling heuristics or explicit regularization of the embedding space. Among the latter, VICReg decomposes regularization into variance and covariance objectives, offering flexibility and interpretability. However, covariance captures only second-order statistics -- encouraging decorrelation but failing to enforce the full distributional shape needed for stable training. Sketching-based methods such as SIGReg address this by aligning embeddings to an isotropic Gaussian, but lack flexibility and suffer from vanishing gradients under collapse. We propose Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization (VISReg), which replaces covariance with a Sliced-Wasserstein-based sketching objective that enforces full distributional shape, while retaining a variance term for scale control. By decoupling scale and shape, VISReg combines VICReg's flexibility with the distributional rigor of sketching methods, providing robust gradients even under collapse. We show that VISReg scales linearly, outperforms existing regularization on low-quality datasets, and is resilient to long-tailed and low-rank regimes. Pre-trained on ImageNet-1K, VISReg achieves state-of-the-art performance on out-of-distribution datasets. Pre-trained on ImageNet-22K, it matches DINOv2's OOD performance despite the latter using 10x more data (LVD-142M). Project and code: https://haiyuwu.github.io/visreg.

</details>


### [292] [HumanNOVA: Photorealistic, Universal and Rapid 3D Human Avatar Modeling from a Single Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02573)
*Hezhen Hu,Wangbo Zhao,Lanqing Guo,Hanwen Jiang,Jonathan C. Liu,Zhiwen Fan,Kai Wang,Zhangyang Wang,Georgios Pavlakos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HumanNOVA是一个从单张RGB图像快速生成3D人类化身的逼真通用模型，通过可扩展数据生成流水线构建10万资产训练数据，采用前馈token条件化框架实现秒级推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于缺乏多样化高质量3D人类数据，同时实现逼真度和泛化能力具有挑战性。需要解决数据稀缺问题以训练鲁棒的3D人类化身生成模型。

Method: 1. 可扩展数据生成流水线：利用现有绑定资产+日常姿态动画化，以及多视角捕捉+拟合生成更多视角。2. 前馈token条件化化身建模框架：编码输入图像和简化人体网格为token，通过交叉注意力融合构建triplane-based 3D表示。

Result: 构建了10万个资产的大规模数据集，模型在多个基准测试中表现出优越性（定量和定性），在多样化输入条件下保持鲁棒性，推理时间小于1秒且无需测试时优化。

Conclusion: HumanNOVA通过可扩展数据生成和高效架构实现了从单张图像快速生成逼真3D人类化身，在逼真度、泛化能力和速度方面取得显著进步。

Abstract: In this paper, we present HumanNOVA, a photorealistic, universal, and rapid model for generating 3D human avatars from a single RGB image. Achieving both photorealism and generalization is challenging due to the scarcity of diverse, high-quality 3D human data. To address this, we build a scalable data generation pipeline that follows two strategies. The first one is to leverage existing rigged assets and animate them with extensive poses from daily life. The second strategy is to utilize existing multi-camera captures of humans and employ fitting to generate more diverse views for training. These two strategies enable us to scale up to 100k assets, significantly enhancing both the quantity and the diversity of data for robust model training. In terms of the architecture, HumanNOVA adopts a feed-forward, token-conditioned avatar modeling framework that allows fast inference in less than one second and requires no test-time optimization. Given an input image and an estimated simplified human mesh (SMPL) without detailed geometry or appearance, the model first encodes both inputs into compact token representations. These tokens then act as conditioning signals and are fused through cross-attention to construct a triplane-based 3D avatar representation. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach, both quantitatively and qualitatively, as well as its robustness under diverse input image conditions. Project page at https://HumanNOVA.github.io .

</details>


### [293] [From Zero to Hero: Training-Free Custom Concept Spawning in World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02575)
*Kiymet Akdemir,Pinar Yanardag*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SPAWN是一种无需训练的概念生成方法，通过替换自回归世界模型中的锚定潜在表示，让用户可以在生成视频中引入特定视觉概念，实现可控的场景组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自回归世界模型在生成交互式视频时，用户只能基于文本提示或单帧参考图像生成内容，一旦导航到参考帧之外的区域，模型只能基于先验填充，用户无法控制新区域出现的内容。这在游戏、交互式叙事和仿真等需要可控场景组合的应用中存在根本性限制。

Method: SPAWN（Swapping Pinned Anchor with Windowed iNjection）是一种无需训练的方法。它利用图像到视频骨干网络的结构特性：上下文记忆的第一个槽位被固定到参考帧，作为每个生成块的基础锚点。通过在一个短的注入窗口内将这个锚点与外部概念潜在表示交换，然后让原始锚点回归，概念通过模型自身的记忆自然地传播到后续生成中。

Result: 实验表明，SPAWN能够将概念与生成视频的照明、比例和视角保持一致，同时保持身份特征和时间连贯性。该方法支持从细粒度实体（如角色和道具）到大规模元素（如建筑物和地标）的各种概念，并接受概念图像或文本描述作为输入。

Conclusion: SPAWN证明了在现有自回归世界模型中实现可控概念生成是可行的，无需任何训练。这为游戏、交互式叙事和仿真等应用提供了更灵活的场景组合能力。

Abstract: Autoregressive world models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for interactive video generation, allowing users to navigate dynamically generated environments through actions. These models are typically conditioned on a text prompt and/or a single reference frame, from which the entire world is generated. Yet the moment the user navigates beyond what is visible in that frame, the unseen regions are populated by the base model's priors, with no mechanism for the user to specify what should appear and where. This is a fundamental limitation for applications such as gaming, interactive storytelling, and simulation, where controllable scene composition is essential. We refer to this missing capability as concept spawning; introducing a user-specified visual concept into a world model, analogous to spawning in a game engine. We introduce SPAWN (Swapping Pinned Anchor with Windowed iNjection), a training-free method for concept spawning. SPAWN exploits a structural property of image-to-video backbones: the first slot of the context memory is pinned to the reference frame and acts as a foundational anchor for every generated chunk. By swapping this anchor with an external concept latent over a short injection window and letting the original anchor return, we cause the concept to propagate naturally through the rollout via the model's own memory. SPAWN supports concepts from fine-grained entities such as characters and props to large-scale elements such as buildings and landmarks, and accepts either a concept image or a text description as input. Experiments show that SPAWN integrates concepts with consistent lighting, scale, and perspective while preserving identity and temporal coherence, demonstrating that controllable concept spawning is achievable in existing autoregressive world models without any training.

</details>


### [294] [VDSB-GWSyn: Diffusion Schrödinger Bridge for Controllable and Anatomically Feasible Guidewire Synthesis in Coronary Angiography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00109)
*Haoyuan Tang,Zhuo Zhang,Jialin Li,Shuai Xiao,Jiachen Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VDSB-GWSyn是一个基于扩散Schrödinger Bridge的冠状动脉导丝合成框架，通过生成可控的高保真导丝样本来解决标注数据稀缺问题，显著提升导丝端点定位精度，为机器人辅助PCI提供可靠支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠状动脉导丝端点定位是计算机辅助PCI的基础能力，对机器人辅助PCI减少操作者辐射暴露尤为重要。然而，标注有导丝的CAG图像稀缺，现有导丝合成模型适应性有限，成为导丝端点定位的关键瓶颈。

Method: 提出VDSB-GWSyn框架，基于扩散Schrödinger Bridge模型，在复杂解剖背景下合成可控的高保真导丝样本。首先使用形状先验算法学习基本导丝几何形状，然后在血管分割掩码约束下生成导丝掩码并输出端点坐标，最后使用SPADE条件化的DSB在真实CAG图像上合成逼真导丝样本。

Result: VDSB-GWSyn合成的导丝样本获得了良好的ROI-FID和ROI-KID指标以及高IPR分数。使用合成数据进行预训练再结合真实数据微调，显著提升了导丝端点定位性能：MPE从16.01像素降至7.71像素，3像素PCK从52.63%提升至86.27%。

Conclusion: VDSB-GWSyn有效解决了导丝端点定位的数据稀缺问题，提高了机器人辅助导丝输送系统的临床可靠性。其核心设计理念——在严格背景保留和解剖可行性约束下的可控器械合成，可迁移到其他标注数据稀缺的介入器械感知任务中。

Abstract: Coronary guidewire endpoint localization is a fundamental capability for computer-assisted PCI, and its importance increases as robot-assisted PCI is progressively adopted to reduce operator radiation exposure. However, the scarcity of annotated CAG images with guidewires and the limited adaptability of existing guidewire synthesis models remain key bottlenecks for guidewire endpoint localization. To address this issue, we propose VDSB-GWSyn, a Diffusion Schrödinger Bridge (DSB) model-based framework, enabling synthesis of controllable, high-fidelity guidewire samples under complex anatomical backgrounds. VDSB-GWSyn first uses our shape prior algorithm to learn the basic guidewire geometry. It then generates guidewire masks under constraints imposed by the vessel segmentation masks and outputs the corresponding endpoint coordinates. Finally, it synthesizes realistic guidewire samples on real CAG images using DSB conditioned with SPADE. Experimental results show that the guidewire samples synthesized by VDSB-GWSyn achieve favorable ROI-FID and ROI-KID, as well as high IPR scores. In addition, incorporating our synthesized data for synthetic pre-training followed by real fine-tuning substantially improves downstream guidewire endpoint localization, reducing MPE from 16.01~px to 7.71~px and increasing PCK at 3~px from 52.63\% to 86.27\%, leading to more clinically reliable deployment of robot-assisted guidewire delivery systems. Moreover, the core design philosophy of controllable device synthesis with strict background preservation and anatomical feasibility constraints has the potential to transfer to other interventional device perception tasks where annotated data are scarce.

</details>


### [295] [ProtoAda: Prototype-Guided Adaptive Adapter Expansion and Geometric Consolidation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02576)
*Yu-Cheng Shi,Zhen-Hao Xie,Jun-Tao Tang,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ProtoAda是一个原型指导的自适应调优框架，通过格式感知的任务原型来改进多模态持续指令调优中的任务分配，减少梯度干扰并促进专家协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型需要持续获取新能力，但现有基于图像-文本相似度的稀疏架构方法在任务分配时忽略了响应格式差异。当语义相似但输出格式不同的任务被分配到同一专家时，会导致梯度干扰和专家协作失效。

Method: 提出ProtoAda框架：1）引入格式感知的任务原型，同时考虑任务语义和输出结构进行任务分配和路由；2）以几何感知的方式整合格式兼容的更新，有效重用和渐进优化现有参数。

Result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ProtoAda实现了优越的性能，特别是在那些答案结构容易被顺序调优破坏的任务上表现突出。

Conclusion: ProtoAda通过格式感知的任务原型解决了多模态持续指令调优中的任务分配问题，有效减少了梯度干扰并促进了专家协作，为MLLMs的持续学习提供了更可靠的框架。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, but real-world deployment requires them to continually acquire new vision-language capabilities, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. To reduce inter-task interference and promote collaboration, recent methods often employ sparse architectures like Mixture of LoRA Experts with image-text similarity routing. However, tasks with distinct response structures could share highly similar visual-linguistic semantics and thus be wrongly routed to the same expert; image-text similarity alone is insufficient for reliable task assignment. For example, an expert in a grounding task requiring coordinate prediction may be biased toward producing short textual answers after learning semantically similar VQA tasks. This format-blind task assignment integrates heterogeneous response types into shared parameters, inducing gradient interference and ineffective expert collaboration. To address this problem, we propose ProtoAda, a prototype-guided adaptive tuning framework. ProtoAda introduces format-aware task prototypes to align task assignment and routing with both task semantics and output structure, and further consolidates format-compatible updates in a geometry-aware manner to effectively reuse and progressively refine existing parameters. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that ProtoAda achieves superior performance, especially on tasks whose answer structures are easily corrupted by sequential tuning.

</details>


### [296] [Physics from Video: Identifiability of Time-Invariant Second-Order ODEs under Minimal Trajectory Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00115)
*Yuanyuan Wang,Wenjie Wang,Kun Zhang,Mingming Gong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文研究如何从原始视频像素中唯一识别连续时间物理定律（二阶线性ODE参数），证明了在特定数据条件下，仅使用编码器的流程可以精确恢复物理参数，无需像素重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弥合视觉真实感与物理理解之间的差距是视频世界模型的核心挑战。研究从原始像素中识别连续时间物理定律的结构可识别性问题，特别是编码器流程能否唯一恢复二阶线性ODE参数。

Method: 提出基于水平集斜率覆盖条件的理论框架，证明学习到的潜在空间与真实物理状态局部仿射。引入方差下限正则化器稳定无解码器目标函数，防止潜在空间塌缩。在不同阻尼机制下分析最小数据需求。

Result: 理论证明：欠阻尼系统可从单个视频片段识别，其他机制需要三个不同轨迹。在合成和真实数据上验证了可解释物理常数可以从视频中可靠估计，无需计算密集的像素重建。

Conclusion: 该研究首次刻画了跨阻尼机制的最小数据需求，表明从视频中可靠估计可解释物理常数是可行的，确保了物理正确性和透明度，为视频世界模型提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Bridging the gap between visual realism and physical understanding is a core challenge for video-based world models. We study the structural identifiability of continuous-time physical laws from raw pixels, focusing on whether an encoder-only pipeline can uniquely recover the parameters of second-order linear ODEs. We prove that a level-set slope-coverage condition ensures the learned latent space is locally affine to the true physical state, enabling exact parameter recovery. Our theory provides the first characterization of minimal data requirements across damping regimes, establishing that underdamped systems are identifiable from a single video clip, whereas other regimes require three diverse trajectories. We further introduce a variance-floor regularizer to stabilize the decoder-free objective and prevent latent collapse. Validated on synthetic and real-world data, our approach demonstrates that interpretable physical constants can be reliably estimated from video without the need for compute-intensive pixel reconstruction, ensuring both physical correctness and transparency. Code is available at https://github.com/wenjiewang3/PhysicsFromVideo.

</details>


### [297] [Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02578)
*Seojeong Park,Jiho Choi,Junyong Kang,Seonho Lee,Jaeyo Shin,Hyunjung Shim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种解决多模态大语言模型作为评估器时的"感知判断偏差"问题的方法，即当视觉证据与文本线索冲突时，模型倾向于奖励看似合理的叙述而非感知正确的答案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM作为评估器存在一个关键弱点：当视觉证据与文本线索冲突时，评估器倾向于奖励看似合理的叙述而非感知正确的答案，导致不可验证和不一致的评估结果。

Method: 1) 构建感知扰动判断数据集，通过最小化编辑的反事实响应来隔离感知错误；2) 开发统一的训练框架，结合结构化GRPO奖励和批量排序目标，实现无需显式成对标签的全局排序一致性。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在多个MLLM作为评估器的基准测试中显著提高了感知保真度、排序一致性和与人类评估的对齐度。

Conclusion: 该方法为训练具有感知基础、可解释且对视觉推理冲突具有鲁棒性的多模态评估器提供了可扩展和可泛化的途径。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models have demonstrated strong reasoning ability, yet their reliability as automated evaluators remains limited by a critical weakness: when visual evidence conflicts with textual cues, MLLM judges tend to reward plausible narratives over perceptually correct answers. We identify and systematically analyze this phenomenon, which we term Perceptual Judgment Bias. Through controlled visual perturbations, existing multimodal judges frequently anchor on the response text instead of their own visual perception, leading to inconsistent and non-verifiable evaluations. To address this issue, we introduce the Perceptually Perturbed Judgment Dataset, which constructs minimally edited counterfactual responses that isolate perceptual errors and enable verifiable supervision. Building on this dataset, we develop a unified training framework that combines a structured GRPO-based reward with a batch-ranking objective, achieving coherent global ordering without explicit pairwise labels. Experiments across diverse MLLM-as-a-Judge benchmarks show that our approach substantially improves perceptual fidelity, ranking coherence, and alignment with human evaluation. Our results establish a scalable and generalizable pathway for training multimodal judges that are perceptually grounded, interpretable, and robust to visual-reasoning conflicts.

</details>


### [298] [Thinking in Blender: Staged Executable Inverse Graphics with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02580)
*Guangzhao He,Rundong Luo,Wei-Chiu Ma,Hadar Averbuch-Elor*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SEIG是一个基于代理的框架，使用预训练视觉语言模型从单张图像重建可编辑的3D场景，直接生成可执行的Blender代码，无需多视角监督或专业2D/3D基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决逆图形学这一长期存在且高度欠约束的问题，从单张图像重建可编辑的3D场景，使场景能够被渲染、重新打光和操作，而不依赖专门的2D/3D基础模型或可微分渲染。

Method: SEIG（Staged Executable Inverse Graphics）代理框架，通过逐步细化几何、材质、构图和光照等场景因素，直接在可执行的Blender代码空间中重建3D场景。

Result: 实验表明，分阶段重建显著提高了重建保真度，验证了任务分解对于使用通用VLM进行可执行逆图形学的重要性。框架支持各种下游应用。

Conclusion: 分阶段可执行逆图形学框架能够有效利用预训练视觉语言模型从单张图像重建可编辑3D场景，为逆图形学问题提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Inverse graphics is a longstanding and highly underconstrained problem that seeks to reconstruct images as editable 3D scenes which can be rendered, relit, and manipulated. In this work, we investigate whether pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) can perform executable inverse graphics directly from a single image by reconstructing a scene as an editable Blender program, without relying on specialized 2D or 3D foundation models, differentiable rendering, or multi-view supervision. We introduce Staged Executable Inverse Graphics (SEIG), an agentic framework that reconstructs a 3D scene from a single image by progressively refining scene factors including geometry, materials, composition, and lighting directly in executable Blender code space. We evaluate our framework across diverse scenes using a range of reconstruction metrics spanning pixel-level, perceptual, and semantic fidelity. Our experiments show that staged reconstruction substantially improves reconstruction fidelity, highlighting the importance of task decomposition for executable inverse graphics with general-purpose VLMs. Finally, we showcase various downstream applications enabled by the reconstructed editable Blender scenes.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [299] [BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00079)
*Jiayu Zhao,Zihan Teng,Minhao Fan,Tianrui Ma,Wentao Ren,Song Chen,Weichen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BitsMoE：一种基于谱能量引导的比特分配框架，用于MoE大语言模型的量化，在超低比特率下显著减少内存占用同时保持模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE大语言模型通过稀疏专家激活减少计算量，但所有专家权重仍需驻留内存，内存占用大。现有MoE压缩方法在超低比特率下表现不佳：剪枝会不可逆地移除模型容量，而粗粒度量化无法根据专家和权重方向的重要性分配比特。

Method: 提出BitsMoE框架：1）通过SVD将MoE层分解为共享基和专家特定谱因子；2）保留共享基不量化以保护跨专家共同结构；3）将专家特定因子作为细粒度量化单元；4）将谱级混合精度量化公式化为激活感知重建代理，通过整数线性规划在固定比特预算下最小化重建损失。

Result: 在多个MoE LLM上实验表明，BitsMoE在超低比特率下显著减少下游任务准确率下降。在Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base上2比特量化时：加速量化12.3倍，平均准确率提高27.83个百分点，解码速度比GPTQ快1.76倍。

Conclusion: BitsMoE通过谱分解和细粒度比特分配，有效解决了MoE模型在超低比特量化中的挑战，在保持模型性能的同时显著减少内存占用和提升推理速度。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, but their deployment remains memory-intensive because all expert weights must be kept resident in memory. Existing MoE compression methods struggle in the ultra-low-bit regime: pruning irreversibly removes model capacity, while coarse-grained quantization fails to allocate bits according to heterogeneous expert and weight-direction importance. We propose BitsMoE, a spectral-energy-guided bit-allocation framework for MoE LLM quantization. BitsMoE decomposes each MoE layer by SVD into a shared basis and expert-specific spectral factors, retaining the shared basis without quantization to preserve common cross-expert structure and using the expert-specific factors as fine-grained quantization units. To determine the bit-width of each unit, BitsMoE formulates spectrum-wise mixed-precision quantization as an activation-aware reconstruction surrogate and solves an integer linear program that minimizes estimated reconstruction loss under a fixed bit budget. Experiments across multiple MoE LLMs show that BitsMoE substantially reduces downstream task accuracy degradation in ultra-low-bit regimes. Under 2-bit quantization on Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base, BitsMoE accelerates quantization by 12.3$\times$, improves average accuracy by 27.83 percentage points, and increases decoding speed by 1.76$\times$ over GPTQ. Our model and code are publicly available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE.

</details>


### [300] [DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00081)
*Michel Dione,Jerry Lonlac,Hélène Louis,Anthony Fleury,Stephane Lecoeuche*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DAStatFormer是一种用于分布式光纤声学传感事件分类的混合多分支Transformer模型，它使用多域统计特征替代原始信号，通过门控Transformer网络实现高效准确的事件检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式光纤声学传感（DAS）具有高维度和复杂的时空模式，传统深度学习方法（如CNN、循环模型和Transformer变体）要么无法捕捉长距离依赖，要么处理原始DAS矩阵的计算成本过高。

Method: 提出DAStatFormer混合多分支Transformer，从时域、波形域和频谱域提取24个ANOVA选择的特征，替代原始信号；通过专用步进和通道注意力分支处理每个域，并通过自适应门控机制融合。

Result: 在开放Φ-OTDR基准和真实场景DAS数据集上，DAStatFormer达到99.4%的准确率，接近完美的真实世界性能，同时比DASFormer和DeepViT等模型使用更少的参数和更低的推理成本。

Conclusion: DAStatFormer通过多域统计特征和门控Transformer网络的结合，证明了其在可扩展、实时DAS监测中的适用性，实现了高效准确的事件分类。

Abstract: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables large-scale monitoring through optical fibers, but its high dimensionality and complex spatio-temporal patterns make event classification demanding. Existing deep learning approaches-CNNs, recurrent models, and Transformer variants-either fail to capture long-range dependencies or require processing raw DAS matrices at prohibitive cost. We propose DAStatFormer, a hybrid multibranch Transformer that combines compact multidomain statistical features with Gated Transformer Networks. Instead of raw signals, we extract 24 ANOVA-selected attributes per channel from the temporal, waveform, and spectral domains, reducing data size by orders of magnitude while preserving discriminative information. Each domain is processed via dedicated step-wise and channel-wise attention branches, fused by an adaptive gating mechanism. Experiments on the open $Φ$-OTDR benchmark and a real-scenario DAS dataset show that DAS-tatFormer achieves up to 99.4% accuracy and near-perfect real-world performance, while using significantly fewer parameters and lower inference cost than models such as DASFormer and DeepViT. These results demonstrate its suitability for scalable, real-time DAS-based monitoring. We release our code at https://github.com/MichelD-git/DAStatFormer

</details>


### [301] [Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00082)
*Clément Bénard,Manon Arfib,Christophe Labreuche,Victor Quétu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HCBM（霍夫丁概念瓶颈模型）引入非线性稀疏概念聚合，通过梯度提升树和质蕴含生成紧凑预测，提升可解释性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CBM方法依赖线性聚合大量概念，这损害可解释性并导致信息泄露，且概念与输出之间的真实关系通常是非线性的。

Method: 基于梯度提升树的霍夫丁函数分解，提供非线性稀疏概念聚合，使用质蕴含生成紧凑预测。

Result: HCBM对概念间泄露具有鲁棒性，在广泛实验中优于标准线性CBM，并可扩展到目标检测等任务。

Conclusion: HCBM通过非线性稀疏聚合解决了线性CBM的可解释性和信息泄露问题，在分类和检测任务中表现优异。

Abstract: Explainability of deep learning algorithms is critical for computer-vision applications with high-stake decisions. Concept bottleneck models (CBM) have recently shown promising performance to provide explainable and accurate predictions for classification problems, based on a bottleneck of high-level concepts. Existing CBM methods rely on a linear aggregation of the concept scores to compute predictions. However, a large number of concepts is often used in this linear approach, which undermines explainability and favors information leakage. In general, the underlying relation between concepts and output logits is not linear. Therefore, we introduce Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models (HCBM), which build on the Hoeffding functional decomposition of gradient-boosted trees to provide non-linear and sparse aggregations of concept scores, and generate compact predictions using prime implicants. HCBM are proved to be robust to interconcept leakage, and outperform standard linear CBM in practice, as shown in extensive experiments. Beyond classification, HCBM can be adapted to object detection, and we focus on a challenging case with overhead images to show the high performance of HCBM in these settings.

</details>


### [302] [From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00083)
*Christian Gumbsch,Leonardo Barcellona,Lennard Schünemann,Platon Karageorgis,Andrii Zadaianchuk,Zehao Wang,Sergey Zakharov,Fabien Despinoy,Rahaf Aljundi,Efstratios Gavves*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Demo2Reward：一种基于少量演示轨迹优化VLM奖励模型指令的测试时自适应技术，无需额外训练即可减少误报、保留真报，在机器人任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习依赖准确奖励函数，但现实应用（如机器人）中奖励函数常需手工设计甚至不可得。现有基于预训练视觉语言模型的零样本奖励方法存在误报问题，会严重损害策略学习。机器人领域常收集少量专家演示来引导策略学习，这为在策略训练前优化奖励模型提供了机会。

Method: 提出Demo2Reward测试时自适应技术：基于少量演示轨迹（3-10条）优化奖励模型的语言指令，以减少误报同时保留真报。该方法无需额外模型训练或策略学习时的计算资源。

Result: 在多种模拟机器人任务和策略骨干网络中，Demo2Reward始终优于现有的零样本和少样本VLM奖励模型。同时成功迁移到真实世界机器人学习场景，实现了无需手动设计奖励函数的策略学习。

Conclusion: Demo2Reward通过少量演示优化VLM奖励指令，有效减少误报、提升奖励质量，为机器人等现实应用提供了一种无需手工设计奖励函数的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning relies on accurate reward functions, which are often hand-crafted or even unavailable in real-world applications, such as robotics. Recent work has explored the zero-shot reasoning capabilities of pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as reward models. However, without careful prompt engineering, these approaches tend to produce suboptimal rewards, where false positive predictions can severely degrade downstream policy learning. In robotics, limited datasets comprising expert demonstrations are often collected to bootstrap policy learning. This scenario provides an opportunity to optimize a reward model prior policy training. We propose Demo2Reward a test-time adaptation technique to optimize the language instruction of a reward model based on a few demonstrations (3-10 trajectories) to reduce false positives while preserving true positives. Crucially, this requires no additional model training or computation resources during policy learning. We show that Demo2Reward consistently outperforms existing zero- and few-shot VLM reward models across a range of simulated robotic tasks and policy backbones. Finally, we demonstrate that Demo2Reward effectively transfers to a real-world robotic learning scenario, enabling policy learning without manually engineering a reward function.

</details>


### [303] [A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00129)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Xuhui Liu,Kilichbek Haydarov,Yuqian Fu,Mohamed Elhoseiny*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究LLM能否作为理解人脑神经表征的"透镜"，聚焦于EEG情绪效价。通过构建LLM衍生的效价轴（V轴），发现该轴能映射到人类神经活动，但额外的监督信号反而会降低解码性能，提出了饱和规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究大语言模型（LLMs）是否可以作为理解人脑神经表征的工具，特别是关注EEG中的情绪效价表征。探索LLM内部表征与人脑神经活动之间的对应关系。

Method: 1. 使用9个情绪诱发句子构建一维效价方向（V轴），并在14个LLM中进行跨模型一致性验证
2. 在123名被试观看情感视频的公开EEG数据上，使用线性投影将EEG特征映射到V轴位置
3. 训练36个EEG情绪分类器，观察其内部表征是否自发发现相同方向
4. 测试25种对齐策略，包括知识蒸馏、表征相似性、对比损失和地形损失等
5. 基于饱和规律，提出通过集成残差多样性来改进解码性能

Result: 1. LLM衍生的V轴能成功映射到人类神经活动，EEG特征的单线性投影能追踪刺激的V轴位置
2. 未经V轴暴露训练的EEG情绪分类器自发地在其内部表征中重新发现了相同方向
3. 25种对齐策略均未改善解码性能，其中16种显著降低准确率，验证了饱和规律
4. 通过集成残差多样性而非监督基底，在FACED数据集上平衡准确率比先前最佳提高了10.5%，在SEED-V数据集上观察到相同效果

Conclusion: LLM确实可以作为理解人脑神经表征的"透镜"，两者在情绪效价表征上存在收敛性。但一旦任务标签将脑解码网络驱动到目标方向，额外监督主要会扭曲已饱和的基底，而无法改进残差子空间。改进应聚焦于监督无法触及的残差子空间，通过集成残差多样性来提升性能。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful representation learners whose internal features increasingly align with human cognition. We study whether modern LLMs can serve as a lens for understanding neural representations in the human brain, focusing on emotional valence in EEG.
  We first build a one-dimensional valence direction, the V-axis, from modern LLMs using only nine emotion-evocative sentences. We validate it through zero-shot transfer to sentiment benchmarks and cross-model consistency across fourteen LLMs. We then show that this LLM-derived direction maps onto human neural activity. On a public EEG cohort of 123 subjects watching affective videos, a single linear projection on EEG features tracks the V-axis position of each stimulus. Moreover, 36 EEG emotion classifiers trained without exposure to the V-axis spontaneously rediscover the same direction in their internal representations, suggesting that the same valence structure emerges in both language models and human electrophysiology.
  Yet this convergence does not provide an effective training signal. We test twenty-five alignment strategies, including knowledge distillation, representational similarity, contrastive, and topographic losses; none improve decoding, and sixteen significantly reduce accuracy. We formalize this result as the saturation regularity: once task labels alone drive a brain-decoding network onto the target direction, additional supervision mainly distorts an already-saturated basin, while the load-bearing within-class residual receives little useful gradient.
  This regularity also indicates where improvement should come from: the residual subspace unreachable by supervision. Motivated by this insight, we ensemble across residual diversity rather than supervising the basin, improving balanced accuracy by 10.5% over the prior best on FACED, with the same effect replicated on SEED-V.

</details>


### [304] [Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00130)
*Andrzej Cichocki,Michal Wietczak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ADNTNs是一种通过自动微分训练的结构化权重生成方法，使用层次化小核心张量、非线性激活和可选横向混合张量构建大权重张量，实现神经网络的高效压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究ADNTNs的动机是开发一种数学结构化和硬件感知的路径，实现神经网络的显著压缩，同时保持或提升性能。该方法可视为低秩适应和张量分解的自然扩展，旨在解决传统神经网络参数过多、计算资源消耗大的问题。

Method: ADNTNs使用三种主要架构：1) 树张量网络(TTNs)；2) 增强型TTNs(aTTNs)带边界解纠缠器；3) 多尺度纠缠重整化拟设(MERA)。通过反向模式自动微分(AD)端到端训练紧凑的核心张量，支持非线性激活、任务感知目标、批处理和硬件感知执行计划。

Result: 在AlexNet和VGG-16层上的实验显示，每层压缩比从约2000倍到77000倍不等，精度通常与密集基线匹配，在多个VGG-16案例中甚至有所提升。这些结果表明ADNTNs是压缩神经网络的有前景方法。

Conclusion: ADNTNs是一种有前景的、数学结构化的、硬件感知的神经网络压缩路径。要实现更小神经网络，需要将优化、收缩计划和部署内核协同设计。虽然结果令人鼓舞，但自动微分并不能消除大中间结果、不良收缩顺序或一般循环张量网络精确收缩的成本。

Abstract: We study Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs), a family of structured weight generators whose compact core tensors are trained end-to-end by reverse-mode automatic differentiation (AD). The approach can be viewed as a natural extension of low-rank adaptation and tensor factorisation: instead of using one low-rank matrix update, an ADNTN builds a large weight tensor through a hierarchy of small cores, nonlinear activations, and optional lateral mixing tensors. The paper focuses on three architectures: Tree Tensor Networks (TTNs), augmented TTNs (aTTNs) with boundary disentanglers, and Multi-scale Entanglement Renormalisation Ansatze (MERA).
  The formulation supports nonlinear activations, task-aware objectives, batching, and hardware-aware execution schedules. At the same time, the paper keeps a clear distinction between \emph{differentiating} a contraction program and making contraction free: AD does not remove the cost of large intermediates, poor contraction orders, or exact contraction of general loopy tensor networks.
  Extensive simulations on AlexNet and VGG-16 layers show per-layer compression ratios from roughly $2000\times$ to $77000\times$ in the studied settings, with accuracy often matching the dense baseline and, in several VGG-16 cases, improving it. These results are encouraging rather than final: they suggest that ADNTNs are a promising, mathematically structured, and hardware-aware route toward much smaller neural networks, provided that optimisation, contraction schedules, and deployment kernels are designed together.

</details>


### [305] [Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00132)
*Dongjun Kim,Adrian de Wynter,Huancheng Chen,Heasung Kim,Haris Vikalo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FoLoRA是一种遗忘感知优化框架，通过基于广义瑞利商的方向评分机制，在适应下游任务时更好地保持预训练模型的基础能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调虽然能有效使基础模型适应下游任务，但会损害预训练中获得的其他能力。现有方法通常通过特殊初始化或固定约束寻求安全更新，但未在训练过程中调节适应与保持的权衡。

Method: 提出Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA)框架：1) 基于一阶保持条件定义遗忘惩罚（基于预训练代理激活）和任务效用（基于下游任务激活）；2) 通过广义瑞利商用任务效用除以遗忘惩罚来评分更新方向；3) 构建谱坐标系实现方向门控Adam更新，衰减低效用惩罚比的方向；4) 通过从预训练模型采样构建预训练代理校准数据。

Result: 在数学、代码和指令跟随适应任务上的实验表明，FoLoRA在基线方法中实现了最强的保持-适应平衡，在提升目标任务性能的同时最好地保持了非目标能力。

Conclusion: FoLoRA通过方向评分机制和谱坐标系，在微调过程中动态调节适应与保持的权衡，有效解决了基础模型微调中的遗忘问题。

Abstract: While finetuning effectively adapts foundation models to specialized downstream tasks, it can degrade nontarget capabilities acquired during pretraining. Existing forgetting aware methods typically seek safer updates through specialized initialization or fixed constraints, but do not regulate the adaptation preservation trade-off during training. We propose Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA), a forgetting aware optimization framework. Guided by a first order preservation condition, FoLoRA defines a forgetting penalty over pretraining-proxy activations and a task utility over downstream task activations. It then scores update directions by task utility per unit forgetting penalty via a generalized Rayleigh quotient. The resulting spectral coordinate system enables direction wise gated Adam updates, attenuating low utility to penalty directions during training. To estimate the forgetting penalty, FoLoRA constructs pretraining proxy calibration data by sampling from the pretrained model rather than relying on a single proxy dataset. Experiments on math, code, and instruction following adaptation show that FoLoRA achieves the strongest preservation adaptation balance over baselines, improving target task performance with best aggregate preservation of non target capabilities.

</details>


### [306] [World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00133)
*Arif Hassan Zidan,Yi Pan,Hanqi Jiang,Ruiyu Yan,Wei Ruan,Zihao Wu,Lifeng Chen,Weihang You,Xinliang Li,Bowen Chen,Huawen Hu,Peilong Wang,Sizhuang Liu,Jing Zhang,Siyuan Li,Zhengliang Liu,Yu Bao,Lin Zhao,Lichao Sun,Dajiang Zhu,Xiang Li,Jinglei Lv,Quanzheng Li,Wei Liu,Tianming Liu,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种多轴分类法来统一世界模型领域，从架构、方法家族、推理策略和应用领域四个维度对现有研究进行系统化分类，追踪从认知科学基础到现代系统的发展历程，并指出了当前挑战和未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界模型作为实现通用人工智能的核心范式，在强化学习、机器人、自动驾驶等领域取得快速进展，但缺乏统一框架来整合其多样化的架构选择、训练方法、推理机制和应用场景。

Method: 提出四维分类法：(1)架构维度：包括表示格式、动态公式、输入模态、学习范式和下游应用；(2)方法家族维度：涵盖状态空间和循环方法、基于Transformer的模型、基于扩散的生成器、物理信息网络和语言增强多模态系统；(3)推理策略维度：包括基于想象的规划、潜在策略学习、反事实推理和不确定性下的规划；(4)应用领域维度：涵盖机器人、自动驾驶、视频预测、多模态智能体、强化学习、科学建模、医学成像、教育测量和商业金融。

Result: 通过系统化分类法梳理了从早期认知科学基础到里程碑系统（如PlaNet、Dreamer系列、MuZero、Sora、Cosmos、Genie）的发展脉络，分析了各维度间的相互作用，特别关注了思维链推理与世界模型想象的近期融合趋势。

Conclusion: 论文总结了评估协议和基准，识别了复合预测误差、模拟到现实迁移、碎片化评估等持续挑战，并展望了未来方向：统一多模态世界模型、基础规模的交互式模拟器以及在安全关键领域的可靠部署。

Abstract: World models, internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment, have emerged as a central paradigm in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence, enabling agents to predict, plan, and reason within learned representations. Despite rapid progress across reinforcement learning, robotics, autonomous driving, and video generation, the field lacks a unified framework integrating its diverse architectural choices, training methods, reasoning mechanisms, and application settings. This survey addresses that gap with a multi-axis taxonomy organized along four dimensions: (i) architecture, encompassing representation format, dynamics formulation, input modality, learning paradigm, and downstream application; (ii) methodological family, including state-space and recurrent approaches, transformer-based models, diffusion-based generators, physics-informed networks, and language-augmented multimodal systems; (iii) reasoning strategy, covering imagination-based planning, latent policy learning, counterfactual reasoning, and planning under uncertainty; and (iv) application domain, spanning robotics, autonomous driving, video prediction, multimodal agents, reinforcement learning, scientific modeling, medical imaging, educational measurement, and business and finance. Tracing the field from early cognitive-science foundations to milestone systems such as PlaNet, the Dreamer family, MuZero, Sora, Cosmos, and Genie, we examine how these dimensions interact and highlight the recent convergence of chain-of-thought reasoning with world-model imagination. We review evaluation protocols and benchmarks, identify persistent challenges such as compounding prediction errors, sim-to-real transfer, and fragmented evaluation, and outline future directions toward unified multimodal world models, foundation-scale interactive simulators, and safe deployment in safety-critical domains.

</details>


### [307] [On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00135)
*Tong Liu,Cheng Qian,Matej Cief,Yuan He,Daniele Dan,Nikolaos Aletras,Gabriella Kazai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文系统分析了LLM工具调用能力的评估与训练效率问题，揭示了评估方法对结果的重要影响，并提出两种加速强化学习训练的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM工具调用能力的研究存在两个关键问题：评估方法缺乏标准化导致结果不可靠，以及强化学习训练效率低下。需要系统分析评估流程的敏感性并改进训练效率。

Method: 1) 系统分析工具调用评估流程，识别随机种子、系统提示、多轮模板构造等关键因素对结果的影响；2) 分析标准RL训练中的计算浪费问题，提出两种加速技术：在rollout阶段筛选有效学习信号，在策略更新阶段优化计算成本。

Result: 研究发现评估结果对实现细节高度敏感，特别是多轮设置下，缺乏标准化会导致排行榜排名不可靠。提出的两种加速技术在保持性能的同时显著减少了训练时间。

Conclusion: 工具调用评估需要更严格的标准化，而RL训练可以通过针对性优化大幅提升效率。论文为工具调用能力的评估和训练提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Tool-calling is a central component of modern large language model (LLM) agents, equipping them with skills beyond their parametric knowledge. This paper studies tool-calling along two complementary axes: effectiveness, i.e., how this capability is measured, and efficiency, i.e., how it is learned. On effectiveness, we systematically analyze tool-calling evaluation pipelines and show that results can be highly sensitive to seemingly minor, often undocumented implementation choices including the random seed, system prompt, multi-turn template construction, and how prior interaction/reasoning history is carried forward. These choices can lead to substantial differences in reported performance, especially in multi-turn settings where without rigorous standardization, leaderboard rankings are unreliable. On efficiency, we examine standard reinforcement learning (RL) for tool-calling and identify two sources of computational waste: (i) during rollouts, many prompts produce no learning signal, and (ii) during policy updates, optimization incurs high computational cost. Guided by these findings, we introduce two techniques that accelerate RL-based tool-calling training, achieving substantial wall-clock speedup without degrading performance.

</details>


### [308] [Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00136)
*Jonghyun Chung,Rishabh Chaddha,Sanket Badhe,Debanshu Das,Nathan Huang,Amanpreet Kaur*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇综述论文探讨了对抗性合成内容检测的范式转变，从传统的被动检测转向主动检测新兴虚假叙事，提出了基于生命周期的C5交互模型框架，并系统回顾了主动检测方法和技术挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展导致对抗性合成内容激增，传统被动检测方法已无法有效应对。需要转向主动检测新兴虚假叙事，以构建更强大的信息生态系统。

Method: 采用统一的基于生命周期的分类法，结合C5交互模型（情境、原因、内容、放大循环、后果），整合机器学习和社会科学的研究方法。重点研究合成内容与真实流量的传播模式差异，包括协调性虚假行为分析、流行病学建模和Hawkes过程。

Result: 系统回顾了主动检测方法：高维嵌入空间的异常检测、多层图上的无监督协调检测、以及智能AI系统。识别了生成式AI带来的挑战：快速变化的威胁追踪和多层分布漂移。

Conclusion: 提出了未来研究方向：异常聚类检测和构建预期性、弹性系统。这篇综述为主动检测新兴合成威胁提供了全面的生命周期视角，旨在构建更具弹性的信息生态系统。

Abstract: The proliferation of adversarial synthetic content, accelerated by Generative AI (GenAI) is rendering traditional reactive detection methods ineffective. This survey synthesizes emerging research to demonstrate a paradigm shift toward the proactive detection of emerging inauthentic narratives. In this survey, we adopt a unified, lifecycle-based taxonomy to combine socio-technical lifecycle models of adversarial campaigns with advanced computational methodologies for emerging inauthentic narrative detection. By structuring the analysis around the C5 Interaction Model (Context, Causes, Content, Cycle of Amplification, Consequences), we integrate different research streams from machine learning and social science. To differentiate spread patterns of synthetic amplification from authentic baseline traffic, this paper surveys state-of-the-art techniques for modeling the creation, seeding, and propagation of fresh narratives, including the analysis of Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior (CIB), epidemiological modeling, and Hawkes process. This survey also provides a systematic review of proactive detection methods for adversarial threats at different stages in the C5 interaction model, specifically, anomaly detection in high-dimensional embedding spaces, unsupervised coordination detection on multi-layer graphs, and agentic AI systems. Finally, this survey addresses challenges posed by GenAI, including the difficulty of tracking rapidly changing threats and multi-level distributional drift, and it outlines a future research agenda focused on detecting anomalous clusters and building anticipatory and resilient systems. This survey provides a comprehensive, lifecycle-based review of methods for the proactive detection of emerging synthetic threats for more resilient information ecosystems.

</details>


### [309] [Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00140)
*Jonas Henry Grebe,Tobias Braun,Anna Rohrbach,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEM是一个简单但高效的Rectified Flow模型概念擦除框架，通过将基于轨迹的unlearning与传统教师引导擦除方法桥接，实现有害概念的有针对抑制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着多模态生成模型的快速普及，有害内容合成、深度伪造和版权侵权风险增加，需要有效的概念擦除保护机制。然而，当前擦除研究未能跟上从U-Net扩散模型到Rectified Flow Transformers的技术转变。

Method: 提出GEM框架，建立基于轨迹的unlearning与经典教师引导擦除之间的理论桥梁，将轨迹信号转化为教师引导的flow-matching设置。教师提供吸引和排斥信号，组合成单一几何引导目标。

Result: GEM框架能够有针对性地抑制不需要的概念，同时保持良性的生成能力。

Conclusion: GEM为Rectified Flow模型提供了一个有效的概念擦除解决方案，统一了两种范式的优势，为生成模型的安全部署提供了重要保障。

Abstract: While the rapid adoption of multimodal generative models offers immense potential, it has also increased the risks of harmful content synthesis, deepfakes, and copyright infringements. To address these challenges, concept erasure has emerged as a prospective safeguard. However, as the field gradually transitions from U-Net-based diffusion models to Rectified Flow Transformers, erasure research has struggled to keep pace. In this work, we introduce GEM, a simple but highly effective erasure framework for Rectified Flow models. As part of our contribution, we establish a principled bridge between trajectory-based unlearning grounded in Generative Flow Networks and classic teacher-guided erasure: we translate trajectory-based signals into a teacher-guided flow-matching setup that unifies the strengths of both paradigms. Concretely, a teacher provides complementary attraction and repulsion signals that we combine into a single geometric guidance objective, yielding targeted suppression of unwanted concepts while preserving benign generation.

</details>


### [310] [Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00141)
*Ali Kargarandehkordi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 自适应传感策略在可穿戴健康系统中并非对所有个体都有同等益处，其最大价值在于提升基线性能较差的个体的预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究自适应传感策略在有限数据预算下对不同个体的实际效益，因为目前对其跨个体益处了解不足

Method: 在纵向可穿戴数据集中，评估了在固定测量预算下，对心率、活动和生态瞬时评估等多模态数据的时间窗口自适应选择策略，使用AUROC和F1分数量化相对于随机采样的性能提升

Result: 自适应策略为基线性能低的参与者带来显著AUROC提升（增益高达0.7），但对基线强的参与者增益有限甚至为负；自适应增益与基线性能呈强负相关；60-80%的个体在AUROC上受益，但F1改善较小且不一致

Conclusion: 自适应传感并非普遍有益，而是在表现不佳的场景中提供最大价值，支持基于基线性能定制自适应传感的选择性部署策略，以提高可穿戴健康监测效率

Abstract: Adaptive sensing strategies that selectively sample data are increasingly used in wearable health systems to improve prediction performance under limited data budgets, yet their benefits across individuals remain poorly understood. Here, we evaluate adaptive selection of time windows for model training under fixed measurement budgets across multiple sensing modalities, including heart rate, activity, and ecological momentary assessment (EMA), in a longitudinal wearable dataset. We quantify performance gains relative to random sampling using both area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) and F1 score. Adaptive strategies yield substantial improvements in AUROC for participants with low baseline performance (with gains up to 0.7), while offering limited or negative gains for participants with strong baselines. Across modalities, adaptive gain is strongly inversely correlated with baseline performance (Pearson r = -0.67; Spearman p = -0.62). At the participant level, most individuals benefit in AUROC (60-80% across modalities), although improvements in F1 are smaller and less consistent. These findings show that adaptive sensing is not uniformly beneficial, but instead provides the greatest value in underperforming settings. Our results support selective deployment strategies that tailor adaptive sensing based on baseline performance to improve efficiency in wearable health monitoring.

</details>


### [311] [BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00144)
*Liang He,Jingbo Wen,Qishi Zhan,Yixiong Chen,Kangning Cui,Qizhen Lan,Xilu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BudgetDraft：一种用于中长上下文推理的多视图稀疏训练方法，通过训练单一预算鲁棒的草稿器来恢复稀疏/全缓存不匹配导致的接受率下降，实现端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源受限的部署中，草稿器使用稀疏KV缓存以限制峰值GPU内存和端到端延迟，而验证器保持全KV缓存。但在中长上下文推理（4K-16K）中，朴素的稀疏/全推测解码会因上下文增长导致稀疏/全不匹配，使接受率快速下降。

Method: 提出BudgetDraft，一种多视图稀疏训练方法。草稿器在训练过程中暴露于多个采样的KV预算，学习将每个稀疏视图与一个共享的全缓存教师目标对齐。结合全缓存分支的接受感知损失和稀疏缓存分支的多视图损失，生成单一预算鲁棒的草稿器。

Result: 在PG-19、LongBench和LWM上的实验结果显示，BudgetDraft在4K、8K和16K上下文长度下，相比自回归解码分别实现了最高6.55倍、4.46倍和2.10倍的端到端加速，同时保持推理管道内存友好。

Conclusion: BudgetDraft通过多视图稀疏训练有效解决了中长上下文推理中稀疏/全不匹配问题，在不增加推理时组件的情况下恢复了不同稀疏级别的接受率，实现了显著的端到端加速。

Abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive decoding by using a drafter to propose multiple tokens that a verifier validates in parallel. In resource-constrained deployments, the drafter uses a sparse KV cache to limit peak GPU memory and end-to-end latency under a fixed KV budget, while the verifier keeps a full KV cache. Mid-to-long context inference (4K--16K context length) is common in real applications. However, naive sparse/full speculative decoding suffers from the sparse/full mismatch as context length grows, causing the acceptance rate to drop quickly. We propose BudgetDraft, a multi-view sparse training method for sparse drafting in mid-to-long inference. The drafter is exposed to multiple sampled KV budgets during training and learns to align each sparse view with one shared full-cache teacher target. BudgetDraft combines an acceptance-aware loss on a full-cache branch with a multi-view loss on a sparse-cache branch, producing a single budget-robust drafter that recovers acceptance across sparsity levels without extra inference-time components. Experimental results on PG-19, LongBench, and LWM show that BudgetDraft achieves up to 6.55x, 4.46x, and 2.10x end-to-end speedup vs AR at 4K, 8K, and 16K context lengths, while keeping the inference pipeline memory-friendly.

</details>


### [312] [RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00147)
*Yuduo Li,Xiaofeng Shi,Qian Kou,Longbin Yu,Hua Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RAFT是一个两阶段框架，通过数据精炼和自适应蒸馏来解决领域特定监督微调中的遗忘问题，在提升领域性能的同时保持模型的通用能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 领域特定监督微调（SFT）虽然能提升领域内性能，但会导致模型通用能力下降。这主要是由于两个实际差距：监督兼容性差距（领域目标与原始模型自然响应的风格和推理格式不同）和轨迹保持差距（教师强制SFT优化固定目标标记而不约束模型在自己生成前缀上的行为）。

Method: RAFT采用两阶段框架：1）数据精炼阶段：通过自条件重写、语义过滤和答案融合构建模型兼容的监督数据；2）自适应蒸馏阶段：采用答案条件在策略蒸馏，原始指令调整模型在融合答案作为有用上下文的条件下，对学生生成的轨迹提供软目标。还引入top-K温度蒸馏和EMA自适应损失平衡来稳定领域-通用权衡。

Result: 在三个指令调整骨干模型和五个领域的实验中，RAFT比标准SFT平均提升领域准确率23.2%，同时在MS-Bench和IFEval上部分恢复了SFT引起的性能下降，相对改进分别为18.2%和10.2%。

Conclusion: 结合数据精炼和轨迹级保持，为缓解遗忘的领域微调提供了有效方法，表明同时解决监督兼容性和轨迹保持差距是提升领域性能同时保持通用能力的关键。

Abstract: Domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT) often improves in-domain performance at the cost of degrading a model's general capabilities. We view this degradation through two practical gaps in domain SFT: a supervision-compatibility gap, where domain targets differ in style and reasoning format from the original model's natural responses, and a trajectory-preservation gap, where teacher-forced SFT optimizes fixed target tokens without constraining the model's behavior on its own generated prefixes. This process fails to preserve the model's original behavior. We propose RAFT (Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting), a two-stage framework that addresses both factors. First, RAFT constructs model-compatible supervision through self-conditioned rewriting, semantic filtering, and answer fusion. Second, RAFT performs Answer-Conditioned On-Policy Distillation, where the original instruction-tuned model provides soft targets on student-generated trajectories while being conditioned on the fused answer as helpful context. We further introduce top-K temperature distillation and EMA-based adaptive loss balancing to stabilize the domain-general trade-off. Across three instruction-tuned backbones and five domains, RAFT improves average domain accuracy by 23.2% over standard SFT, while recovering part of the SFT-induced degradation on MS-Bench and IFEval, with relative improvements of 18.2% and 10.2%, respectively. These results show that coupling data refinement with trajectory-level preservation provides an effective recipe for domain fine-tuning with alleviated forgetting.

</details>


### [313] [Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00151)
*Soichiro Nishimori,Paavo Parmas,Sotetsu Koyamada,Tadashi Kozuno,Toshinori Kitamura,Shin Ishii,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ReMax：通过最大化M次采样中的期望最佳回报来诱导探索的新目标函数，RePPO是其高效优化算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习中，智能体从探索中获益是因为能够重复遇到相似状态。传统方法需要显式探索奖励，而本文提出通过优化采样最佳回报来自发诱导探索

Method: 提出ReMax目标函数：评估策略在M次采样中的期望最大回报，考虑回报不确定性。推导ReMax的策略梯度公式，并开发RePPO（PPO变体），将离散M推广到连续参数m>0

Result: 在MinAtar和Craftax基准测试中，RePPO无需显式探索奖励就能有效促进探索

Conclusion: ReMax为强化学习探索提供了新视角，将探索作为优化采样最佳回报的自然结果，RePPO实现了对这一目标的实用高效优化

Abstract: In reinforcement learning (RL), agents benefit from exploration only because they repeatedly encounter similar states: trying different actions can improve performance or reduce uncertainty; without such retries, a greedy policy is optimal. We formalize this intuition with ReMax, an objective that evaluates a policy by the expected maximum return over $M$ samples, where $M$ is a positive integer, while accounting for return uncertainty. Optimizing this objective induces stochastic exploration as an emergent property, without explicit bonus terms. For efficient policy optimization, we derive a new policy-gradient formulation for ReMax and introduce ReMax PPO (RePPO), a PPO variant that optimizes ReMax while generalizing the discrete retry count $M$ to a continuous parameter $m > 0$, enabling fine-grained control of exploration. Empirically, RePPO promotes exploration, without any explicit exploration bonuses, on the MinAtar and Craftax benchmarks.

</details>


### [314] [ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00169)
*Syed Saad Saif,Giulio Maggiore,Paolo Russo,Damiano Distante*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 传统机器学习方法（随机森林、XGBoost、支持向量机）在客户流失预测任务中，在预测性能、数据效率和计算资源需求方面优于统一多任务时间序列模型，尽管后者具有建模复杂时序动态的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 零售商竞争加剧和产品服务同质化降低了客户转换成本，准确预测客户流失对个性化营销和减少客户流失至关重要。研究旨在评估传统机器学习与先进时间序列模型在流失预测中的表现。

Method: 研究比较了传统机器学习方法（随机森林、XGBoost、支持向量机）与统一多任务时间序列模型在二分类时间序列任务中的表现。评估了多种数据集和不同的流失标注技术。

Result: 传统机器学习方法在预测性能、数据效率和计算资源需求方面均优于统一多任务时间序列模型。这一发现在多个数据集和不同流失标注技术中保持一致。

Conclusion: 尽管统一多任务时间序列模型具有建模复杂时序动态的能力，但对于客户流失预测任务，传统机器学习方法仍然是更优选择，特别是在实际部署的效率和资源需求方面。

Abstract: Increased competition and the growing similarity of products and services offered by retailers have lowered the barriers for customers to switch to competitors. Accurate churn prediction can be a valuable tool for driving effective personalized marketing campaigns and helping to reduce customer attrition. This study evaluates the performance of traditional machine learning techniques, namely, Random Forests, XGBoost, and Support Vector Machines, and compares them with the Unified Multi-Task Time Series Model for churn prediction, a binary time-series classification task. Despite the strong capacity of the latter to model complex temporal dynamics and inter-variable relationships, our results indicate that for churn prediction, conventional methods can still outperform it in terms of predictive performance, data efficiency, and computational resource requirements for training and deployment. These findings are consistent across multiple datasets and various churn labeling techniques.

</details>


### [315] [Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00180)
*Xiaojing Chen,Jingqi Cheng,Xu Zhao,Wan Jiang,Jingjing Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出名为"Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Classification (SGC)"的新框架，通过无监督生成网络建模样本的结构和统计异常度作为"病理先验"，在不合成伪样本的情况下指导分类器决策边界，解决EEG抑郁症检测中的小样本困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于EEG的深度学习抑郁症检测面临"小样本困境"，现有生成式数据增强方法计算成本高且可能引入合成噪声，模糊分类边界。需要挑战传统的"数据量优先"范式。

Method: 提出Score-Guided Classification (SGC)框架：1）使用无监督生成网络架构建模样本的结构和统计异常度作为"病理先验"；2）经过鲁棒归一化后与深度特征表示显式融合；3）提出跨通道空间适应模块，通过空间映射机制解决多中心数据集中通道不匹配的硬件异质性问题。

Result: 在Mumtaz2016和高密度MODMA数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在具有挑战性的"零数据增强"设置和"零样本合成成本"下具有有效性和卓越的泛化能力。

Conclusion: SGC框架通过利用"病理先验"而非合成伪样本，成功解决了EEG抑郁症检测中的小样本问题，为数据增强提供了新的替代思路，在计算效率和分类性能上均表现优异。

Abstract: Deep learning-based Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) detection using Electroencephalography (EEG) is fundamentally constrained by the "small-sample dilemma." Prevailing generative data augmentation methods not only incur heavy computational overhead but also risk introducing synthetic noise, thereby blurring classification boundaries. To challenge the traditional "data quantity first" convention, we propose a novel framework "Beyond Augmentation": Score-Guided Classification (SGC). SGC does not synthesize pseudo-samples; instead, it utilizes an unsupervised generative network architecture to model the structural and statistical anomaly degrees of samples, serving as the core "Pathological Prior". This prior, after robust normalization, is explicitly fused with deep feature representations, thereby precisely guiding the classifier's decision boundary. Furthermore, to dynamically adapt to varying channel configurations, we propose a Cross-Channel Spatial Adaptation module, utilizing a spatial mapping mechanism to effectively resolve the hardware heterogeneity of mismatched channels in multi-center datasets. Extensive experiments on the Mumtaz2016 and high-density MODMA datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and exceptional generalizability of our method under the challenging "zero data augmentation" setting and at "zero sample synthesis cost".
  Keywords: Electroencephalography (EEG), Depression Detection, Anomaly Score, Diffusion Models, Few-Shot Learning

</details>


### [316] [Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00183)
*Tong Yang,Yu Huang,Yingbin Liang,Yuejie Chi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了基于transformer的策略如何通过强化学习训练动态获得树搜索能力，在k元随机树环境中构建了实现随机深度优先搜索的两头transformer，分析了策略梯度训练动态，展示了深度泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 树搜索是语言代理推理和决策任务的核心抽象，但目前缺乏对transformer策略如何从强化学习训练动态中获得搜索能力的理论理解。

Method: 在随机k元树环境中，使用两头transformer架构（一个头跟踪先前动作，另一个检测失败结果并触发回溯），分析策略梯度在深度递进课程下的训练动态。

Result: 构建的transformer实现了随机深度优先搜索，在仅训练深度1和深度2树的情况下，能在更深完整树上成功搜索（深度泛化）。在不平衡目标分布下，折扣回报导致排名DFS策略优先处理高概率分支。

Conclusion: 研究确定了transformer搜索的机械范式：注意力头专门化并协作从上下文中提取决策相关轨迹，通过强化学习训练将其转化为代理动作选择。

Abstract: Tree search is a central abstraction behind many language-agent reasoning and decision-making tasks: agents must explore actions, remember failures, and backtrack toward promising alternatives. Yet, we lack a theoretical understanding of how transformer-based policies acquire such search capabilities from the training dynamics of reinforcement learning (RL). We study this question in a stochastic $k$-ary tree environment, where an agentic transformer observes only its trajectory history through interaction and receives a terminal reward for reaching a hidden leaf goal node. We first construct a two-head transformer that implements randomized depth-first search (DFS): one head tracks previous actions, while the other detects failure outcomes and triggers backtracking. We then analyze the training dynamics of policy gradient under a depth-wise curriculum, showing that this same DFS mechanism emerges in stages from sparse reinforcement feedback without expert demonstrations. The resulting policy exhibits depth generalization: after training only on depth-$1$ and depth-$2$ trees, it succeeds on deeper full trees. We further show that, under imbalanced goal distributions, discounting the return leads to a ranked DFS policy that prioritizes higher-probability branches. Overall, our results identify a mechanistic normal form for transformer-based search, in which attention heads specialize and cooperate to extract decision-relevant traces from context and convert them into agentic action selection via RL training.

</details>


### [317] [AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00187)
*Qian Du,Mark M. Sullivan,James E. Saal,Florian Huber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AI引导的迭代工作流加速石墨基负极开发，通过改进配方可行性和工艺稳健性，将制造可靠性从频繁失败提升到100%成功，高性能电池比例大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加速石墨基负极开发，解决传统方法中配方可行性和工艺稳健性的问题，将不完善的工业数据转化为可操作的指导。

Method: 采用AI/ML引导的多目标逆向设计，通过Citrine平台进行序列学习，从噪声不完整数据集开始，迭代添加可行性标签和边界条件失败数据，构建早期代理模型。

Result: 制造可靠性从频繁工艺失败提升到100%成功电池生产；高性能电池比例从28.4%提升到84.8%；容量保持率从42.1%提升到97.3%。

Conclusion: 结构化、反馈驱动的AI工作流可以将不完善的工业数据转化为可操作的指导，实现更快、更可重复的电池电极制造优化。

Abstract: This study presents an iterative AI-guided workflow that accelerates graphite-based anode development by improving both formulation feasibility and process robustness. Sequential learning via AI/ML-guided multiobjective inverse design for anode optimization was implemented using the Citrine Platform. Starting from a noisy, incomplete dataset, the Citrine Platform was used to generate early surrogate models, which despite low predictive certainty highlighted missing process constraints. By iteratively adding feasibility labels and boundary condition failures, the workflow rapidly converged toward manufacturable, higher-performing formulations. Fabrication reliability improved from frequent process failures to 100% successful cell production, while the fraction of cells delivering $\geq$ 350 mAh g$^{-1}$ increased from 28.4% to 84.8%, with capacity retention rising from 42.1% to 97.3%. These results demonstrate that structured, feedback-driven AI workflows can transform imperfect industrial data into actionable guidance, enabling faster, more reproducible optimization of battery electrode manufacturing.

</details>


### [318] [Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00189)
*Aditya Kumar,Zhihan Lei,Jerry Yan,Joshua W. Momo,Lauhitya Reddy,Rafael Enrique Cabrera Jimenez,Cassandra A. Cohen,Arthur Kajiyama,William W. Cohen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个实用的智能体系统设计框架，通过定义"伪工具"和固定工作流来提升系统可预测性、控制性和成本效率，并展示了学习方法和多目标优化能进一步提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体系统设计过于注重结果质量，而实际生产系统更关注简单性、可控性和推理成本的可预测性。需要建立更实用的智能体系统设计原则。

Method: 提出一个智能体框架，通过"伪工具"实现模块化设计，支持固定工作流构建。提出学习方法来优化伪工具和固定工作流，并应用多目标优化联合优化成本和响应质量。

Result: 手工构建的固定工作流比动态规划工作流更便宜且准确；学习方法通常优于手工构建的智能体；多目标优化能有效平衡成本和响应质量。

Conclusion: 通过模块化框架、学习方法和多目标优化，可以构建更实用、可控且成本效益高的智能体系统，平衡了性能与生产需求。

Abstract: Automated design and optimization of agentic LLM-based systems leads to sophisticated systems that substantially improve result quality over off-the-shelf agentic patterns. However, studies of fielded agentic systems show that production systems focus much more on issues such as simplicity, controllability, and predictability of inference costs. In this paper we propose principled approaches to designing and optimizing practical agentic systems. We describe an agent framework that enables designers to enforce modularity in agentic systems, by defining "pseudo-tools" that call LLMs recursively on a restricted context. Using this framework we hand-engineer agents for a diverse set of tasks, and show that relative to dynamically-planned workflows, hand-constructed fixed workflows are generally cheaper and more accurate. We then propose novel learning methods for the agentic components required by this framework, namely pseudo-tools and fixed workflows. These learning methods generally outperform hand-engineered agents. We also exploit the modularity of the framework to apply multi-objective optimization methods to jointly optimize cost and response quality and blend the results of multiple learning systems.

</details>


### [319] [BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00198)
*Yuxiang Lin,Zihan Wang,Mengyang Liu,Yuxuan Shan,Longju Bai,Junyao Zhang,Xing Jin,Boshan Chen,Jinyan Su,Xingyao Wang,Jiaxin Pei,Manling Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种预算感知智能体(BAGEN)框架，将预算作为主动控制信号而非被动成本指标，通过渐进区间估计方法让智能体在每个规划步骤预测剩余预算的上下界，并在任务可能失败时提前预警。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体成本主要在执行后测量，而预算感知智能体应将预算作为主动控制信号，以改善资源使用效率和任务成功率。

Method: 首先系统定义内部预算(智能体计算)和外部预算(智能体行动)，然后将预算感知形式化为渐进区间估计：智能体在每个规划步骤预测剩余预算的上下界，并在完成可能性低时发出预警。使用rollout-replay协议进行评估。

Result: 研究发现：(1)强大智能体不一定有强预算感知能力(r=0.35)；(2)前沿模型普遍过度乐观，继续在不可能成功的任务上花费资源；(3)预算感知信号可操作且可训练，提前停止在失败轨迹上节省28-64%的token，SFT+RL强化了提前停止和预警行为；(4)精确区间校准仍然困难，SFT+RL后区间覆盖率仅达47%。

Conclusion: 预算感知是智能体系统的重要维度，当前前沿模型在预算意识方面存在明显不足，但通过训练可以改善，不过精确的区间预测仍然具有挑战性。

Abstract: While agents are increasingly spending more resources, today agent cost is mostly measured only after execution. A Budget-Aware Agent (BAGEN) should treat budget as an active control signal, rather than a passive cost metric. We first systematically define budget estimation as internal budgets (from agent computation) and external budgets (from agent actions). We then formalize budget-awareness as progressive interval estimation: at each step of a plan, an agent should predict an upper and lower bound on remaining budget, and alert when completion is unlikely. Scoring with a rollout-replay protocol, we find consistent failure patterns on four environments and five frontier agents: (1) strong agents do not necessarily have strong budget-awareness, with correlation r=0.35. (2) frontier models are consistently over-optimistic, continue spending on tasks that are unlikely to succeed, instead of alerting the user early. (3) budget-aware signal is actionable and trainable. Early stop saves 28-64% tokens on failed trajectories, and SFT+RL strengthens early stop and alert behavior. (4) precise interval calibration remains challenging, with interval coverage capping at 47% after SFT+RL. Project page: https://ragen-ai.github.io/bagen/

</details>


### [320] [From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00202)
*Zakk Heile,Hayden McTavish,Varun Babbar,Margo Seltzer,Cynthia Rudin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRAXIS算法通过近似计算Rashomon集合，显著降低了计算稀疏决策树等可解释模型类Rashomon集合的内存和时间需求，使研究人员能够在实际数据集上可扩展地建模Rashomon集合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习流水线中常存在许多接近最优的模型（Rashomon集合），这些集合对不确定性感知和鲁棒决策提出了挑战和机遇。它们允许用户融入难以直接指定的领域知识和偏好，并量化给定训练数据集和目标函数下有效模型的多样性。然而，即使对于简单的可解释模型类（如稀疏决策树），计算Rashomon集合仍然需要巨大的内存和运行时资源。

Method: 提出了PRAXIS算法，该算法能够近似计算Rashomon集合，相比传统方法在运行时间和内存使用上实现了数量级的改进。

Result: PRAXIS算法通常能够恢复几乎全部的完整Rashomon集合，使研究人员和从业者能够在真实世界数据集上可扩展地建模Rashomon集合。

Conclusion: PRAXIS算法通过高效近似Rashomon集合，解决了计算资源限制的问题，为不确定性感知和鲁棒决策提供了实用的工具，使Rashomon集合的实际应用成为可能。

Abstract: Standard machine learning pipelines often admit many near-optimal models. These "Rashomon sets" pose a range of challenges and opportunities for uncertainty-aware, robust decision making. They allow users to incorporate domain knowledge and preferences that would otherwise be difficult to specify directly in an objective, and they quantify diversity among valid models for a given training dataset and objective function. However, computation of Rashomon sets, even for simple, interpretable model classes such as sparse decision trees, continues to require immense memory and runtime resources. We present PRAXIS, an algorithm to approximate this Rashomon set with orders of magnitude improvement in runtime and memory usage. We validate that PRAXIS regularly recovers almost all of the full Rashomon set. PRAXIS allows researchers and practitioners to scalably model the Rashomon set for real-world datasets. Code for PRAXIS is available at https://github.com/zakk-h/PRAXIS

</details>


### [321] [Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00206)
*Sanae Lotfi,Polina Kirichenko,Steven Li,Zechun Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 量化后的大语言模型在推理任务中会出现"过度思考"错误，虽然中间推理步骤正确但最终答案错误，通过惩罚特定"过度思考"标记可以降低推理长度同时保持或提高准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 后训练量化(PTQ)广泛用于高效部署大语言模型，但其对推理模型的影响尚不清楚。研究者发现激进的量化会降低准确率同时增加思维链长度，需要理解量化为何导致这种"过度思考"现象。

Method: 研究量化模型在数学、编程和科学QA任务中的表现，测量量化与全精度模型的token级KL散度，识别高KL散度位置与高熵的相关性，发现量化模型在这些位置倾向于采样"过度思考"标记，然后引入无训练的logit惩罚来抑制这些标记。

Result: 量化模型中高达52%的失败案例中模型在中间推理步骤得到正确答案但最终未输出。通过惩罚"过度思考"标记（如"wait"、"but"、"alternatively"），思维链长度减少12-23%，同时保持或提高准确率，在5个模型、3种量化方法和5个基准测试中均有效，量化模型的过度思考错误最多减少58%。

Conclusion: 量化会导致推理模型出现"过度思考"错误，通过简单惩罚特定过度思考标记可以显著改善量化后推理模型的性能，在准确率和推理成本之间获得更好的帕累托前沿。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely used to deploy large language models efficiently, but its effect on reasoning models is not well understood. Across math, coding, and science QA, we find that aggressive PTQ reduces accuracy while increasing chain-of-thought (CoT) length. Surprisingly, we show that in up to 52% of the quantized models' failures, models reach the right answer in intermediate reasoning steps but do not output it as a final answer. To understand why quantization leads to this increase in overthinking errors, we measure the token-level KL divergence between quantized and full-precision output distributions. Positions with high KL divergence correlate strongly with high next-token entropy, and at these positions quantized models disproportionately sample overthinking markers such as "wait", "but", and "alternatively". We show that simply introducing a training-free logit penalty on a curated set of overthinking markers can reduce CoT length by 12--23% while preserving or improving accuracy across 5 models (1.5B-32B parameters), 3 quantization methods, and 5 benchmarks, yielding a favorable Pareto frontier of accuracy against reasoning cost compared to penalizing other token sets. Overthinking errors produced by quantized models are particularly reduced by up to 58%.

</details>


### [322] [LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00228)
*Yao Lai,Xuyuan Xiong,Zeyue Xue,Guojin Chen,Jing Wang,Xihui Liu,Rui Zhang,Robert Mullins,Bei Yu,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LithoGRPO：首个将流匹配与强化学习结合用于光刻掩模优化的框架，通过GRPO强化学习微调和物理奖励函数，在保持高效生成的同时实现最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电路特征尺寸缩小到光波长以下，光学衍射导致印刷图案偏离预期布局。传统逆光刻技术（ILT）依赖显式物理指标评估掩模，限制了现有生成模型的适用性。需要一种能有效探索多样化掩模、同时考虑复杂制造约束的优化方法。

Method: 提出LithoGRPO框架，将流匹配范式与基于GRPO的强化学习微调相结合。利用ILT中明确定义的物理奖励函数，在复杂工艺感知约束下进行优化。提出快速shot-counting算法用于可制造性评估，实现130倍加速同时保持掩模排序准确性。

Result: 实验表明，LithoGRPO在基于优化的方法和基于学习的方法上都实现了最先进的性能，同时保持高效的掩模生成。快速shot-counting算法在保持传统shot-count指标排序的同时，实现了超过130倍的加速。

Conclusion: LithoGRPO是首个将流匹配与强化学习统一用于掩模优化的框架，通过利用物理奖励函数和高效采样，在半导体制造中实现了高性能的逆光刻技术，为先进节点光刻提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In semiconductor manufacturing, lithography projects circuit layouts onto silicon wafers through an optical mask. As circuit features shrink below the wavelength of light, optical diffraction causes the printed patterns to deviate from their intended layouts. Inverse Lithography Technology (ILT) addresses this challenge by generating optimized masks that enhance the fidelity of pattern transfer onto wafers. While ILT resembles an image synthesis task, its reliance on explicit physical metrics for mask evaluation limits the applicability of existing generative models. We introduce LithoGRPO, an ILT framework that integrates the flow-matching paradigm with GRPO-based reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning, enabling efficient exploration of diverse masks for a given target layout. Unlike purely generative or optimization-based approaches, RL in LithoGRPO exploits the explicitly defined, physics-based reward function of ILT, enabling optimization under complex, process-aware constraints. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first framework that unifies flow matching and RL for mask optimization. To improve RL sampling efficiency, we propose a fast shot-counting algorithm for manufacturability evaluation, achieving over 130x speedup while preserving the mask ranking of the traditional shot-count metric. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LithoGRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance over both optimization-based and learning-based methods, while maintaining efficient mask generation.

</details>


### [323] [A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00230)
*Sherin Muckatira,Namrata Shivagunde,Vijeta Deshpande,Anna Rumshisky*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于曝光度的框架来研究LLM预训练中的"顿悟"现象，通过BLiMP最小对构建代理训练/验证集，发现语法概念在泛化后变得更加可预测并占据更高维子空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLM预训练中是否存在类似监督学习中的"顿悟"现象，即模型在长时间训练后才突然泛化。由于LLM预训练使用无标签语料、数据重复有限且没有显式的训练/验证划分，需要新的评估框架。

Method: 提出基于曝光度的框架：使用BLiMP最小对构建可控语法对比；为每个最小对识别关键短语（捕捉语法对比的最小连续跨度）；根据关键短语是否出现在预训练窗口中将示例分配到代理训练集或代理验证集。

Result: 在五种语法现象中观察到延迟泛化；分析显示泛化后语法概念向量对语法可接受性的预测能力增强，并占据更高维子空间；关键token到相关上下文token的注意力集中在少数注意力头上。

Conclusion: LLM预训练中存在类似监督学习的"顿悟"现象，提出的曝光度框架能够有效研究这一动态过程，揭示了语法知识在模型中的表示和演变机制。

Abstract: Grokking, the phenomenon in which neural networks generalize long after fitting their training data, has been studied in supervised settings on many epochs. LLM pre-training instead involves next-token prediction over an unlabeled corpus, with limited data repetition and no explicit train/validation split. To address this, we propose an exposure-based framework that enables the study of grokking-like dynamics during LLM pre-training. We ground our evaluation in BLiMP minimal pairs, which provide controlled grammatical contrasts. For every BLiMP minimal pair, we identify a critical phrase, the smallest continuous span that captures the grammatical contrast and the phenomenon-relevant context. Examples whose critical phrase appears in the pre-training window are assigned to the proxy-train split; the remaining examples are assigned to the proxy-validation split. Across five grammatical phenomena, we observe delayed generalization. Analyzing pre-training checkpoints before and after generalization shows that grammatical concept vectors become more predictive of grammatical acceptability and occupy a higher-dimensional subspace after generalization. We also find that attention from the critical token to the relevant context token is concentrated in a small number of heads.

</details>


### [324] [InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00241)
*Zhengyang Hu,Yanzhi Chen,Hanxiang Ren,Qunsong Zeng,Youyi Zheng,Adrian Weller,Kaibin Huang,Yanchao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: InfoAtlas：一种基础模型架构，通过单次前向传播直接推断互信息，相比传统神经互信息估计器实现100倍加速，同时保持精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经互信息估计器需要对每个新数据集进行昂贵的迭代优化，不适用于实时应用。需要消除这一瓶颈，实现快速、准确的互信息估计

Method: 提出InfoAtlas基础模型架构，在大规模合成数据上预训练，学习识别多样依赖结构，直接从数据集预测互信息，单次前向传播完成估计

Result: 在精度上与最先进的神经估计器相当，同时实现100倍加速；单个统一模型能灵活处理不同维度和样本量；在复杂真实场景中有效泛化

Conclusion: 通过将互信息估计重新构建为推理任务，InfoAtlas为实时依赖分析奠定了基础，解决了传统方法计算成本高的问题

Abstract: Measuring statistical dependency between high-dimensional random variables is a fundamental task in data science and machine learning. Neural mutual information (MI) estimators offer a promising avenue, but they typically require costly iterative optimization for each new dataset, making them impractical for real-time applications. We present InfoAtlas, a foundation model-like architecture that eliminates this bottleneck by directly inferring MI in a single forward pass. Pretrained on large-scale synthetic data with rich dependence patterns, InfoAtlas learns to identify diverse dependence structures and predict MI directly from the dataset. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that InfoAtlas matches state-of-the-art neural estimators in accuracy while achieving $100\times$ speedup, can flexibly handle varying dimensions and sample sizes through a single unified model, and generalizes effectively to complex, real-world scenarios. By reformulating MI estimation as an inference task, InfoAtlas establishes a foundation for real-time dependency analysis.

</details>


### [325] [ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00257)
*Rodney Lafuente-Mercado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出在LoRA微调的语言模型强化学习中，传统的基于输出分布差异的token级信用分配方法会失效，并提出了基于适配器隐藏状态残差的轻量级替代方案ARCA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
