The proposed approach converges to general GNEs, rather than being restricted to v-GNEs, with the attained equilibrium depending on the initialization. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through applications in multi-robot coordination and placement.
  In the second part, this work includes research conducted in collaboration with Amazon scientists. One of the most challenging problems in real-world machine learning is labeled data collection, which typically requires substantial human effort and cost. Active learning aims to reduce this labeling requirement. Existing handcrafted active learning strategies, however, generally perform well only on specific types of datasets, which are often unknown in advance. In this work, I propose using contextual bandits to adaptively select the most suitable active learning strategy. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated on publicly available external datasets.

</details>


### [402] [Confidence-Adaptive SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00761)
*Shaohua Li,Xiuchao Sui,Xiaobing Sun,Yuhang Wu,Liangli Zhen,Yong Liu,Rick Siow Mong Goh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SwiGLU激活函数在MoE模型中引入置信度感知的锐度调节机制，通过路由器置信度动态调整门控锐度，提升模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SwiGLU的门控锐度在训练过程中固定不变，无法根据输入token的路由置信度进行自适应调整，限制了MoE模型的性能潜力

Method: 提出κ-SwiGLU，将SiLU门的锐度系数参数化为路由器logit的可学习函数，使每个专家门控单元能在平滑的广泛激活和锐利的选择性激活之间插值

Result: 在FineWeb-Edu数据集上，从8到28层的MoE Transformer模型中，κ-SwiGLU显著提升了平均CORE性能，仅增加极少参数和轻微计算开销

Conclusion: 置信度感知的门控锐度是改进MoE多层感知器的有效机制，κ-SwiGLU为现代Transformer MLP提供了更灵活的自适应激活函数

Abstract: SwiGLU has become a standard gated activation in modern Transformer MLPs, yet its gate sharpness -- the smoothness and selectivity of the gating function -- is typically fixed throughout training. In this work, we propose Confidence-Aware SwiGLU ($κ$-SwiGLU), a variant of SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models that adjusts expert gate sharpness according to token-level routing confidence. Specifically, $κ$-SwiGLU parameterizes the SiLU gate sharpness coefficient as a learnable function of the router logit, enabling each expert gate unit to interpolate between smooth, broadly active gating and sharp, selective gating. We evaluate $κ$-SwiGLU on the FineWeb-Edu dataset across MoE Transformer models ranging from 8 to 28 layers. Across these settings, $κ$-SwiGLU improves mean CORE performance while adding negligible parameters and incurring only a small computational overhead, demonstrating that confidence-aware gate sharpness is a promising mechanism for improving MoE MLPs. The code is available at https://github.com/askerlee/kappa-swiglu.

</details>


### [403] [Logit Distillation on Manifolds: Mapping by Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00771)
*Yiru Yang,Junling Wang,Nishant Kumar Singh,Luohong Wu,Haoran Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通过层和点对点投影映射的师生模型对齐方法，结合LoRA减少学生模型参数，显著降低词错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集成学习能提升模型性能但部署成本高，特别是大型神经网络。需要一种轻量化的知识蒸馏方法，在减少参数的同时保持性能。

Method: 引入层和点对点投影映射，将师生模型表示对齐到高维嵌入空间，结合LoRA技术将学生可训练参数降至教师模型的1%以下。

Result: 相比其他蒸馏方法，显著降低了词错误率(WER)，在消融研究中得到验证。训练快速且可并行，不像专家混合系统那样复杂。

Conclusion: 提出的投影映射结合LoRA的蒸馏方法，在极大减少参数的同时提升了学生模型性能，为轻量化部署提供了有效方案。

Abstract: A simple way to improve the performance of almost any machine learning model is not to train a single but several models with diverse algorithms which will make slightly distinct kinds of predictions and errors on the same data, and thus improve the average predictions and robustness. However, making predictions using a whole ensemble of models is cumbersome and computationally too expensive to allow deployment to a large number of users, especially if the models are large neural nets. In response to this, we introduce a layer and point wise projection mapping, which maps student and teacher representations into an aligned high-dimensional embedding space during training process. The proposed approach combined with LoRA injection reduces the student model trainable parameters to less than 1% of the teacher model, while significantly improving word error rate (WER) compared to other distillation methods, as demonstrated in ablation studies. Unlike a mixture of experts, our method can be trained rapidly and in parallel.

</details>


### [404] [Latent Diffusion Pretraining for Crystal Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00776)
*Shrimon Mukherjee,Kishalay Das,Partha Basuchowdhuri,Pawan Goyal,Niloy Ganguly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CrysLDNet是一个用于晶体属性预测的潜在扩散预训练框架，通过变分自编码器将3D晶体结构映射到平滑潜在空间，再结合扩散模型进行预训练，有效缓解了晶体属性标记数据稀缺的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 晶体属性预测是新材料设计的关键挑战，虽然图神经网络和Transformer模型能编码原子局部结构环境，但这些模型需要大量数据，而实际可用的晶体属性标记数据非常稀缺。现有预训练微调策略（特别是基于扩散模型的方法）显示出解决这一问题的潜力。

Method: 提出CrysLDNet框架，在预训练阶段将变分自编码器（VAE）与扩散模型相结合。VAE编码器将3D晶体结构映射到平滑潜在空间，在该空间内进行扩散过程。这种潜在扩散预训练使图编码器能从大规模无标签数据中有效捕获结构和化学语义，然后针对特定属性预测任务进行微调。

Result: 在流行的DFT属性预测数据集上的实验表明，CrysLDNet显著优于从头训练和预训练基线模型，在JARVIS和MP数据集上分别提升4.26%和4.90%。学习的表示在稀疏数据条件下保持稳健，且表达能力足以在有限实验数据微调时纠正DFT误差。

Conclusion: CrysLDNet通过潜在扩散预训练有效缓解了晶体属性预测中的数据稀缺问题，在多个基准数据集上取得了显著性能提升，并在稀疏数据条件下表现出良好的稳健性，为新材料的计算设计提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Fast and accurate prediction of crystal properties is a central challenge in new materials design. Graph neural networks and Transformer-based models have emerged as powerful tools for this task due to their ability to encode the local structural environment of atoms within a crystal. However, these models are data-hungry, and in practice, labeled data for crystal properties are scarce. Pretraining-finetuning strategies, particularly those based on diffusion models, have shown promise in addressing these limitations. In this work, we introduce a novel latent diffusion based pretraining framework, CrysLDNet, designed to mitigate data scarcity. Our approach integrates a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with a diffusion model during the pretraining stage. The VAE encoder maps 3D crystal structures into a smooth latent space within which the diffusion process is applied. This latent diffusion pretraining enables the graph encoder to effectively capture structural and chemical semantics from large-scale unlabeled data, which can then be finetuned for specific property prediction tasks. Comprehensive experiments on popular DFT datasets for property prediction reveal that CrysLDNet significantly outperforms both training-from-scratch and pretrained baselines, with improvements of 4.26% and 4.90% on the JARVIS and MP datasets, respectively. Additionally, the learned representations remain robust in sparse-data conditions and are expressive enough to correct DFT errors when finetuned with limited experimental data. Code is available at: https://github.com/shrimonmuke0202/CrysLDNet.git.

</details>


### [405] [Behavior-Invariant Task Representation Learning with Transformer-based World Models for Offline Meta-Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00780)
*Fuyuan Qian,Menglong Zhang,Song Wang,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个结合信息论任务表示学习和Transformer随机世界模型的离线元强化学习框架，解决上下文和策略分布偏移问题，在稀疏奖励和分布外场景中实现更好的泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线元强化学习结合了离线效率和元学习适应性，但面临上下文和策略分布偏移的挑战，特别是在稀疏奖励设置下，这些问题导致智能体陷入固有模式困境，无法实现鲁棒泛化。

Method: 提出一个集成信息论任务表示学习和Transformer随机世界模型的框架：1) 提取与行为策略无关的任务定义潜在变量以缓解上下文分布偏移；2) 对基于想象的rollout应用保守值惩罚，防止策略利用模型不准确性，同时保持鲁棒适应。

Result: 广泛评估表明，该方法在分布外和稀疏奖励设置下，在稳定性和泛化能力方面优于最先进的方法。

Conclusion: 通过信息论任务表示学习和保守值惩罚的Transformer世界模型，有效解决了离线元强化学习中的分布偏移问题，实现了更好的泛化性能，特别是在具有挑战性的稀疏奖励场景中。

Abstract: Offline meta-reinforcement learning leverages static datasets to enable agents to generalize to unseen environments by combining offline efficiency with meta-learning adaptability, yet it faces key challenges from context and policy distribution shifts. These issues hinder agents from adapting to online environments, and are further exacerbated under sparse-reward settings. As a result, agents often become trapped in an inherent pattern dilemma, failing to achieve robust generalization. In this work, we propose a novel framework that integrates information-theoretic task representation learning with a Transformer-based stochastic world model. Our approach extracts task-defining latent variables that are invariant to behavior policy, thereby effectively mitigating the context distribution shift. To further handle policy shift and model exploitation, we apply a conservative value penalty to imagination-based rollouts, preventing the policy from exploiting model inaccuracies while maintaining robust adaptation. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, with superior stability and generalization under out-of-distribution and sparse-reward settings.

</details>


### [406] [Extending Causal Metamodeling to a non-Markovian Queue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00795)
*Pracheta Amaranath,Anant Bhide,David Jensen,Peter Haas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将模块化动态贝叶斯网络（MDBNs）扩展到非马尔可夫队列系统，通过使用相位型分布近似非指数分布，首次为非马尔可夫系统提供因果元建模技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的MDBNs元建模方法仅限于马尔可夫系统，需要扩展到更一般的非马尔可夫队列系统，以扩大其应用范围。

Method: 使用相位型分布近似非指数分布，解决相位数量选择平衡、参数高效学习和采样间隔选择等挑战，将连续时间模拟离散化为离散时间MDBN。

Result: 在G/M/1队列上的实验表明，MDBN能够为概率和因果查询（PCQs）提供准确答案，推理时间相比直接模拟有数量级的速度提升。

Conclusion: 成功将MDBN扩展到非马尔可夫系统，提出了首个针对非马尔可夫系统的因果元建模技术，在保持准确性的同时显著提高了推理效率。

Abstract: Metamodels for discrete-event simulations approximate the behavior of simulation models without running expensive simulations. Prior work introduced modular dynamic Bayesian networks (MDBNs) -- a class of metamodels that can estimate a range of probabilistic and causal queries (PCQs) using a single, trained model -- but the method was limited to Markovian systems. In this paper, we initiate an extension of MDBNs to non-Markovian queues by approximating non-exponential distributions using phase-type distributions. This approach raises novel challenges, including balancing metamodeling accuracy and tractability when choosing the number of phases, efficiently learning metamodel parameters, and choosing the sampling interval that is used to approximate a continuous-time simulation by a discrete-time MDBN. We provide preliminary solutions to these challenges, yielding the first causal metamodeling technique for non-Markovian systems. Experiments on a G/M/1 queue demonstrate that the MDBN can produce accurate answers to PCQs with orders-of-magnitude speedup of inference times relative to direct simulation.

</details>


### [407] [Safe-Subspace Pseudo-Label Refinement for Source-Free Graph Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00808)
*Yingxu Wang,Xinwang Liu,Siyang Gao,Nan Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种源自由图域自适应方法S²PLR，通过选择性伪标签策略在语义和结构证据支持的目标子空间上应用硬监督，对不确定样本使用噪声容忍的软正则化，从而在源图不可访问时实现鲁棒的图模型迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决源自由图域自适应中伪标签可靠性的核心挑战。在特征和拓扑结构变化下，源模型预测可能变得自信但错误，而不加区分的自训练会通过图消息传递放大系统性错误。

Method: 提出SafeSubspace Pseudo-Label Refinement (S²PLR)框架：1)识别置信一致的安全子空间；2)使用源委员会置信度和分歧估计语义可靠性；3)通过图对比学习学习目标内在结构表示；4)通过邻居一致性验证伪标签；5)对不确定样本使用噪声容忍的软正则化而非不可靠的硬标签。

Result: 在图像和真实世界图基准测试中，在不同域偏移下，S²PLR在各种源自由迁移设置中实现了鲁棒且具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 通过选择性伪标签策略，在语义和结构证据支持的安全子空间应用硬监督，对不确定样本采用软正则化，能够有效控制伪标签噪声，实现源自由图域自适应的稳健迁移。

Abstract: Source-free graph domain adaptation (SF-GDA) aims to adapt source-trained graph models to unlabeled target graphs when source graphs are no longer accessible. A central obstacle is pseudo-label reliability: under feature and topological shifts, source-induced predictions may become confidently wrong, and indiscriminate self-training can amplify systematic errors through graph message passing. This paper studies SF-GDA from a selective pseudo-labeling perspective. Instead of assuming globally bounded pseudo-label noise over the entire target domain, we identify a confidence-consistent safe subspace on which pseudo-label noise can be controlled under restricted posterior discrepancy, and derive a target-risk decomposition that separates safe-subspace fitting error, selected-label noise, and uncertain-set risk. Guided by this analysis, we propose SafeSubspace Pseudo-Label Refinement (S$^2$PLR), a source-free graph adaptation framework that applies hard pseudo-label supervision only to target graphs supported by both semantic and structural evidence. Specifically, S$^2$PLR estimates semantic reliability using source-committee confidence and disagreement, learns a targetintrinsic structural representation via graph contrastive learning, verifies pseudo-labels through neighborhood consistency, and exploits the remaining uncertain samples with noise-tolerant soft regularization rather than unreliable hard labels. Experiments on image and real-world graph benchmarks under different domain shifts demonstrate that S$^2$PLR achieves robust and competitive performance across diverse source-free transfer settings.

</details>


### [408] [OmniEEG-Bench: A Standardized Evaluation Benchmark for EEG Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00815)
*Ziling Lu,Zongsheng Li,Xinke Shen,Kexin Lou,Yingyue Xin,Xiaoqi Chen,Shinan Wang,Xiang Chen,Jiahao Fan,Chenyu Huang,Xin Xu,Zhoujie Hou,Chen Wei,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OmniEEG-Bench 是一个统一的脑电图基础模型基准测试框架，包含6个任务家族、54个标准化数据集，揭示了数据多样性和模型规模对性能的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前脑电图基础模型的评估存在碎片化问题，由于数据集异质性和任务协议不一致，难以进行系统比较。需要建立一个统一的基准测试框架来标准化评估流程。

Method: 提出了OmniEEG-Bench基准测试框架，将EEG基础模型评估组织为6个任务家族，通过任务卡片规范标准化模型部署、任务定义和指标，统一了54个EEG数据集并采用一致的评估协议。

Result: 基准测试了10个代表性的EEG基础模型，结果显示预训练数据集的多样性和模型规模都与更好的平均排名显著相关，揭示了EEG基础模型存在缩放定律行为。

Conclusion: 扩展EEG基础模型不仅需要更大的架构，还需要更广泛和更多样化的预训练数据。OmniEEG-Bench为EEG基础模型提供了标准化的评估框架。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) supports a variety of brain-computer interface (BCI) tasks ranging from brain-state monitoring to human-LLM interactions. EEG foundation models are emerging, but evaluation remains fragmented due to heterogeneous datasets and nconsistent task protocols. Here, we introduce OmniEEG-Bench, a unified benchmark and downstream task roadmap for EEG foundation models (FMs). It organizes evaluation of EEG FMs into six task families spanning (i) signal reliability, (ii) biometrics and disease, (iii) consciousness and state, (iv) cognition and emotion, (v) naturalistic stimulus decoding, and (vi) motor and interaction, introducing a new generation of tasks not systematically benchmarked in prior EEG FM work. OmniEEG-Bench standardizes model deployment, task definitions, and metrics through a task-card specification, and unifies 54 EEG datasets with consistent evaluation protocols. We benchmark 10 representative EEG foundation models and report a leaderboard that covers diverse evaluation settings. Both pretraining dataset diversity and model size are significantly associated with better average ranks across datasets, revealing scaling-law behavior in EEG foundation models (Figure 1). These results suggest that scaling EEG foundation models requires not only larger architectures but also broader and more diverse pretraining data. The benchmark code is available at https://github.com/ncclab-sustech/omni-eegbench.git.

</details>


### [409] [A Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning Algorithms for Multi-Task Prediction of the Parameters of the Pectin Hydrolysis--Extraction Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00821)
*Mullosharaf K. Arabov,Shavkat Yo. Kholov,Zainiddin K. Muhiddin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究使用机器学习方法控制复杂多参数的果胶水解-提取工艺，基于1000个实验室实验数据，比较了11种算法，CatBoost表现最佳（R²约0.946），并开发了可部署的交互式网络界面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决复杂多参数果胶水解-提取工艺的控制挑战，减少物理实验需求，为智能果胶生产控制奠定基础。

Method: 基于1000个实验室实验数据库，使用11种机器学习算法（包括正则化线性模型、集成方法、k近邻、支持向量回归和多层感知器）解决多任务回归问题，并进行超参数优化和特征重要性分析。

Result: CatBoost算法表现最佳（平均R²约0.946），特征重要性分析显示原料类型占主导地位（63.6%），其次是温度和保持时间，开发了生产就绪的管道和交互式网络界面。

Conclusion: 集成方法结合严格的统计分析和可解释AI显著减少物理实验需求，为智能果胶生产控制提供了有效基础。

Abstract: This study addresses the challenge of controlling a complex, multi-parameter technological process -- pectin hydrolysis--extraction -- using machine learning methods. The experimental foundation is a unique database comprising 1,000 laboratory experiments conducted under controlled conditions on seven types of plant raw material with four variable process factors (temperature 85--130 C, pressure 0.9--2.2 atm, holding time 3--10 min, pH 1.5--2.0). Four output characteristics were recorded: pectin yield, galacturonic acid content, molecular weight, and degree of esterification. To solve the multi-task regression problem, 11 algorithms were trained and compared: regularised linear models, ensemble methods (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, CatBoost, Extra Trees), k-nearest neighbours, support vector regression, and a multilayer perceptron. The best results were demonstrated by CatBoost (average R-squared approximately 0.946 after hyperparameter optimisation). Feature importance analysis revealed the dominant role of the raw material type (63.6% of total importance), followed by temperature and holding time. The developed pipeline was exported in a production-ready format and deployed as an interactive web interface. The findings demonstrate that ensemble methods combined with rigorous statistical analysis and interpretable AI significantly reduce the need for physical experiments and form the basis for intelligent pectin production control.

</details>


### [410] [Partial Fairness Awareness: Belief-Guided Strategic Mechanism for Strategic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00826)
*Xinpeng Lv,Chunyuan Zheng,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Hao Zou,Shanzhi Gu,Liyang Xu,Huan Chen,Yuanlong Chen,Wenjing Yang,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了战略性机器学习中的公平性困境，提出了部分公平意识（PFA）方法，通过公开候选公平约束集但隐藏实际约束，来平衡公平性暴露问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前公平感知方法面临公平性暴露困境：公开公平约束会导致策略性操纵和公平性逆转，而隐藏约束会降低社会福利并阻碍真实改进。需要找到平衡这两种极端的方法。

Method: 提出部分公平意识（PFA）问题，引入信念引导的战略机制，代理通过迭代交互维护对候选公平约束集的信念分布，逐步使信念与实际约束对齐。

Result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上的实验表明，PFA相比完全公开或私密公平机制，实现了更低的群体公平差距、更高的真正合格个体接受率以及更稳定的结果。

Conclusion: 部分公平意识（PFA）通过公开候选约束集但隐藏实际约束，有效缓解了公平性暴露困境，在战略性分类中实现了更好的公平性、效率和社会福利平衡。

Abstract: Strategic machine learning investigates scenarios where agents manipulate their features to receive favorable decisions from predictive models. To address fairness concerns intrinsic to strategic classification, recent work has introduced group-specific fairness constraints. However, current fairness-aware approaches face a fundamental dilemma in the issue of fairness exposure: making these constraints public enables strategic manipulation and can lead to fairness reversal, while keeping them hidden may reduce social welfare and discourage genuine improvement. To fill this gap, we subsequently propose the problem of partial fairness awareness (PFA), as our theoretical analysis informs that such a dilemma can be mitigated by releasing the candidate set of fairness constraints and concealing the grounding constraint. To be specific, we introduce a belief-guided strategic mechanism, wherein agents iteratively interact with the decision system and maintain a belief distribution over the candidate set of fairness constraints. This belief-guided process enables agents, through iterative interaction and feedback, to update their belief distribution over the candidate set, thereby gradually aligning their belief with the grounding fairness constraint employed by the system. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that PFA achieves lower group fairness gaps, higher acceptance of truly qualified individuals, and more stable outcomes compared to fully public or private fairness regimes.

</details>


### [411] [Beyond Independent Manipulation: Individual Fairness-aware Strategic Classification with Peer Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00827)
*Xinpeng Lv,Chunyuan Zheng,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Jinxuan Yang,Yuanlong Chen,Wangrong Huang,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Xinwang Liu,Peng Cui,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出个体公平感知的战略分类（IFSC）框架，解决传统战略分类在个体公平要求下的局限性，通过建模基于相似性的同伴模仿行为，并采用鲁棒学习处理同伴可见性的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平感知战略分类方法主要关注群体公平，并假设代理人独立响应。但在个体公平要求下（相似个体应获得相似结果），代理人的操纵行为变得相互依赖，传统独立模型无法准确描述战略操纵。

Method: 提出IFSC框架，将战略操纵建模为向可见被接受同伴的基于相似性的模仿，学习在由此产生的后操纵分布下的分类器。采用鲁棒学习过程，在操纵模拟中引入随机扰动以处理同伴可见性的不确定性。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，IFSC提高了个体公平一致性，并减轻了模仿引起的扭曲。

Conclusion: IFSC框架有效解决了个体公平要求下的战略分类问题，通过建模同伴驱动的模仿行为并提供鲁棒学习方法，改善了传统方法在个体公平场景中的局限性。

Abstract: Strategic classification (SC) investigates scenarios where agents manipulate their features to obtain favorable decisions from predictive models. Existing fairness-aware SC approaches primarily focus on group fairness and typically assume that agents respond independently. However, when individual fairness is required, ensuring similar individuals receive similar outcomes, agents' manipulation becomes interdependent: an agent's preferred manipulation depends on the neighborhoods' outcomes. This induces a mismatch between classical SC formulations and fairness-aware decision settings, where independent models no longer accurately characterize strategic manipulations. To address this issue, we introduce individual fairness-aware strategic classification (IFSC), a framework that models peer-driven manipulation arising from individual fairness, where agents imitate nearby positively decided peers to obtain favorable outcomes. IFSC characterizes strategic manipulation as similarity-based imitation toward visible accepted peers and learns classifiers under the resulting post-manipulation distributions. To account for uncertainty in peer observability, IFSC employs a robust learning process that introduces stochastic perturbations during manipulation simulation. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that IFSC improves individual-fairness consistency and mitigates imitation-induced distortions.

</details>


### [412] [Online Packet Scheduling with Deadlines and Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00835)
*Gianmarco Genalti,Achraf Azize,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究在线包调度问题，在网络路由器QoS保证场景下，当包权重未知且只能通过执行后观测时，提出基于bandit反馈的算法，在不同松弛度条件下实现α-regret上界为√(KT)，在2-边界期限实例中达到最优竞争比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络路由器需要在每个时钟周期决定传输哪个即将过期的数据包，但包的权重值（价值）在执行前是未知的。这在实际网络QoS保证中很常见，需要在不完全信息下做出实时调度决策。

Method: 将问题建模为部分反馈下的在线包调度问题，建立与睡眠bandit问题的联系。提出基于α-regret最小化的算法，针对不同松弛度系统（允许随机化和不允许随机化）分别设计算法。特别关注2-边界期限实例。

Result: 算法在所有情况下都达到α-regret上界为Õ(√(KT))，与标准bandit设置的下界匹配。对于2-边界期限实例，确定性算法达到最紧可能的竞争比。当包类型K≥2有限时，能够突破黄金比例Φ=1.618的竞争比壁垒，获得更优的竞争比θ_K∈[√2,Φ)。

Conclusion: 该工作为部分反馈下的在线包调度问题提供了理论保证，在带宽限制和实际约束下实现了接近最优的性能，特别在2-边界期限场景中达到了理论最优的竞争比，突破了传统竞争比壁垒。

Abstract: Network routers that enforce Quality-of-Service (QoS) guarantees must decide, at every clock cycle, which expiring packet of information to transmit, even when the value of the packet is unknown until it is processed. We frame this problem as the Online Packet Scheduling with Deadlines (OPSD) problem under Partial Feedback: packets arrive at every clock cycle, with different deadlines, but the weights are only observed after execution. Under a stochastic assumption on the unknown weights, we explore different variants of the OPSD problem with bandit feedback. We establish a connection between our setting and the sleeping bandits problem, and set our learning goal to $α$-regret minimization. We provide algorithms with provable $α$-regret guarantees under different spans of slackness, distinguishing systems allowing for randomization and systems that do not. In every scenario, our algorithms achieve an $α$-regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\sqrt{KT}\right)$, matching the lower bound for the standard bandit setting. In the practically relevant case of $2$-bounded deadline instances, where the deadline is set at most one clock cycle away from the arrival, our deterministic algorithm achieves the provably tightest possible competitive ratio. Remarkably, when the number of distinct packet types $K\ge 2$ is finite, it is possible to break the well-established $Φ= \frac{1+\sqrt{5}}{2}$ competitive ratio barrier and attain a tighter competitive ratio $θ_K$ ranging in $[\sqrt{2}, Φ)$.

</details>


### [413] [CUPID in the Model Zoo: Online Matchmaking for Selecting Your Dream LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00846)
*Son Nguyen,Xinyuan Liu,Ransalu Senanayake*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个基于主动学习的交互高效框架，通过决斗老虎机算法迭代选择LLM对，收集用户反馈，更新对用户潜在偏好的认知，以在成本和时间预算内高效匹配用户与合适的LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户面临从众多LLM中选择合适模型的挑战，且难以明确表达对LLM响应的偏好特征。需要一种交互高效的方法来理解用户潜在偏好并匹配适合的LLM。

Method: 提出基于主动学习的框架，使用决斗老虎机算法迭代选择LLM对进行对比，收集用户反馈，采用新颖的信念感知上置信界策略平衡探索与利用，在用户指定的成本和时间预算内实现高效匹配。

Result: 通过多样化的LLM实验和人类研究验证，该模型能够以较低成本高效地将与用户需求匹配良好的LLM推荐给用户。

Conclusion: 该交互高效的主动学习框架能够有效解决用户选择合适LLM的挑战，通过理解用户潜在偏好，在有限预算内实现用户需求与LLM能力的高效对齐。

Abstract: Users increasingly face the challenge of selecting an appropriate LLM for a given task from a rapidly growing pool of LLMs, each with distinct but often opaque latent properties. Compounding this challenge, users may lack the vocabulary or awareness to explicitly articulate the characteristics they value in an LLM's responses or deployment. We propose an interaction-efficient active learning framework in which a dueling bandit algorithm iteratively selects pairs of LLMs, collects user feedback about their responses, and updates its belief about the user's latent preferences. We introduce a novel belief-aware upper confidence bound strategy that balances exploration of the model pool with exploitation of inferred preferences, enabling efficient alignment between user needs and LLM capabilities under user-specified cost and time budgets. Through diverse experiments on LLMs and human studies, we experimentally verify that our model can efficiently match well-aligned LLMs to users at a lower cost.

</details>


### [414] [Enhancing LLM Metacognition via Cognitive Pairwise Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00869)
*Weitao Li,Hao Zhou,Xuanyu Lei,Fandong Meng,Yuanhang Liu,Jingyi Ren,Ante Wang,Xiaolong Wang,Yuanchi Zhang,Fuwen Luo,Guangwen Yang,Lin Gan,Weizhi Ma,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CPT通过认知对比训练提升LLM推理可靠性，而非仅学习拒绝模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习主要让LLM在回答层面拒绝或表达不确定性，这可能导致模型过度拟合拒绝行为而非真正提升推理可靠性

Method: 提出认知成对训练(CPT)，通过比较推理轨迹的成对对比学习，让模型内化推理质量的判别边界而非记忆表面拒绝模式

Result: 在五个模型尺度和三个模型家族中，CPT改善了推理-元认知权衡。在14B模型上，CPT+RL比标准SFT+RL管道在数学平均分上提升+2.2分，在拒绝F1分数上提升+5.2分

Conclusion: CPT通过认知对比学习有效提升LLM推理可靠性和元认知能力，具有强鲁棒性和可扩展性

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become central to LLM reasoning, but its outcome-level rewards can make models more willing to give confident answers when evidence or reasoning is unreliable. Existing SFT or RL methods mainly teach LLMs to refuse or express uncertainty at the response level, which can overfit abstention behavior rather than improve reasoning reliability. To address this limitation, we propose Cognitive Pairwise Training (CPT), a cognitive mid-training alignment stage that turns pairwise comparisons over reasoning traces into a reusable alignment signal. By learning to distinguish trustworthy from flawed reasoning, CPT encourages the model to internalize a reasoning-quality discrimination boundary rather than memorize surface refusal patterns. Across five model scales and three model families, CPT improves the reasoning--metacognition trade-off. At 14B, CPT+RL outperforms the standard SFT+RL pipeline by +2.2 math-average points and +5.2 abstention-F1 points. Further analyses show that CPT improves trace quality and exhibits strong robustness and scalability across evaluation and training settings. Code and models are released at https://github.com/Tsinghua-dhy/CPT.

</details>


### [415] [Task diversity produces systematic transfer but inhibits continual reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00880)
*Purab Seth,Neil Shah,Kunal Jha,Samuel J. Gershman,Max Kleiman-Weiner,Wilka Carvalho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Banyan是一个新的持续强化学习基准，研究任务多样性如何影响代理在分布变化中的持续学习能力，发现多样性有助于短期迁移但不足以实现长期持续学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究任务多样性是否不仅提高零样本泛化能力，还能增强代理在分布变化中的持续学习能力，这是当前研究未明确解决的问题。

Method: 引入Banyan基准，将任务多样性分解为三个可独立控制的维度：地图布局、交互对象和子目标依赖的层次结构，系统评估多样性对持续学习的影响。

Result: 单个分布变化中，各维度多样性增加能使代理在新任务开始时接近先前任务性能；但随着变化次数增加，这种局部迁移无法维持持续学习，长时任务会停滞，先前任务会被遗忘。

Conclusion: Banyan为研究任务多样性何时产生可迁移学习、何时能持续以及为何仍达不到真正的持续学习提供了基准，揭示了多样性对短期迁移有益但不足以解决长期持续学习挑战。

Abstract: Continual reinforcement learning aims to produce agents that learn not only to improve at their current tasks but also to adapt as task distributions change. Training an agent on many diverse tasks can induce zero-shot generalization, but previous work generally evaluates this generalization after training -- with frozen weights. Whether task diversity also improves an agent's ability to continue learning across distribution shifts remains unclear. We introduce Banyan, a GPU-accelerated continual RL domain in which task diversity factors into three independently controllable axes: the map layouts an agent must navigate, the objects it must interact with, and the hierarchical structures of sub-goal dependencies. Across individual distribution shifts, increasing diversity along each axis causes agents to begin training on the new tasks near the performance attained on the previous one, even when the shift changes the structure of the optimal policy. However, as the number of shifts increases, this local transfer does not by itself yield sustained continual learning: longer-horizon tasks plateau, and earlier task distributions are forgotten after later training. Banyan is a benchmark for studying when controlled task diversity produces transferable learning, when that transfer persists, and where it falls short of proper continual learning.

</details>


### [416] [Dive into Waves: Morlet Spectral Transformer for Cross-Subject Emotion Decoding from EEG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00884)
*Jiaxin Qing,Lexin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于跨被试脑电情绪识别的Morlet谱变换器（MST），通过Morlet小波标记化、长上下文基线去除和频带特定空间投影三个关键组件，在无需预训练的情况下超越了现有大型预训练脑电基础模型和频域方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑电情绪识别具有重要应用价值，但面临信号弱、噪声大、跨被试变异性高等挑战。现有方法要么依赖需要大量数据的大型预训练脑电基础模型，要么使用频域编码器但存在表示不匹配、漂移主导标记化和缺乏频带特定空间建模等问题。

Method: 提出Morlet谱变换器（MST），包含三个核心组件：1) Morlet小波标记化，提供匹配脑节律多尺度结构的时频表示；2) 长上下文基线去除，作为简单的时间归一化，消除被试特定漂移和相邻窗口冗余；3) 频带特定空间投影，为每个频带学习单独通道混合器，捕获可解释的频带特定模式并减少跨通道混合。这些组件与时空变换器骨干网络集成。

Result: 在无需预训练的情况下，MST在所有SEED-family数据集上一致地超越了大型预训练脑电基础模型和基于频率的方法。

Conclusion: 精心设计的表示方法可以产生准确、经济高效且可解释的替代方案，无需依赖大规模预训练。这表明在脑电情绪识别任务中，表示设计比大规模预训练更为重要。

Abstract: We study cross-subject emotion recognition from EEG, a practically important yet challenging problem in brain-computer interfaces. Unlike tasks with clear waveform signatures, emotion-related EEG signals are primarily encoded in spectral power and are weak, noisy, and highly variable across subjects. Existing approaches rely either on large pretrained EEG foundation models, which require massive data yet still struggle with cross-subject variability, or frequency-domain encoders, which better reflect spectral structure but suffer from mismatched representations, drift-dominated tokenization, and lack of band-specific spatial modeling. In this article, we propose the Morlet Spectral Transformer (MST), built around three key components and integrated with a spatiotemporal Transformer backbone. First, Morlet wavelet tokenization provides a time-frequency representation that matches the multi-scale structure of brain rhythms, and extends classical differential entropy features to a form suitable for Transformers. Second, long-context baseline removal acts as a simple temporal normalization that removes subject-specific drift and redundancy across nearby windows. Third, frequency-specific spatial projection learns a separate channel mixer for each frequency band, capturing interpretable band-specific patterns and reducing cross-channel mixing. We show that, even without pretraining, MST consistently outperforms both large pretrained EEG foundation models and frequency-based methods across all SEED-family datasets. These results suggest that careful representation design can yield an accurate, cost-effective, and interpretable alternative to large-scale pretraining.

</details>


### [417] [Memory-Efficient LLM Training with Dynamic Sparsity: From Stability to Practical Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00888)
*Qiao Xiao,Boqian Wu,Patrik Okanovic,Tomasz Sternal,Maurice van Keulen,Elena Mocanu,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Torsten Hoefler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SMET提出了一种稳定动态稀疏训练的方法，通过优化器预热和密度感知学习率缩放解决LLM训练中的优化不稳定性问题，同时减少内存消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态稀疏训练在大型语言模型训练中会出现优化不稳定性，表现为拓扑更新后的损失尖峰。研究发现标准Adam优化器会导致新生长参数的冷启动问题，产生过大更新并破坏训练动态。

Method: 提出SMET方法：1) 通过优化器预热稳定动态稀疏训练；2) 使用密度感知学习率缩放提高训练进度；3) 仅存储活跃参数的梯度和优化器状态以降低内存消耗。

Result: 理论分析显示SMET改善了优化稳定性。大量实验证明SMET能够实现稳定、可扩展且内存高效的稀疏预训练LLM，使稀疏训练成为密集训练的实用替代方案。

Conclusion: SMET为动态稀疏训练提供了有效的解决方案，解决了LLM训练中的优化不稳定性和内存效率问题，为稀疏训练的实用化铺平了道路。

Abstract: Dynamic Sparse Training (DST) offers a promising paradigm for improving the training and inference efficiency of deep neural networks; however, we find that in large language model training, DST can suffer from optimization instability, manifested as loss spikes after topology updates. In this work, we show that the naive use of standard Adam-based optimizers leads to a cold-start issue for newly regrown parameters, resulting in excessively large updates and disrupted training dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Sparse Memory-Efficient Training (SMET), which stabilizes DST with optimizer warm-up and improves training progress through density-aware learning-rate scaling. SMET further reduces memory consumption by storing gradients and optimizer states only for active parameters. We provide a theoretical analysis of the update behaviors under SMET, showing improved optimization stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SMET enables stable, scalable, and memory-efficient sparse pre-training of LLMs, paving the way for sparse training as a practical alternative to dense training. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/QiaoXiao7282/SMET.

</details>


### [418] [An Exploratory Study into using Machine-Learning for Fast Step-by-step Emulation of Numerical Mechanical Thrombectomy Simulations for Ischemic Stroke](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00892)
*Thijs Stessen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于机器学习的替代模型可以加速缺血性卒中机械取栓的数值物理模拟，但在复杂几何形状下长期模拟的稳定性不足


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机械取栓治疗缺血性卒中需要在时间压力下做出决策，数值物理模拟理论上可以提供指导，但实际计算速度太慢

Method: 在两种不同几何复杂度的简化抽吸手术仿真中，训练了三种替代模型，并测试了数据增强技术

Result: 其中两个模型能准确预测单步仿真结果并实现显著加速，但复杂几何形状下长期模拟时稳定性不足

Conclusion: 本研究为开发稳定、可扩展到实际机械取栓数值物理模拟的方法奠定了基础

Abstract: The treatment of ischemic stroke using mechanical thrombectomy involves difficult decisions under intense time constraints. Numerical physics simulations can in theory inform operators to make better decisions regarding treatment approaches and device selection, but are too slow to do so in practice. In this thesis, we investigate if current machine learning based surrogates can accurately emulate these simulations in a step-by-step manner while making them significantly faster. To do this we train three surrogate models on two simulations that involve a simplified aspiration procedure, with varying levels of geometric complexity. Our results show that two of our models accurately predict singular simulation steps and provide substantial speedups, especially when combined with specific data augmentations. However, the models showed a lack of stability when emulating simulations with complex geometries over longer time periods. Overall, this work provides a foundation for future studies to develop stable methods that scale to realistic numerical physics simulations of mechanical thrombectomy.

</details>


### [419] [Accuracy, Stability, and Repeated-Run Reliability of Large Language Models on Deterministic Programming Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00920)
*Yongxi Zhou,Lai Yun Choi,Jiaxi Wen,Wenbo Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 传统单次运行准确率评估会高估无重试覆盖率最多达17.8个百分点，特别是在中等性能系统中差距最大。重复运行稳定性分析是确定性文本条件生成任务评估的必要补充。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估主要关注单次运行准确率或在重复采样下的最终成功率，但许多实际部署场景需要稳定性——在相同任务描述下重复调用时结果的一致性。传统评估方法可能高估模型在实际部署中的表现。

Method: 提出重复运行评估协议，使用编程任务作为具体测试平台。在100个LeetCode风格问题上评估5个提供者家族的16个模型，使用两种提示模板，每个问题进行5次重复运行，共产生16,000个评估实例。定义了运行级准确率、无重试覆盖率和每个问题变异性等指标。

Result: 运行级通过率与完美稳定性率高度相关(r=0.985)，但通过率始终高于无重试覆盖率，差距最大达17.8个百分点，甚至在性能相近的系统间会反转模型排名。提示效果是模型依赖的，而非普遍有益。

Conclusion: 重复运行稳定性分析是确定性文本条件生成任务传统准确率报告的必要补充。仅报告单次运行准确率会高估实际部署中的模型表现，特别是在中等性能系统中。

Abstract: Run-level pass rate overstates retry-free coverage by up to 17.8 percentage points -- and the gap is largest precisely for mid-performing systems. We investigate this accuracy--stability relationship in large language model (LLM) evaluation for deterministic text-conditioned generation, using programming tasks as a concrete testbed. Standard code-generation benchmarks emphasize single-run accuracy or eventual success under repeated sampling, but many deployment settings also require stability: consistent outcomes across repeated invocations under the same task description. We present a repeated-run evaluation protocol with metrics for run-level accuracy, retry-free coverage, and per-problem variability. On a recency-based benchmark of 100 LeetCode-style problems, we evaluate 16 models from five provider families under two prompt templates with five repeated runs per problem, yielding 16,000 evaluation instances. Although run-level pass rate and perfect stability rate are strongly correlated (r=0.985), pass rate consistently exceeds retry-free coverage -- a gap that reaches 17.8 percentage points and reverses model rankings even among closely matched systems. Prompt effects are model-dependent rather than uniformly beneficial. These results suggest that repeated-run stability analysis is a necessary complement to conventional accuracy reporting for deterministic text-conditioned generation tasks.

</details>


### [420] [Task Structure Reverses Layerwise State Encoding in Sequence Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00926)
*Yuhang Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究发现序列模型的机制特征（如状态编码的层分布）是架构与任务共同决定的，而非架构固有属性。同一架构在不同任务上会呈现相反的状态分布模式，且可读状态位置与计算瓶颈位置可能不一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机制研究通常将层状态编码视为架构固有特征：循环模型集中可读状态，注意力模型分散状态。本文旨在探究这种特征是否真的由架构决定，还是与具体任务相关。

Method: 在Transformer、Mamba、Mamba-2、LSTM和GRU等五种架构上，对Parity、有界深度Dyck-k和非交换S_3置换组合三个任务进行实验。使用层探针分析、Mamba特定的Conv1D归因、因果干预（线性可读方向消融、激活补丁）等方法，分析状态编码分布与计算瓶颈。

Result: 1. 同一架构在不同任务上呈现相反状态分布：Parity任务中Mamba和循环模型在后期集中状态，Transformer逐步构建；Dyck任务中模式翻转。
2. 微调模型（Mamba-130M、Pythia-160M/410M）保持相同模式。
3. S_3任务与Parity（而非Dyck）在层探针和归因上分组，表明分组基于计算结构（前缀更新vs堆栈）而非交换性。
4. 因果干预显示：在4层形式模型中，线性可读方向常功能必要；在预训练规模下，可读状态位置与计算瓶颈位置分离（Pythia Dyck有强中间层瓶颈，Mamba无单探针方向破坏任务但中间位置激活补丁可恢复97-98%性能）。

Conclusion: 机制特征（如状态编码分布）是架构与任务共同决定的属性，而非架构固有。线性探针可定位状态可读位置，但不一定对应计算瓶颈位置。研究需区分代数结构（交换性）与计算结构（前缀更新vs堆栈）的影响。

Abstract: Mechanistic studies of sequence models often treat layerwise state encodings as architectural traits: recurrent models concentrate readable state, attention-based models distribute it. We find that the same architecture reverses this profile when the task changes. Across Transformers, Mamba, Mamba-2, LSTMs, and GRUs, Parity is concentrated late in Mamba and the recurrent baselines and built gradually by Transformer; on bounded-depth Dyck-k the pattern flips. The same flip appears in fine-tuned Mamba-130M and Pythia-160M, and the Pythia Dyck bottleneck persists at 410M. Two explanations are conflated in the literature: algebraic structure (commutativity) versus computational structure (prefix update vs. stack). To separate them we add a third task: non-commutative S_3 permutation composition. S_3 groups with Parity, not Dyck, on layerwise probing across all five architectures and on Mamba-specific Conv1D attribution, so the grouping tracks computational structure rather than commutativity.
  Causal interventions show that, in the 4-layer formal models, linearly readable directions are often functionally necessary and can remain important at out-of-distribution lengths on Parity and Dyck. At pretrained scale the picture splits. Fine-tuned Pythia Dyck has a strong middle-layer bottleneck (L6-L7 ablation drops accuracy by roughly 81% at 160M; broader L4-L18 plateau at 410M), far weaker at the best-probe layer. Pretrained Mamba shows the complementary failure mode: its final layer is highly readable, no single probe direction breaks the task on Parity, Dyck, or S_3, yet mid-position activation patching there recovers about 97-98% of the clean-corrupted logit gap. Probing localizes where state is linearly available, not always where the computation is bottlenecked. Mechanistic signatures are properties of architecture and task together.

</details>


### [421] [Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators for Structure-Preserving Surrogate Modeling of Constrained PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00937)
*Lennon J. Shikhman,Shane Gilbertie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators，一种基于细胞复形结构的离散化感知神经算子框架，用于保持物理约束的PDE代理建模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经算子通常将几何和离散化视为次要因素，以网格-通道堆栈表示物理状态，但不同物理量自然属于顶点、边、面、单元等不同位置，且需满足兼容性约束。需要一种能够保持结构约束的神经PDE代理模型。

Method: 在定向细胞复形上表示PDE状态，通过学习的限制映射耦合局部特征空间，使用关联/Hodge信息消息传递遵循计算几何。学习更新头通过余边界或通量映射，使约束从细胞复形结构自然产生而非仅依赖损失惩罚。

Result: 在湍流磁流体动力学和聚变平衡代理任务中，该方法改善了结构敏感的诊断指标，包括展开行为、散度控制、谱误差和平衡回归精度。特别在磁流体动力学中实现了基于面的磁通更新和基于边电动势场的驱动。

Conclusion: 细胞层结构是约束多物理系统中神经PDE代理模型的有用归纳偏置，能够更好地保持物理约束和结构特性。

Abstract: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for PDE simulations, but standard architectures often treat geometry and discretization as secondary to field data. Physical states are usually represented as grid-channel stacks, even when different quantities naturally belong on vertices, edges, faces, cells, boundaries, or interfaces and must satisfy compatibility constraints. We propose Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators, a discretization-aware framework for structure-preserving neural PDE surrogates. The method represents PDE states on oriented cell complexes, couples local feature spaces through learned restriction maps, and uses incidence/Hodge-informed message passing to follow computational geometry. Learned update heads pass through coboundary or flux maps, allowing selected constraints to arise from cell-complex structure rather than only from loss penalties. For magnetohydrodynamics, this yields face-based magnetic-flux updates driven by edge electromotive fields and finite-volume-style fluid updates driven by learned face fluxes and cell sources. On turbulent MHD and fusion-equilibrium surrogate tasks, the method improves structure-sensitive diagnostics, including rollout behavior, divergence control, spectral error, and equilibrium-regression accuracy. These results indicate that cellular-sheaf structure is a useful inductive bias for neural PDE surrogates in constrained multiphysics systems.

</details>


### [422] [PRISM: Gauge-Invariant Tangent-Space Differentially Private LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00944)
*Shihao Wang,Xueru Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRISM 是一种用于 LoRA 微调的差分隐私机制，解决了传统 DP-LoRA 中由于低秩参数化导致的噪声放大问题，通过构建规范不变性来保证稳定的隐私-效用权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA 的低秩参数化存在规范依赖性问题，即多个因子对 (A,B) 可以表示相同的更新 Z。直接在因子上应用 DP-SGD 会导致规范依赖的扰动，可能引起无界的噪声放大，从而破坏隐私保护效果。

Method: 提出 PRISM 机制，这是一种内在的 DP 机制：1) 通过构建规范不变性来避免双线性噪声放大；2) 提供高效的低维噪声采样器；3) 对 Z 上的有效内在噪声给出闭式表征；4) 引入 DP 感知的规范不变自适应更新规则，防止自适应优化放大隐私噪声。

Result: PRISM 提供了标准的 (ε,δ)-DP 保证，通过有界、规范不变的扰动实现稳定的隐私-效用权衡，提高了实际应用中的数值稳定性。

Conclusion: PRISM 解决了 DP-LoRA 中的根本性挑战，通过规范不变的设计避免了噪声放大问题，为隐私保护的 LoRA 微调提供了一种有效且稳定的解决方案。

Abstract: Applying differential privacy (DP) via DP-SGD to Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a natural approach for privacy-preserving fine-tuning. However, LoRA's low-rank parameterization poses a fundamental challenge. In LoRA, each trainable update is represented as a low-rank matrix $Z = AB^\top$, but this factorization is inherently non-identifiable: many factor pairs $(A,B)$ represent the same update $Z$. As a result, applying DP-SGD directly to the factors induces gauge-dependent perturbations on $Z$, and we show that this naive DP-LoRA can lead to unbounded noise amplification. We propose PRISM, an intrinsic DP mechanism for LoRA that is gauge invariant by construction, avoids bilinear noise amplification, and admits an efficient low-dimensional noise sampler. Moreover, PRISM yields a closed-form characterization of the effective intrinsic noise induced on $Z$, enabling stable privacy-utility trade-offs through bounded, gauge-invariant perturbations. We establish standard $(ε,δ)$-DP guarantees for PRISM and introduce a DP-aware, gauge-invariant adaptive update rule that prevents adaptive optimization from amplifying injected privacy noise, improving numerical stability in practice.

</details>


### [423] [Silent Failures in Federated Personalization of Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00947)
*YongKyung Oh,Alex Bui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出"静默失败"概念，指在联邦学习中由于隐私限制难以检测的信任度失效，包括偏见放大、公平性崩溃和对齐侵蚀等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基础模型在去中心化私有数据上通过联邦学习进行个性化，并在监管要求下大规模部署。这种融合产生了难以检测的信任度失效，因为联邦学习的隐私限制限制了模型行为可见性。

Method: 提出六种静默失败模式的分类法，分析基础模型个性化、数据集偏移和联邦核心约束的相互作用。进行现有基准测试的景观分析，揭示系统性能评估与模型行为评估之间的结构性鸿沟。

Result: 现有基准测试存在结构性鸿沟：联邦基准测试评估系统性能但无法洞察模型行为，集中式信任基准测试评估行为但需要模型访问权限，与联邦隐私不兼容。隐私保护训练本身不足以实现可信部署。

Conclusion: 需要研究隐私保护的行为评估方法，建议将"静默失败"作为可信联邦人工智能的标准诊断类别。仅靠隐私保护训练不足以保证可信部署。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly personalized on decentralized private data through federated learning and are now deployed at scale under growing regulatory requirements for post-market monitoring. We argue that this convergence creates a distinct and under-recognized class of trustworthiness failures, which we term "Silent Failures." These include amplified bias, fairness collapse, and alignment erosion that may remain difficult to detect because federated learning's privacy constraints limit visibility into model behavior. A landscape analysis of existing benchmarks reveals a structural divide. Federated benchmarks evaluate system performance but provide limited insight into model behavior, whereas centralized trustworthiness benchmarks assess behavior but require model access incompatible with federated privacy. We introduce a taxonomy of six silent failure modes arising from the interaction of foundation model personalization, dataset shift, and core federated constraints. Our analysis shows that privacy-preserving training alone is insufficient for trustworthy deployment. We conclude with a research agenda for privacy-preserving behavioral evaluation and propose that silent failures become a standard diagnostic category for trustworthy federated artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [424] [Explainable deep reinforcement learning reveals energy-efficient control strategies for turbulent drag reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00949)
*Federica Tonti,Ricardo Vinuesa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种结合多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）和可解释深度学习（XDL）的方法来减少壁面湍流中的阻力。通过SHAP引导的三种策略对比，发现基于摩阻系数和壁面压力波动的组合SHAP策略取得了最佳性能，实现了34.44%的减阻率和34.01%的净节能率，同时将归一化输入功率降至0.43%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的壁面湍流减阻方法（如直接针对壁面剪切应力训练智能体）存在效率不高的问题。研究旨在开发一种更高效、能耗更低的减阻控制策略，通过结合可解释深度学习来指导强化学习智能体，实现更好的减阻效果和能量效率。

Method: 采用多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）与可解释深度学习（XDL）相结合的方法。以直接针对壁面剪切应力和反对控制训练的结果为基准，比较了三种SHAP引导策略：1）基于预测未来速度场的U-net的SHAP归因；2）基于预测摩阻系数的U-net的SHAP归因；3）基于预测摩阻系数和壁面压力波动的两个U-net的SHAP归因组合。最终策略通过分析SHAP归因来指导强化学习智能体的决策。

Result: 基于摩阻系数和壁面压力波动的组合SHAP策略取得了最佳性能：减阻率（DR）达到34.44%，净节能率（NES）达到34.01%，归一化输入功率仅为0.43%。相比反对控制，减阻率和净节能率分别提高了49.41%和48.52%。相比直接壁面剪切应力基准，性能提升的同时将归一化驱动成本从5.90%降至0.43%。

Conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一种高效节能的壁面湍流减阻控制策略。通过SHAP引导的强化学习方法，智能体学会了在近零壁面压力时激活的压力门控驱动策略，其时间尺度与近壁湍流结构的寿命相当。这种方法不仅显著提高了减阻效果，还大幅降低了能耗，为湍流控制提供了新的有效途径。

Abstract: We propose a method combining Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MARL) and eXplainable Deep Learning (XDL) to reduce drag in wall-bounded turbulent flows. Taking as a baseline the results of training agents directly targeting wall-shear stress and opposition control, three SHAP-guided approaches are compared. In the first, the reward is computed from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the future velocity field; in the second, from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the skin-friction coefficient; in the third, from a combination of SHAP attributions of two U-nets predicting the skin-friction coefficient and the wall pressure fluctuations, respectively. The combined SHAP strategy based on skin-friction coefficient and wall-pressure fluctuations achieves the best overall performance, achieving a DR of 34.44% and a NES of 34.01% with only 0.43% normalized input power. Relative to opposition control, drag reduction and net energy saving increase by 49.41% and 48.52%, respectively. Compared with the direct wall-shear-stress baseline, the proposed strategy simultaneously improves performance while reducing the normalized actuation cost from 5.90% to 0.43%. Analysis of the results reveals that the energetically efficient policy is consistent with pressure-gated actuation, activating predominantly at near-zero wall pressure, and operates on a temporal timescale comparable to the lifetime of the near-wall turbulent structures.

</details>


### [425] [COLLIE: Guiding Skill Discovery in Semantically Coherent Latent Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00950)
*Yao Luan,Ni Mu,Hanfei Ge,Yiqin Yang,Bo Xu,Qing-Shan Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: COLLIE是一个引导技能发现框架，利用密集无监督数据构建语义连贯的技能潜空间，通过稀疏在线反馈实现可靠引导，无需额外模型训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有引导技能发现方法需要训练额外引导模型，依赖预定义规则或专家演示，在稀疏在线收集的人类反馈下效果不佳。需要一种能有效利用稀疏反馈且无需额外训练的方法。

Method: 利用密集无监督数据构建语义连贯的技能潜空间，该潜空间结构良好，支持稀疏在线反馈的可靠引导。利用语义连贯性实现无需训练的引导信号构建，只需技能学习本身。

Result: 在多种基于状态和像素的任务中，COLLIE学习了多样且与人类意图对齐的技能，避免了危险行为，并以最少的人类反馈实现了优越的下游性能。

Conclusion: COLLIE通过构建语义连贯的技能潜空间，有效解决了引导技能发现中稀疏反馈的挑战，实现了无需额外训练的可靠引导，为实际应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Unsupervised skill discovery (USD) aims to learn diverse behaviors without reward functions, but often results in task-irrelevant or hazardous behaviors due to uniform exploration. Guided skill discovery (GSD) addresses this issue by incorporating human intent to focus exploration on meaningful regions. However, existing GSD methods typically require training additional guidance models, and rely on pre-defined rules or expert demonstration, which can be ineffective under sparse, online-collected human feedback. To overcome this, we propose COLLIE, a GSD framework that leverages dense unsupervised data to construct a semantically coherent skill latent space. This latent space is well-structured, enabling reliable guidance with sparse online feedback. Moreover, its semantic coherence property enables training-free construction of guidance signals, eliminating the need for additional model training beyond skill learning. Theoretical analysis justifies the effectiveness of our training-free guidance signal, while experiments across diverse state-based and pixel-based tasks show that COLLIE learns diverse, human-aligned skills, avoids hazardous behaviors, and achieves superior downstream performance with minimal human feedback.

</details>


### [426] [When Parallelism Pays Off: Cohesion-Aware Task Partitioning for Multi-Agent Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00953)
*Xu Yang,Lunyiu Nie,Ethan Chandra,Stanislav Gannutin,Fangru Lin,Swarat Chaudhuri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Co-Coder：一种基于图分割的多智能体LLM系统，通过静态分析构建依赖图，识别结构中心文件，利用社区检测进行图分割，并采用依赖感知调度器执行，显著提升代码仓库级任务的通过率、执行速度和成本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统通过并行化和上下文隔离分解复杂任务（如编码），但实际中增加智能体会引入智能体间通信开销，带来额外成本，有时会抵消效率增益。需要解决通信与计算之间的权衡问题。

Method: 将多智能体编排形式化为图分割问题，捕获通信与计算的权衡。具体实现包括：从静态分析构建依赖图，隔离结构中心文件，通过社区检测分割图，并使用依赖感知调度器执行分割。

Result: 在DevEval和CodeProjectEval的28个真实任务上，Co-Coder超越了顺序和基于文件的并行基线以及Claude Code with Agent Teams，将通过率提升高达14.0%，实现高达2.10倍的挂钟加速，API成本降低高达35%，在依赖最密集的项目上收益最大。

Conclusion: Co-Coder展示了基于内聚性的编排如何使并行编码智能体既有理论基础又实际高效，为多智能体系统提出了更广泛的设计原则。

Abstract: Multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) systems offer a way to decompose complex tasks, such as coding, through parallelization and context isolation. However, adding agents in practice introduces inter-agent communication overhead, which incurs extra cost and can sometimes offset the efficiency gains. We formalize multi-agent orchestration as a graph partitioning problem that captures the communication-to-computation trade-off: task decomposition can shorten critical-path computation, but cross-agent dependencies require costly context transfer. We instantiate this view in repository-level software engineering and present Cohesion-aware Coder (Co-Coder), which builds dependency graphs from static analysis, isolates structural hub files, partitions the graph via community detection, and executes the partition with a dependency-aware scheduler.
  Across 28 real-world tasks on DevEval and CodeProjectEval, Co-Coder advances the Pareto-frontier over sequential and file-based parallel baselines as well as Claude Code with Agent Teams, lifting pass rate by up to 14.0%, achieving up to a 2.10x wall-clock speedup, and reducing API cost by up to 35%, with the largest gains on the most dependency-dense projects. Co-coder demonstrates how cohesion-aware orchestration can make parallel coding agents both theoretically grounded and practically efficient, suggesting a broader design principle for multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [427] [CryoProt: A Protein Pretraining Framework with Cross-Box Interactions on Cryo-EM Density Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00955)
*Dan Luo,Xuan Lin,Peng Zhou,Junwen Zhu,Tengfei Ma,Xiangxiang Zeng,Yiping Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CryoProt是一个针对冷冻电镜密度图的蛋白质预训练框架，通过多任务学习和跨盒交互建模，在多个下游任务中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前方法缺乏专门针对冷冻电镜密度图的通用蛋白质预训练框架，且现有方法通常将密度图分割为独立区域处理，忽略了跨盒交互对捕捉全局结构上下文的重要性

Method: 提出CryoProt框架，采用基于多头潜在注意力(MLA)的Map Encoder，通过共享潜在空间实现盒级表征的交互，显式建模密度图中的跨盒依赖关系，并采用多任务预训练策略学习可泛化的表征

Result: CryoProt在多个基准测试中一致优于现有最先进方法，相比最佳基线方法提升高达12%，证明了建模跨盒交互在冷冻电镜数据中的重要性

Conclusion: CryoProt通过显式建模跨盒依赖关系的预训练框架，有效解决了冷冻电镜密度图的表征学习挑战，为蛋白质相关性质预测提供了强大工具

Abstract: Despite the growing availability of cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) density maps, effectively leveraging them for protein representation remains challenging. First, current methods lack a general-purpose protein pretraining framework tailored for cryo-EM density maps, designed for protein-related property prediction. Second, existing approaches typically partition density maps into local box regions and model them independently, overlooking interactions across boxes which are essential for capturing global structural context in cryo-EM density map. To address these challenges, we propose CryoProt, a protein pretraining framework designed for cryo-EM density maps. CryoProt introduces a Map Encoder based on multi-head latent attention (MLA), where box-level representations interact through a shared latent space, enabling explicit modeling of cross-box dependencies within the density map. Furthermore, we adopt a multi-task pretraining strategy to learn generalizable representations that can be effectively transferred to diverse downstream tasks, such as protein flexibility prediction, where cryo-EM density maps are not required and can be inferred implicitly by the pretrained model. Experimental results demonstrate that CryoProt consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods across multiple benchmarks, achieving up to 12% improvement over the best-performing baselines, highlighting the importance of modeling cross-box interactions in cryo-EM data. The source code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CryoProt.

</details>


### [428] [Optimal-Point Variance Reduction For Bayesian Optimization With Regret Guarantee](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00956)
*Shion Takeno*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为OVR的一步前瞻贝叶斯优化方法，通过后验采样和蒙特卡洛近似实现，获得理论保证，并在数值实验中验证有效性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然一步前瞻贝叶斯优化方法（如熵搜索）经验上有效，但通常依赖计算上难以处理的近似，且其遗憾保证理论发展不足

Method: 提出最优点方差减少（OVR）方法，仅需后验采样和蒙特卡洛近似；获得蒙特卡洛估计在输入域上的均匀误差界；通过轻微修改引入正则化OVR以促进探索

Result: 获得蒙特卡洛估计的均匀误差界；证明正则化OVR实现了消失的贝叶斯期望简单遗憾上界；数值实验验证了OVR的有效性

Conclusion: OVR提供了一种计算可行且具有理论保证的一步前瞻贝叶斯优化方法，在保持经验有效性的同时获得了理论遗憾保证

Abstract: This paper studies a one-step lookahead Bayesian optimization (BO) method and its theoretical guarantee. Although the empirical effectiveness of one-step lookahead BO methods, such as entropy search, has been studied extensively, they often rely on computationally intractable approximations, and their regret guarantees remain underdeveloped. Thus, this paper proposes a one-step lookahead BO method called optimal-point variance reduction (OVR), which requires only posterior sampling and Monte Carlo approximations. We obtain a uniform error bound over an input domain for the Monte Carlo estimation in OVR. Furthermore, we show that the regularized OVR, with the slight modification to promote exploration, achieves a vanishing Bayesian expected simple regret upper bound. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of OVR through numerical experiments.

</details>


### [429] [UME: A Unified Meta-Generalization Framework for Cross-Domain ETA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00979)
*Duo Wang,Qiong Wu,Jianguo Wu,Ruiyu Xu,Jinhui Yi,Zhonggen Sun,Zhentao Zhang,Yu Zhang,Ke Xing,Yongjun Yin,Zishuo Li,Jianwen Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UME是一个统一的元泛化框架，用于解决国际即时物流平台中ETA预测的跨域冷启动和特征缺失问题，已在美团keeta平台部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在国际即时物流平台中，ETA预测面临三个关键挑战：1) 现有多域模型无法泛化到完全未见过的域，无法实现冷启动阶段的零样本预测；2) 新域常因缺乏历史数据而出现离线特征的结构性缺失；3) 特征缺失迫使工业系统将成熟域和冷启动域分开建模，阻碍知识转移并增加维护成本。

Method: 提出UME统一元泛化框架，采用统一的双分支架构，结合基于超网络的元学习机制。元学习器利用域级知识和实例级上下文，通过三个元模块动态调整特征门控、专家注意力和最终预测，捕获跨域相关性并促进域内适应。还引入了知识蒸馏策略以增强性能。

Result: UME已在美团keeta配送平台（中国最大的国际外卖平台）部署。广泛的离线实验和在线A/B测试表明，UME显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: UME有效解决了国际物流平台中ETA预测的跨域冷启动和特征缺失问题，实现了统一建模框架，促进了知识转移，减少了维护开销。

Abstract: Accurate Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) prediction on checkout page is crucial in instant logistics for enhancing user satisfaction, optimizing dispatching, and controlling operational costs. In international on-demand delivery platforms, where ETA data originates from diverse countries or regions with different patterns, multi-domain modeling is of great importance and has been widely adopted. However, existing methods still face three critical challenges in real-world deployment. First, current multi-domain models struggle to generalize to completely unseen domains, failing to achieve zero-shot prediction during the initial cold-start phase. Second, cross-domain feature spaces are often assumed to be consistent, whereas new domains commonly suffer from structural missingness of offline (statistical) features due to the lack of historical data. Third, such feature missingness often compels industrial systems to model mature and cold-start domains separately, hindering knowledge transfer and increasing maintenance overhead. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{UME}, a \textbf{U}nified \textbf{M}eta-generalization framework for \textbf{E}TA. Specifically, UME integrates a unified dual-branch architecture with a novel meta-learning mechanism that employs a hypernetwork-based meta learner. By leveraging domain-level knowledge and instance-level context, the meta learner empowers three meta modules to dynamically modulate feature gating, expert attention, and final prediction, capturing cross-domain correlations and facilitating intra-domain adaptation. A knowledge distillation strategy is further introduce to enhance performance. UME has now been deployed in Meituan-keeta delivery platform (the largest international food delivery platform in China). Extensive offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate that UME significantly outperforms existing baselines.

</details>


### [430] [Profiling Privacy Preservation Against Gradient Inversion Attacks in Tabular Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00986)
*Ivo Osterberg Nilsson,Maximilian Birr Engvall,Viktor Valadi,Teddy Lazebnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了表格联邦学习中梯度反转攻击的风险，评估了不同FL协议、客户端批量大小、训练阶段、攻击假设、模型架构和任务类型下的隐私泄露情况，发现小批量客户端和代表少数记录的更新最易受攻击，FT-Transformer比one-hot基线更难反转，架构是表格FL中实用的隐私变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习虽然通过本地训练和只传输模型更新来保护隐私，但这些更新仍可能通过梯度反转攻击暴露客户端的私人数据。论文旨在评估表格联邦学习在这种风险下的实际脆弱性，特别是在医疗保健等隐私敏感领域的应用。

Method: 研究在诚实但好奇的服务端威胁模型下，评估了不同FL协议（FedSGD和FedAvg）、客户端批量大小、训练阶段、攻击假设、模型架构（MLP、ResNet、FT-Transformer）以及任务类型（二元分类、多类分类、回归）。使用MIMIC-IV和基准数据集，区分数值和分类特征恢复、基线可恢复性、特征级恢复和完全匹配率（EMR）。通过MLP网格实验隔离架构效应，比较不同架构在相同数据暴露下的攻击效果。

Result: 结果显示：小客户端批次和代表少量不同记录的更新最脆弱；更大的本地批次和更强的聚合能减少重建但不能完全消除泄漏；FT-Transformer始终比one-hot基线更难反转；MLP家族内的可重建性差异显著；聚合重建准确率可能高估稀疏数据中的完整记录恢复，因此EMR和基线比较至关重要。

Conclusion: 架构是表格联邦学习中实用的隐私变量，FT-Transformer等架构能提供更好的隐私保护。虽然更大的批次和更强的聚合能减少泄漏，但不能完全消除风险。评估隐私攻击时需要考虑完整记录恢复而非仅聚合准确率，EMR和基线比较是必要的。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables multiple data holders to train machine learning models collaboratively without centralizing raw data, making it useful in privacy sensitive domains such as healthcare and institutional data sharing. FL keeps data local to clients while communicating only model updates, such as gradients or model deltas. Nevertheless, these updates can expose private client data through gradient inversion attacks (GIAs). We study this risk for tabular FL under an honest-but-curious server threat model across FL protocols, client batch sizes, training stages, attacker assumptions, model architectures, and binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression tasks. We use MIMIC-IV and complementary benchmark datasets. Our evaluation distinguishes numerical and categorical recovery, baseline recoverability, feature level recovery, and exact match rate (EMR). We evaluate FedSGD gradients and FedAvg model deltas with an exposure aligned protocol, comparing attacked models after matched client data exposure rather than matched communication rounds. We compare multilayer perceptron (MLP), ResNet, and FT-Transformer models, and isolate architecture effects through an MLP grid over width, depth, activation, normalization, and dropout. The results show that small client batches and updates representing few distinct records are most vulnerable. Larger local batches and stronger aggregation reduce reconstruction but do not eliminate leakage. FT-Transformer is consistently harder to invert than one-hot baselines, while reconstructability also varies substantially within the MLP family. These findings identify architecture as a practical privacy variable in tabular FL. We also show that aggregate reconstruction accuracy can overstate complete record recovery in sparse data, making EMR and baseline comparisons essential.

</details>


### [431] [Data Enrichment for Symbolic Regression Using Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00988)
*Simon De Reuver,Tamas Kristof Toth,Teddy Lazebnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种物理引导的潜在扩散框架，用于数据增强以支持符号回归，通过生成受物理约束的合成数据来改善稀疏观测条件下的方程发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 符号回归在稀疏、噪声或不完整的时空测量中可靠性显著下降，而传统数据增强方法需要大量领域专业知识来确保物理结构保持，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出物理引导的潜在扩散框架，结合变分自编码器、条件潜在扩散模型和物理信息残差校正器，生成受控制方程约束的合成场来补全稀疏观测。

Result: 在热传导、不可压缩Navier-Stokes流动和移动单质量牛顿引力势等物理系统中，物理校正的数据增强在稀疏条件下能持续改善方程恢复效果，适用于多种符号回归后端。

Conclusion: 物理引导的生成式数据增强能够在不依赖额外领域专业知识的情况下，有效提升符号回归在稀疏数据条件下的方程发现能力。

Abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) offers a route to scientific discovery by converting observations into interpretable governing equations. However, despite its promise, its reliability degrades sharply when spatiotemporal measurements are sparse, noisy, or physically incomplete, as commonly occurring in practice. Data enrichment (DE) has been shown to be able to mitigate this limitation, yet additional samples can mislead equation discovery unless they preserve the physical structure of the target system. Such implication of DE requires narrow domain expertise as well as technical fluidity, highly limiting its practical usefulness. In this study, we introduce a physics-guided latent diffusion framework for DE for down the line SR models. The proposed framework combines a variational autoencoder, a conditional latent diffusion model, and a physics-informed residual corrector to complete sparse observations with synthetic fields constrained by governing relations. We evaluate the approach on heat conduction, incompressible Navier-Stokes flow, and a moving single-mass Newtonian gravitational potential, using GPLearn, DEAP, and PySR as downstream SR backends. Our results reveal that physics-corrected enrichment consistently improves recovery in sparse regimes across physical dynamics and SR models. These results show that generative enrichment can strengthen equation discovery without additional domain expertise.

</details>


### [432] [Trust Functions: Near-Lossless Weak-to-Strong Generalization by Learning When to Trust the Weak Teacher](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01000)
*Arda Uzunoglu,Alvin Zhang,Daniel Khashabi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过信任函数筛选弱监督标签的方法，实现弱到强的泛化，使强学生模型能够达到甚至超越使用真实标签训练的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在可靠标签稀缺的情况下，如何利用弱教师的监督来提升强学生模型是一个重要问题。关键挑战在于识别哪些弱标签足够可靠，可以作为有效的训练信号。

Method: 引入信任函数，为每个弱标签分配一个标量信任分数，并使用这些分数来筛选弱监督数据。通过信任过滤选择可靠的标签进行训练。

Result: 在多个领域（世界知识、定量推理、策略游戏）中，信任过滤使学生模型能够匹配甚至超越使用真实标签监督的效果，实现了近乎无损的弱到强泛化。此外，信任函数还支持迭代的弱到强链，通过训练学生模型并将其作为下一轮教师来放大收益。

Conclusion: 信任函数为弱到强泛化提供了一种有效的数据选择方法，能够显著提升模型性能，并支持迭代改进。其优势可以从多个机制角度解释。

Abstract: Weak-to-strong generalization studies how to improve a strong student using supervision from a weaker teacher when reliable labels are scarce. We view this primarily as a data selection problem, where the key challenge is to identify which weak labels are reliable enough to serve as a training signal. To address this, we introduce trust functions that assign each weak label a scalar trust score and use these scores to filter weak supervision. Across several domains, including world knowledge, quantitative reasoning, and strategy games, trust filtering yields students that match and sometimes surpass ground-truth supervision, achieving near-lossless weak-to-strong generalization. Moreover, trust functions enable an iterative weak-to-strong chain that compounds gains by training a student and reusing it as the next teacher, amplifying the gains. There are several mechanisms to which advantage of trust functions can be attributed.

</details>


### [433] [Beyond Task-Agnostic: Task-Aware Grouping for Communication-Efficient Multi-Task MoE Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01007)
*Zhiyao Xu,Aoxue Liu,Zhanjie Ding,Dan Zhao,Yong Jiang,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TACG和GESR框架，通过任务感知的专家协同激活分组和通用专家共享复制，减少MoE模型分布式推理中的通信开销和负载不均衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE模型部署方法使用全局聚合的路由轨迹，忽略了任务特定的协同激活模式，导致通信效率低下。本文观察到专家协同激活具有强任务依赖性，不同任务中的专家关联模式差异显著。

Method: 提出TACG框架：1) 使用任务族特定的调度和协同激活轨迹；2) 计算每个专家的任务族偏好；3) 重加权协同激活图使族内局部性主导分组；4) 在容量约束下分配专家到主GPU。引入GESR：识别具有中心协同激活模式的通用专家，在次要GPU上复制，并在服务时应用局部性和负载感知选择。

Result: 在三个开源MoE模型上的实验表明，该框架平均通信成本降低31.39%，同时保持平均Jain公平指数0.9975。即使在推理数据分布严重偏移的情况下，优势依然保持。

Conclusion: 通过任务感知的专家分组和通用专家复制策略，显著提高了MoE模型分布式推理的效率，为多任务服务场景提供了有效的部署解决方案。

Abstract: Sparsely activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity via conditional computation, but distributed inference suffers from cross-GPU expert communication and routing-induced load imbalance. Existing placement methods reduce this cost by co-locating frequently co-activated experts; however, they derive a single deployment plan from globally aggregated routing traces, thereby averaging away the heterogeneous, task-specific co-activation patterns that actually drive communication in multi-task serving. We observe that expert co-activation is strongly task-conditioned: pairs tightly coupled in one task family are often uncorrelated in another, so effective deployment should group experts by task-aware co-activation rather than by a task-agnostic average. Based on this insight, we propose \emph{Task-Aware Coactivation Grouping} (TACG), a deployment-time framework that uses family-specific dispatch and co-activation traces to derive per-expert task-family preferences, reweights the co-activation graph so that intra-family locality dominates grouping, and assigns each expert to a primary GPU under exact capacity constraints. To keep the static placement robust under online workload skew, we further introduce \emph{Generic Expert Shared Replication} (GESR), a lightweight companion that identifies generic experts with consistently central co-activation profiles, replicates them across a small set of secondary GPUs, and applies locality- and load-aware selection at serving time. Experiments on three representative open-source MoE models demonstrate that our framework reduces the average communication cost by 31.39\% over the baseline, while preserving an average Jain fairness index of 0.9975. This advantage persists even under severe distribution shifts in the inference data, consistently outperforming strong baselines.

</details>


### [434] [MedGym:A Unified Continuous-Time Benchmark for Dynamic Medical Treatment Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01028)
*Yuepeng Wang,Ken Kawano,Yongqi Zhou,Yoshihiko Fujisawa,Richard Weiss,Akifumi Wachi,Katsuki Fujisawa,Ying Chen,Mehrshad Sadria,Xin Liu,Kyoung-Sook Kim,Xiao Hu,Sebastien Gros,Xun Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MedGym是一个用于动态治疗推荐的连续时间基准环境，旨在解决医疗RL中患者生理连续演化、测量和治疗时间间隔不规则以及个体化治疗反应等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法基于离散时间MDP/POMDP抽象，难以评估RL方法是否能处理时间间隔依赖的疾病进展、个体化治疗反应以及连续测量点之间的安全性。需要更真实的医疗RL评估环境。

Method: 使用物理信息神经网络（PINN）从临床数据构建可配置的医疗RL基准，在连续时间框架下建模患者纵向演化，支持离线和在线RL，允许离散时间和连续时间方法的直接比较。

Result: 创建了MedGym基准环境，支持不规则治疗时间和患者特异性动态，能够从个体化、轨迹级安全性和离线学习与在线部署性能差距等临床重要角度进行评估。

Conclusion: MedGym通过提供标准化、可配置的连续时间动态治疗基准，旨在促进医疗RL方法更真实、信息更丰富的评估，解决现有离散时间抽象与实际医疗场景之间的差距。

Abstract: Medical treatment recommendation poses several challenges to reinforcement learning (RL): patient physiology evolves in continuous time, measurements and interventions are performed at irregular intervals, and treatment effects vary substantially across individuals. Existing RL formulations and simulated environments, however, are based on discrete-time MDP or POMDP abstractions with fixed or pre-specified decision intervals. Thus, it remains difficult to evaluate whether RL methods can handle time-interval-dependent disease progression, personalized treatment response, and safety between consecutive measurement points. To address this gap, we introduce MedGym, a benchmark environment for dynamic treatment recommendation. MedGym models longitudinal patient evolution in a continuous-time framework and constructs a configurable medical RL benchmark from clinical data by using Physics-Informed Neural Networks. The resulting benchmark supports both offline and online RL, and enables direct comparison between discrete-time and continuous-time methods under irregular treatment timing and patient-specific dynamics. Besides, MedGym supports evaluation from clinically important perspectives, including personalization, trajectory-level safety, and the performance gap between model-based offline learning and online deployment. By providing a standardized and configurable benchmark for continuous-time dynamic treatment, MedGym aims to facilitate more realistic and informative evaluation of medical RL methods.

</details>


### [435] [OPD+: Rethinking the Advantage Design for On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01039)
*Hanyang Zhao,Haoxian Chen,Han Lin,Genta Indra Winata,David Yao,Wenpin Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了OPD+，一种改进的在线策略蒸馏方法，修正了传统OPD中停止梯度操作导致的偏差问题，支持多种f-散度选择，在数学推理和工具使用基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏方法通常采用停止梯度设计以确保稳定性，但这种设计使得优势估计存在问题。作者旨在从数学上重新审视这种设计空间的有效性。

Method: 提出了基于学生和教师模型之间f-散度的通用优化框架，通过数学证明指出停止梯度操作会导致奖励目标和梯度的偏差估计，并提出了修正版本OPD+。

Result: OPD+在数学推理和工具使用基准测试中表现优于传统的KL散度基线方法，验证了理论分析的正确性。

Conclusion: 停止梯度操作在在线策略蒸馏中会导致偏差，修正后的OPD+方法不仅改进了性能，还支持多种f-散度的选择，为语言模型能力迁移提供了更优方案。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a widely used technique to transfer capabilities from capable teacher language models to the base student models, and can be formulated in a reinforcement learning style objective using student generated rollouts. Yet, despite the divergence reward being dependent on student model likelihood, existing works usually adopt a stop gradient design primarily for stability, which makes the resulting advantage estimation questionable. In this work, we provide a generic optimization framework based on f-divergence between the student and teacher, and mathematically revisit whether such design space is valid. We prove that general stop-gradient operation would lead to biased estimates of the reward objective and corresponding gradient for general divergence functions. We propose OPD+, the corrected version of OPD that demonstrates improved performance over the baseline KL approach and also supports the choice of various f-divergence. We validate our findings on mathematical reasoning and tool-use benchmarks.

</details>


### [436] [Plausibility Is Not Prediction: Contrastive Evidence for LLM-Based Cellular Perturbation Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01042)
*Xinyu Yuan,Xixian Liu,Jianan Zhao,Yashi Zhang,Hongyu Guo,Jian Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有基于LLM的"虚拟细胞"模拟器虽能生成生物学上合理的解释，但在预测基因表达响应时过度依赖基因固有响应趋势，无法捕捉扰动特异性效应，表现甚至不如简单基线。CORE方法通过对比性组织相关扰动证据，将预测重构为比较任务，显著提升了预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扰动实验对于理解细胞机制至关重要，但成本高昂且数据稀疏。虽然最近利用大语言模型作为"虚拟细胞"模拟器的方法很有前景，但研究发现这些方法存在严重缺陷：它们虽然能生成生物学上合理的解释，却无法准确预测扰动特异性效应，过度依赖基因固有响应趋势而非真正的扰动推理。

Method: 提出了CORE（对比性关系证据组织）方法，将预测重构为比较任务，通过组织相关扰动的正负结果证据来改善预测。该方法使用生物医学知识图谱进行证据检索，在LLM和非LLM设置下都有效。具体包括CORE-Reasoning（用于LLM推理）和CORE-Voting（用于非LLM投票）两种实现方式。

Result: CORE方法显著改善了预测校准和扰动特异性预测能力。在药物扰动数据上，CORE-Reasoning将Qwen3.5-9B的聚合指标提升了高达28.6%；在通用扰动数据上，CORE-Voting将四个细胞系的平均宏观每基因AUROC从随机水平提升到0.703。

Conclusion: 对比性证据组织对于可靠的LLM基扰动推理至关重要。现有方法孤立评估扰动-基因对的缺陷可以通过重构为比较任务来解决，CORE方法通过组织相关扰动的对比证据，显著提升了预测性能，为更可靠的虚拟细胞模拟器提供了新方向。

Abstract: Perturbation experiments are central to understanding cellular mechanisms, but remain costly and sparse, motivating prediction of gene expression responses for unobserved conditions. A promising recent direction leverages large language models (LLMs) as "virtual cell" simulators-using stepwise, knowledge-grounded mechanistic reasoning to infer differential expression-pointing toward an interpretable, knowledge-driven paradigm that transcends purely data-driven approaches. However, we find that plausibility is not prediction: despite producing biologically plausible explanations, these methods fail to capture perturbation-specific effects: systematically overestimating differential expression, often underperforming a simple gene-frequency baseline in aggregate evaluations, and collapsing to chance-level performance at the per-gene level. This reveals a reliance on intrinsic gene response tendencies rather than true perturbation reasoning. We trace this failure to how evidence is presented: existing methods evaluate perturbation-gene pairs in isolation, without exposing how related perturbations differ in their effects on the same gene. To address this limitation, we introduce CORE (Contrastive Organization of Relational Evidence), which reframes prediction as a comparison task by organizing evidence into positive and negative outcomes from related perturbations. Using a biomedical knowledge graph for evidence retrieval, CORE improves calibration and substantially boosts perturbation-specific prediction in both LLM-based and non-LLM settings: for example, on drug-perturbation data, CORE-Reasoning improves Qwen3.5-9B aggregate metrics by up to 28.6%, while on generic perturbation data, CORE-Voting raises macro-per-gene AUROC from chance to 0.703 in average across four cell lines. This highlights contrastive evidence organization as essential to reliable LLM-based perturbation reasoning

</details>


### [437] [Interaction-Limited Safe Continuous-Time RL for Dynamical Medical Treatment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01051)
*Xun Shen,Yuepeng Wang,Akifumi Wachi,Yongqi Zhou,Richard Weiss,Yoshihiko Fujisawa,Ken Kawano,Mehrshad Sadria,Ying Chen,Xin Liu,Sebastien Gros,Xiao Hu,Kyoung-Sook Kim,Mengmou Li,Katsuki Fujisawa,Kenji Wakabayashi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于动态医疗治疗的交互受限安全连续时间强化学习框架，联合优化治疗管理和临床交互时机，在轨迹级安全约束下工作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有治疗方法大多假设固定时间表或仅在离散决策点保证安全性，但患者状态连续演变且不良事件可能在临床交互之间发生，需要更安全的连续时间治疗优化方法

Method: 将连续时间治疗问题重新表述为基于选项的半马尔可夫决策过程，每个选项指定连续时间治疗策略及其持续时间，开发安全收紧机制确保全轨迹安全性，建立从记录治疗轨迹学习的有限样本保证

Result: 实验表明，提出的自适应交互时机机制在不同安全策略优化方法中，相比等距交互方案，同时提高了安全性和治疗效果

Conclusion: 该框架能够有效联合优化治疗管理和临床交互时机，在连续时间轨迹上提供概率性安全保证，为动态医疗治疗提供了更安全有效的解决方案

Abstract: Dynamic medical treatment requires deciding treatment intensity and intervention timing, while patient states evolve continuously and adverse events may occur between clinical interactions. Most existing treatment learning methods assume fixed schedules or enforce safety only at discrete decision points. We propose Interaction-Limited Safe Continuous-Time Reinforcement Learning, a framework that jointly optimizes treatment administration and clinical interaction timing under trajectory-level safety constraints. Our key idea is to reformulate the continuous time treatment problem as an option-based semi-Markov decision process, where each option specifies a continuous-time treatment policy and its duration. We develop a safety-tightening mechanism showing that suitably constructed constraints at interaction times guarantee safety over the full continuous-time trajectory with high probability. We further establish finite-sample guarantees for policy learning from logged treatment trajectories and introduce a practical data-driven conservative surrogate. Experiments show that the proposed adaptive interaction-timing mechanism improves both safety and treatment effectiveness over equidistant interaction schemes across different safe policy optimization methods.

</details>


### [438] [Non-Vacuous Certification of Transport MCMC via Oscillation-Controlled Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01078)
*Jun Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次为Transport MCMC方法建立了非空泛的严格谱间隙下界，通过在香蕉分布族等目标上实现数值认证，提出了基于谱归一化、覆盖度经验振荡边界和振荡正则化训练的三支柱框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transport MCMC通过归一化流预处理Metropolis-Hastings提议，在经验上表现出高效性，但此前缺乏数值非空泛的严格谱间隙下界分析。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为这类采样器提供首个可数值认证的严格性能保证。

Method: 提出三支柱框架：(1)谱归一化结合尺度裁剪将流Lipschitz常数从10^47降至10^4；(2)基于覆盖度的经验振荡边界替代空泛的解析边界；(3)振荡正则化训练在不牺牲密度拟合的前提下将经验振荡降低60-90%。在香蕉分布族、高斯混合、剪切建筑、Neal漏斗和贝叶斯逻辑回归等目标上测试。

Result: 在D=2维香蕉分布上认证γ*≥0.828，在D=5维上γ*≥7.6×10^-4（95%置信度），在D=20维上γ*≥1.7×10^-4。进一步识别了三个精确障碍：边界曲率、目标刚性和尾部覆盖不匹配。发现简单架构（仿射vs样条）在相同NLL下产生更紧的认证，颠覆了通常的表达能力层次。

Conclusion: 本文首次为Transport MCMC提供了数值非空泛的严格谱间隙下界，建立了可认证性能保证的框架。发现简单架构可能优于复杂架构的认证性能，为实际应用中采样器设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Transport MCMC trains a normalizing flow to precondition Metropolis--Hastings proposals, achieving high empirical efficiency on challenging posteriors; yet no prior work produces a numerically non-vacuous, rigorous spectral-gap bound for such samplers. We establish the first such bounds. For independence MH on the banana family we certify (γ^\ast = 0.828) at (D = 2) (covering in the original space) and (γ^\ast \ge 7.6\times 10^{-4}) at (D = 5) (covering in an analytically unwarped Gaussian space with a grid-certified gradient bound under the stated numerical Lipschitz certification), both rigorous at 95% confidence.
