Method: DrPO（漂移偏好优化）：为每个提示从当前生成器采样候选图像，用目标奖励排序，使用高/低分样本合成特征空间更新方向。更新包括非参数偶极偏好场和从冻结基础生成器估计的参考漂移，通过分离的特征空间回归目标优化。目标奖励仅用于排序，因此DrPO可处理大、黑盒或不可微奖励，而推理仍为单次生成器调用。

Result: 在SD-Turbo和SDXL-Turbo上评估DrPO，使用多种目标奖励和基准（包括HPSv3和GenEval）。DrPO在无奖励梯度的单步偏好基线中提高了对齐性，并在匹配有效批次设置下通过去除奖励模型反向传播将HPSv3训练计算减少3.51倍。初步离线实验表明基于样本的梯度合成也可用于在线奖励排序之外。

Conclusion: DrPO是一种有效的单步生成器在线偏好微调方法，支持黑盒不可微奖励，减少计算开销，同时保持推理效率（单次前向）。该方法为单步生成器的对齐优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: One-step text-to-image generators are attractive for deployment because they generate an image with a single forward pass, but preference finetuning them remains difficult: standard alignment methods often rely on policy likelihoods, denoising trajectories, differentiable reward gradients, or test-time optimization. We propose Drifting Preference Optimization (DrPO), an online preference-finetuning method for deterministic one-step generators. For each prompt, DrPO samples candidates from the current generator, ranks them with a target reward, and uses high- and low-scoring samples to synthesize a feature-space update direction. The update is a non-parametric dipole preference field plus a reference drift estimated from the frozen base generator, and is optimized through a detached feature-space regression target. The target reward is used only for ranking, so DrPO can train with large, black-box, or non-differentiable rewards while inference remains a single generator call. We evaluate DrPO on SD-Turbo and SDXL-Turbo with multiple target rewards and benchmarks, including HPSv3 and GenEval. DrPO improves alignment over reward-gradient-free one-step preference baselines and reduces HPSv3 training computation by $3.51\times$ under the matched effective-batch setting by removing reward-model backpropagation. Initial offline experiments suggest that sample-based gradient synthesis can also be used beyond online reward ranking.

</details>


### [587] [IntraShuffler: A Privacy Preserving Framework for Heterogeneous DP Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02563)
*Farhin Farhad Riya,Olivera Kotevska,Jinyuan Stella Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出IntraShuffler防御框架，解决异构差分隐私联邦学习中ε感知聚合带来的隐私推理攻击风险，通过分组和参数级洗牌在保持模型效用的同时保护客户端隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异构差分隐私联邦学习中的ε感知聚合虽然能提升模型效用，但暴露的梯度结构模式为诚实但好奇的服务器提供了新的推理攻击机会，而现有的洗牌模型防御与ε感知聚合不兼容。

Method: 提出IntraShuffler防御框架：1) 将客户端按隐私预算分组到隐私兼容桶中；2) 在每个桶内进行参数级洗牌，破坏持久梯度结构；3) 保持ε感知聚合能力。

Result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，IntraShuffler将梯度可恢复性降低超过60%，将替代推理准确率从0.78降至0.33，同时在多种FL聚合规则下保持可比较的模型效用。

Conclusion: IntraShuffler成功解决了异构差分隐私联邦学习中ε感知聚合与隐私保护之间的冲突，在保持模型效用的同时有效防御隐私推理攻击，为HDP-FL系统提供了实用的防御框架。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Differential Privacy (HDP) in Federated Learning (FL) allows clients to select individual privacy budgets ($\varepsilon_i$) according to institutional policies and data sensitivity. In practice, many HDP-FL systems employ $\varepsilon$-aware server aggregation to improve model utility by re-weighting client updates according to their declared privacy budgets. However, gradient updates in FL retain structural patterns induced by non-independent and identically-distributed (non-IID) data, and these additional signals exposed by $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation create new opportunities for inference by an honest-but-curious server. In this work, we first show that a server equipped with gradient denoising and surrogate modeling can mount a \emph{Privacy Inference Attack} that infers distributional attributes of clients and links updates from the same client across training rounds, measured via surrogate inference accuracy and linkage success, under realistic knowledge constraints.
  The Shuffle-Model has been widely studied as a defense against such inference risks by anonymizing update sources, but it is fundamentally incompatible with HDP-FL $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{IntraShuffler}, a middleware defense framework designed for HDP-FL systems. IntraShuffler introduces a privacy-aware shuffling mechanism that groups clients into privacy-compatible buckets and performs parameter-level shuffling within each bucket to disrupt persistent gradient structure while preserving $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation. Experiments across four different datasets show that IntraShuffler reduces gradient recoverability by over 60% and decreases surrogate inference accuracy from 0.78 to 0.33 while maintaining comparable model utility across multiple FL aggregation rules.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [588] [VLAMotor: Test-Guided Enhancement of Vision-Language-Action Models via Agent-BasedData Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00053)
*Zeqin Liao,Peifan Ren,Zixu Gao,Hongyu Gong,Lianyu Hu,Wenbing Tang,Yuhong Nan,Zibin Zheng,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VLAMotor是一个用于增强视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的框架，通过距离感知测试发现失败案例，并将失败转化为可执行的修复技能序列，生成合成数据来微调原始模型，从而提升VLA模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型受训练数据覆盖范围限制，部署后容易在边缘配置下失败。现有研究大多停留在失败检测阶段，缺乏利用发现的失败来修复模型的机制。

Method: VLAMotor框架包含两个主要阶段：1）基于距离感知的模型测试，通过输入不确定性估计和冗余消除构建紧凑测试集来暴露多样失败；2）基于代理的数据合成，将失败轨迹抽象为结构化语义表示，规划参数化修复技能序列，通过逆运动学和运动执行生成可执行轨迹，自动标注成功轨迹用于微调VLA模型。

Result: 在四个代表性机器人操作任务上的评估显示：VLAMotor生成的测试用例中有92.33%触发了VLA失败，测试覆盖率比现有最佳工具提高18.93%。通过使用失败测试案例生成的合成数据微调VLA模型，整体成功率提高了49.25%。在真实硬件上部署时，仿真增强模型比原始VLA模型成功率提高了57.50%。

Conclusion: VLAMotor为VLA模型增强提供了一种有效且低成本的解决方案，通过将失败暴露和模型修复相结合，显著提升了VLA模型在边缘配置下的鲁棒性和成功率。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models follow a data-driven paradigm and are constrained by the coverage of training data, making them prone to failure on edge-case configurations after deployment. To mitigate such risks, it is essential to expose high-quality failure modes and convert the resulting failures into supervisory data for model enhancement. Existing studies largely stop at failure detection and lack a mechanism for leveraging discovered failures for model repair.
  We propose VLAMotor, the first analysis framework for VLA enhancement, which integrates distance-aware model testing for failure exposure and agent-based data synthesis for model finetunning. First, VLAMotor estimates input uncertainty based on the distance to training samples, and combines uncertainty ranking with redundancy elimination to build compact test sets that expose diverse failures. Then, VLAMotor abstracts failure trajectories into structured semantic representations, and plans parameterized repair-skill sequences, which are then realized as executable trajectories through inverse kinematics and motion execution. The resulting successful trajectories are automatically labeled and used to fine-tune the original VLA model, yielding an enhanced VLA model. Evaluation on four representative robotic manipulation tasks shows that 92.33% of the in-simulation test cases generated by VLAMotor trigger VLA failures, and VLAMotor improves test coverage over the state-of-the-art tool by 18.93%. By fine-tuning VLA models with synthetic data derived from failed test cases, VLAMotor further enhances the overall success rate of VLA models by 49.25%. When deployed on real hardware, the simulation-enhanced models improve the success rate over the original VLA models by 57.50%, demonstrating an effective and low-cost direction for VLA enhancement.

</details>


### [589] [From Human Videos to Robot Manipulation: A Survey on Scalable Vision-Language-Action Learning with Human-Centric Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00054)
*Zhiyuan Feng,Qixiu Li,Huizhi Liang,Rushuai Yang,Yichao Shen,Zhiying Du,Zhaowei Zhang,Yu Deng,Li Zhao,Hao Zhao,Zongqing Lu,Oier Mees,Marc Pollefeys,Jiaolong Yang,Baining Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文综述了如何将人类视频转换为视觉语言动作（VLA）模型的有效知识，提出了四类基于动作信息提取的方法，并指出了当前面临的三个关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLA模型主要依赖机器人演示数据，这些数据成本高且与特定机器人本体紧密耦合。相比之下，人类视频丰富且包含丰富的交互信息，但存在本体差异和缺乏任务对齐标注的问题，直接用于VLA模型具有挑战性。

Method: 作者将现有方法分为四类：(1) 潜在动作表示：编码帧间变化；(2) 预测性世界模型：预测未来帧；(3) 显式2D监督：提取图像平面线索；(4) 显式3D重建：恢复几何或运动。此外还提出了结构化非结构化视频、将视频监督落地到机器人可执行动作、设计评估协议等三个开放挑战。

Result: 该综述提供了一个统一的框架来理解如何将人类视频知识转化到VLA模型中，并建立了分类体系。同时识别了当前领域的关键挑战，包括数据结构化、动作落地和评估协议设计等问题。

Conclusion: 人类视频作为丰富的知识来源，对于VLA模型的泛化能力提升具有重要意义。通过系统分类现有方法并明确开放挑战，该综述为未来研究提供了方向，有助于推动从人类视频到机器人动作的有效知识转移。

Abstract: Recent progress in generalizable embodied control has been driven by large-scale pretraining of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. However, most existing approaches rely on large collections of robot demonstrations, which are costly to obtain and tightly coupled to specific embodiments. Human videos, by contrast, are abundant and capture rich interactions, providing diverse semantic and physical cues for real-world manipulation. Yet, embodiment differences and the frequent absence of task-aligned annotations make their direct use in VLA models challenging. This survey provides a unified view of how human videos are transformed into effective knowledge for VLA models. We categorize existing approaches into four classes based on the action-related information they derive: (i) latent action representations that encode inter-frame changes; (ii) predictive world models that forecast future frames; (iii) explicit 2D supervision that extracts image-plane cues; and (iv) explicit 3D reconstruction that recovers geometry or motion. Beyond this taxonomy, we highlight three key open challenges in this area: structuring unstructured videos into training-ready episodes, grounding video-derived supervision into robot-executable actions under embodiment and viewpoint heterogeneity, and designing evaluation protocols that better predict real-world deployment performance and transfer efficiency, thereby informing future research directions. A curated list of papers and resources is available at https://github.com/AaronFengZY/HumanCentricToVLA-Survey.

</details>


### [590] [Reinforcement Learning for Optimal Experiment Design in Parameter Identification of Mechatronic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00059)
*Julian Langschwert,Georg Schaefer,Jakob Rehrl,Stefan Huber,Simon Hirlaender*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用强化学习代理为Quanser Aero 2测试台生成最优激励信号，在保证安全约束的同时提高系统辨识精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统系统辨识方法需要专家知识和手动设计激励信号来满足硬件安全约束，限制了方法的通用性。需要一种能够自动设计安全激励信号的方法。

Method: 提出强化学习代理，通过奖励塑形自主学习最优激励信号，同时自动强制执行安全约束。

Result: 在10个独立训练种子评估中，该代理在所有三个辨识参数上达到有竞争力的估计精度，优于传统基线方法，安全违规率仅为0.75%。

Conclusion: 强化学习方法能够有效设计安全激励信号，实现优于传统方法的系统辨识精度，同时保持较低的安全违规率。

Abstract: Informative excitation signals are critical for accurate system identification of mechatronic systems, yet classical system identification (SI) approaches require expert knowledge and hand-crafted signal design to respect hardware safety constraints, limiting their generalizability. We propose a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that learns optimal excitation signals for a Quanser Aero 2 testbed while autonomously enforcing safety constraints through reward shaping. Evaluated across 10 independent training seeds, our comprehensive agent achieves competitive estimation accuracy across all three identified parameters, outperforming classical baselines while incurring only 0.75% safety violations.

</details>


### [591] [Linear Motility Maps in Nonlinear Viscous Fluids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00063)
*Yishun Zhou,Shai Revzen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究扩展了低雷诺数流体中"运动性映射"的线性关系，表明其在某些非线性粘性流体中可被打破，从而在看似违反"扇贝定理"的情况下实现净位移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在非牛顿流体（特别是幂律流体和Carreau-Yasuda流体）中，是否仍然存在线性运动性映射关系，以及是否可以在这些流体中通过往复运动实现净位移，从而突破扇贝定理的限制。

Method: 将线性速度运动性映射扩展到幂律粘性流体（Ostwald-de Waele流体），并研究Carreau-Yasuda流体中的非线性特性。使用由两个具有不同质量和不同阻力系数的不等质量组成的"尺蠖"模型进行往复运动分析。

Result: 证明线性速度运动性映射可扩展到幂律粘性流体，但在Carreau-Yasuda流体中，线性关系可被打破。通过"尺蠖"模型证明，在这种非线性阻力关系中，往复运动可产生净位移，且运动方向可通过改变速度来切换。

Conclusion: 几何力学的线性运动性映射可用于分析和设计幂律流体中的运动策略，而某些非线性阻力关系（如Carreau-Yasuda流体）可被利用来在看似违反扇贝定理的情况下产生净运动。

Abstract: Systems moving in low Reynolds number fluid regimes are known to be governed by a ``motility map'' which linearly relates their shape change rates to they body frame velocity moving through the fluid. A consequence of this is ``Purcell's Scallop Theorem'' -- a locomotion system that undergoes shape changes that follow the same path forward and backward in time (reciprocal body deformations) cannot achieve net displacement, regardless of pacing of those changes.We show that linear-in-velocity motility maps extend to any power law viscosity (a.k.a. Ostwald--de Waele fluid), and therefore to many biological fluids in intermediate shear ranges. We also show that the linear-in-velocity property can be violated in Carreau-Yasuda fluids to produce net motion using an ``inchworm'' model consisting of two unequal masses with unequal drag coefficients performing reciprocal motions. Interestingly, the direction of motion can be switched by changing speeds. Our results show that the linear motility map of geometric mechaincs can be used to analyze and design locomotion in power-law fluids, and that some nonlinear drag relationships such as Carreau-Yasuda can be exploited to generate net locomotion in seeming violation of the ``scallop theorem''.

</details>


### [592] [Invascal: Inverse-Vacuity Self-Calibration for Uncertainty-Aware LiDAR Range-View Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00069)
*Kerim Turacan,Hannes Reichert,Andrei Bolandut,Konrad Doll*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于LiDAR语义分割的架构无关不确定性感知适配器头，通过偏好头和强度头分解预测，构建证据Dirichlet表示，并引入逆真空自校准目标来产生可靠校准的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LiDAR语义分割方法依赖softmax置信度，但存在校准不良和过度自信问题，而蒙特卡洛dropout或集成方法计算成本高，不适合实时应用，需要一种既能提供可靠不确定性估计又计算高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出不确定性感知适配器头，包含偏好头（类别排序）和强度头（不确定性评估），构建证据Dirichlet表示；设计逆真空自校准目标直接监督强度信号，防止证据爆炸性增长。

Result: 在多个LiDAR数据集和骨干架构上评估，相比确定性训练、蒙特卡洛dropout、集成方法和先前的证据方法，能显著改善不确定性校准，同时保持有竞争力的分割精度，计算开销最小。

Conclusion: 该方法为LiDAR语义分割提供了一种架构无关、计算高效的解决方案，能产生可靠且校准良好的不确定性估计，避免了先前证据方法常见的性能下降问题。

Abstract: LiDAR semantic segmentation is a core perception capability for autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. However, safe operation also depends on knowing when predictions are unreliable. Existing approaches typically rely on softmax confidence, which is often miscalibrated and overconfident, while stronger uncertainty estimates from Monte Carlo dropout or ensembles are often computationally expensive for real-time use. To this end, we introduce a novel, architecture-agnostic uncertainty-aware Adapter Head. It decomposes the prediction into a Preference Head for class ranking and a Strength Head that refines uncertainty assessment, thereby enabling a principled construction of evidential Dirichlet representations. Building on this design, we propose our inverse-vacuity self-calibration objective (Invascal), which directly supervises the strength signal to produce reliable and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates while preventing runaway evidence growth. We evaluate our framework across multiple LiDAR datasets and backbone architectures. We compare against deterministic training, Monte Carlo dropout and ensembles, and prior evidential methods. Our approach consistently improves uncertainty calibration over traditional deterministic methods with minimal computational overhead. At the same time, it preserves competitive segmentation accuracy, where prior evidential methods often suffer performance degradation.

</details>


### [593] [Balancing Accuracy and Efficiency: Adaptive Dynamics Orchestration for Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00085)
*Francesco Cancelliere,Aniket Datar,Giovanni Muscato,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ADO框架通过动态选择不同精度-效率平衡的动态模型，解决自动驾驶中模型精度与实时性的权衡问题，在保持低计算成本的同时接近高精度模型的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶的模型预测控制面临模型精度与实时效率的根本性权衡。高精度模型能准确预测复杂车辆-地形交互但计算成本高，轻量级模型计算快但可能产生安全关键条件下的错误预测，可能导致灾难性后果。

Method: 提出自适应动态编排框架，维护一个包含不同精度-效率配置的模型库，通过在线反事实轨迹回放计算残差误差，实时评估模型性能，根据当前导航上下文动态选择最合适的动态模型。

Result: 真实世界越野地面机器人实验表明，ADO相比固定低延迟基线显著减少建模误差，同时接近最高精度模型的准确性而不产生其计算成本，实现更可靠有效的导航。

Conclusion: ADO框架通过动态模型选择成功解决了自动驾驶中模型精度与实时效率的权衡问题，能够在保持计算效率的同时提供接近高精度模型的预测准确性，提升复杂地形下的导航可靠性。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) for autonomous navigation faces a fundamental trade-off between model accuracy and real-time efficiency. High-fidelity dynamics models can accurately predict complex vehicle-terrain interactions during trajectory rollouts, but incur significant computational cost, increasing inference latency and reducing control frequency. Conversely, lightweight models enable fast updates and dense sampling, yet may produce erroneous predictions under safety-critical conditions, potentially leading to catastrophic failures such as vehicle rollover. To address this trade-off, we propose Adaptive Dynamics Orchestration (ADO), a framework that dynamically selects the most appropriate dynamics model for the current navigation context. ADO maintains a library of models spanning diverse accuracy-efficiency profiles and continuously refines terrain-conditioned performance estimates using residual errors from online counterfactual rollouts, where executed control actions are replayed across the model library to assess predictive discrepancy. These estimates guide model selection in real time, balancing computational efficiency and predictive accuracy. Real-world experiments on an off-road ground robot demonstrate that ADO significantly reduces modeling error compared to a fixed low-latency baseline, while approaching the accuracy of the highest-fidelity model without incurring its computational cost, resulting in more reliable and effective navigation in challenging terrain.

</details>


### [594] [Can Predicted Dynamics Exist in the Physical World?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00089)
*Barak Or*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种物理可接受性预测-控制接口，用于评估AI系统输出的状态预测是否物理可执行，通过运动学、动力学和多步条件检验来识别违反物理约束的无效提案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预测性物理AI系统虽然能输出状态预测、动作序列和潜在计划，但低RMSE误差并不能保证预测结果在物理上可执行。需要一种方法来评估预测是否违反物理约束，从而在部署前识别无效提案。

Method: 提出物理可接受性作为预测-控制接口：将解码后的预测视为候选动力学模型，通过运动学条件（单步）、动力学条件（多步）和直接到组合视野条件进行检验。拒绝的提案会给出违反物理约束的具体组件级原因。

Result: 在Hugging Face LeRobot PushT任务上，单步预测RMSE和标准化动力学残差达到AUC 0.982和0.972；仅运动学条件AUC 0.592；完整门控系统达到AUC 0.957并能进行条件级归因。在回放干预实验中，基于残差的过滤器和完整物理可接受性门控能阻止87-89%的无效提案，同时保持平均进度接近0.998。

Conclusion: 物理可接受性作为预测-控制接口能有效识别违反物理约束的AI系统输出，为部署前验证提供了一种系统方法，显著减少无效提案的同时保持任务执行效率。

Abstract: Predictive Physical AI systems output state rollouts, action chunks, and latent plans, yet a low root-mean-square error (RMSE) does not imply that a particular proposal is physically executable. We formulate physical admissibility as a prediction-control interface: before execution, a decoded proposal is treated as candidate dynamics and evaluated using kinematic, dynamic, and direct-to-composed horizon conditions. Passing is not a certificate of task success; rejection identifies violation of the specified physical envelope and gives a component-level reason. On Hugging Face LeRobot PushT, controlled falsification shows that one-step prediction-RMSE and standardized dynamics residuals reach area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) 0.982 and 0.972, kinematic-only conditions reach AUC 0.592, and the full gate reaches AUC 0.957 with condition-level attribution. In replay-based intervention experiments, residual-based filters and the full physical-admissibility gate prevent 87-$89% of invalid proposals while preserving mean progress near 0.998.

</details>


### [595] [Silent Failures in Physical AI: A Literature Review of Runtime Action Authorization for Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00090)
*Barak Or*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文分析了物理AI系统的安全挑战，指出黑盒模型在物理行动执行中可能产生"静默失败"，并提出运行时护栏机制作为解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理AI系统将多模态观察、语言指令和学到的世界表示映射到物理行动中，但黑盒模型可能产生看似合理但实际上危险的物理行动，这种"静默失败"无法被传统AI内容审核或经典机器人安全机制完全捕获，需要新的安全保障方法。

Method: 通过系统综述多个技术领域（体现基础模型、世界模型、机器人仿真、安全基准、安全控制、运行时保证、不确定性估计、验证和护栏评估），识别出当前技术流中的共同缺陷，并构建了有界问题表述、静默物理行动失败定义、运行时护栏功能分类法以及比较护栏作为物理AI保证机制的评价要求。

Result: 分析发现现有技术流都无法提供黑盒物理AI模型与物理执行之间的完整运行时授权边界，需要专门的运行时护栏机制来防止静默物理行动失败。

Conclusion: 需要开发专门的运行时护栏机制作为物理AI保证机制，以填补黑盒模型与物理执行之间的安全边界，防止静默物理行动失败，确保物理AI系统的安全部署。

Abstract: Physical AI systems increasingly map multimodal observations, language instructions, and learned world representations into physically consequential actions. Robotics foundation models, vision-language-action models, and world-model-based autonomous systems can condition decisions that move vehicles, robots, drones, and industrial machines. This transition exposes a safety problem that is not fully captured by conventional AI content moderation or by classical robot safety alone: a black-box model may issue a physically consequential action while appearing confident, plausible, and semantically aligned. The resulting failure can be silent, arising from sensor drift, occlusion, state-estimation error, distribution shift, hallucinated affordances, or invalid physical assumptions before downstream hardware controllers detect a violation.
  Across embodied foundation models, world models, robotics simulation, embodied safety benchmarks, safe control, runtime assurance, uncertainty estimation, verification, and guardrail evaluation, model capability and safety mechanisms have advanced along largely separate technical tracks. A recurring gap synthesized here is that no single stream surveyed in this review supplies a complete runtime authorization boundary between black-box Physical AI models and physical execution. The resulting analysis develops a bounded problem formulation, a definition of silent physical-action failure, a taxonomy of runtime guardrail functions, and evaluation requirements for comparing guardrails as Physical AI assurance mechanisms.

</details>


### [596] [RocketSmith: An Agentic System for High-Powered Rocket Design and Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00097)
*Peter Pak,Jesse Barkley,Rumi Loghmani,Derek Baich,Ananya Pamal,Amir Barati Farimani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RocketSmith是一个智能代理系统，能够自动化高功率火箭的设计、制造和优化流程，通过软件工具验证飞行稳定性并生成参数化设计组件，成功开发并测试了四款不同配置的火箭。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统火箭开发过程复杂且耗时，需要大量人工参与。作者希望创建一个智能自动化系统来简化高功率火箭的设计、制造和优化流程，提高开发效率并降低技术门槛。

Method: 开发了RocketSmith代理系统，包含多个子代理和技能模块，能够自动化软件工具进行飞行稳定性验证和参数化设计组件生成。系统支持零次尝试和人在回路两种优化工作流。利用增材制造技术制造了四种不同发动机和装配配置的火箭组件，使用FDM打印机进行制造，并进行手动飞行准备评估和实际飞行测试。

Result: 成功开发并测试了四种不同配置的高功率火箭。所有火箭都实现了稳定发射，其中两枚火箭成功回收并可重复使用。在收集的飞行数据中，实测顶点高度与飞行模拟计算的顶点高度相比，达到了84%的准确率。

Conclusion: RocketSmith系统证明了智能代理系统在高功率火箭开发中的可行性，能够有效自动化设计、制造和优化流程，为火箭开发提供了新的高效方法，同时展示了增材制造在火箭制造中的应用潜力。

Abstract: This work presents RocketSmith, an agentic system capable of the design, manufacturing, and optimization processes in high powered rocket development. The system enables the intelligent automation of software tools as to not only validate factors such as flight stability but also generate the parametric design components for the rocket assembly. A collection of subagents and skills enable optimization workflows of flight parameters via iteration in both zero-shot and human-in-the-loop workflows. With this system, four distinct high power rockets with various motor and assembly configurations were developed utilizing the unique design capabilities of additive manufacturing. These assembly components were fabricated using various FDM printers, manually evaluated for flight readiness, and flight tested at a launch event. From these tests, all rockets achieved a stable launched and two of the four rockets were successfully recovered in reflyable condition. Within the collected flight data, an 84% accuracy was achieved when comparing measured apogee to that calculated in flight simulations.

</details>


### [597] [PEACE: A Planner-Executor Agent with Constraint Enforcement for UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00104)
*Erdem Uysal,Timo Kehrer,Sebastiano Panichella*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于PX4无人机的规划-执行代理架构，将高层任务规划与底层控制解耦，使用大语言模型进行单次任务规划，通过ROS 2工具调用接口执行，结合2D检测器和深度投影进行3D定位，包含约束执行层和有限重规划机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于基础模型的自主系统要么将模型置于紧密控制循环中（导致延迟和幻觉风险），要么将自然语言编译为不透明的端到端策略（难以解释、约束，且需要领域特定数据集和微调）。需要一种更可解释、可约束且减少LLM调用的方法。

Method: 提出规划-执行代理架构：1) 大语言模型进行单次任务规划；2) 通过ROS 2工具调用接口桥接到MAVLink执行；3) 通过模块化2D检测器（YOLO或视觉语言模型）结合针孔深度投影模块进行3D物体定位构建世界模型；4) 约束执行层强制执行高度限制和水平地理围栏；5) 有限重规划机制从执行时动作失败中恢复。

Result: 在PX4软件在环仿真和Gazebo中验证了可行性，结果显示相比紧密耦合的LLM控制，提高了可解释性、约束执行能力，并减少了LLM调用次数。

Conclusion: 该规划-执行代理架构在基础模型机器人系统中提供了更好的可解释性、约束执行和效率，通过解耦规划和执行减少了LLM依赖，同时保持了系统的灵活性和安全性。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly used to drive autonomous systems, yet existing approaches either keep the model in a tight control loop, raising latency and hallucination risk, or compile natural language into opaque end-to-end policies that are hard to explain, constraint and require domain-specific datasets and fine-tuning. We propose a planner-executor agent for PX4-based drones that decouples high-level mission planning from low-level control. A large language model performs single-pass task planning, while execution is handled through a structured ROS 2 tool-calling interface bridged to MAVLink. The system constructs a world model by combining modular 2D detectors (e.g., YOLO or vision-language models) with a pinhole depth projection module for 3D object localization. A constraint enforcement layer enforces altitude limits and horizontal geofencing, and bounded replanning enables recovery from execution-time action failures. We position our approach within three common design patterns for foundation-model-based robotics systems and demonstrate its feasibility in PX4 software-in-the-loop simulations in Gazebo. Results highlight improved explainability, constraint enforcement, and reduced LLM calls compared to tightly coupled LLM control. The code, dataset, videos, and other material can be found at the following link: https://github.com/erdemuysalx/PEACE

</details>


### [598] [World Models for Robotic Manipulation: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00113)
*Fangyuan Wang,Ziyuan Wang,Guorui Pei,Mengshi Zhang,Canxi Liang,Jun Hu,Zhongxuan Li,Jinsong Wu,Ning Han,Zeqing Zhang,Jiaming Qi,Hongmin Wu,Shiyao Zhang,Pai Zheng,Jia Pan,David Navarro-Alarcon,Sichao Liu,Peng Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了机器人操作中的世界模型，将其定义为动作条件预测系统，分析了预测表示、动作连接方式、以及在机器人学习管道中的使用时机，提出了五类表示家族和功能分类法，并总结了34个操作数据集和评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作需要预测动作如何改变物体、接触和场景几何。当前世界模型研究范围广泛但分散，包括潜在动态模型、动作条件视频生成器、3D/4D场景预测器、物理模拟器等，这种碎片化使得关键设计选择变得模糊，需要系统性的整理和分类。

Method: 通过三个核心问题组织调查：预测什么未来表示、预测如何与动作连接、预测在机器人学习管道中的使用时机。将世界模型定义为动作条件预测系统，区别于感知模块、逆模型、策略等。建立了五类表示家族和功能分类法，将现有工作分为集成预测-动作模型和显式预测规划器，并分析在预训练、后训练和推理适应中的基础设施角色。

Result: 系统整理了34个机器人操作数据集，综合了预测保真度、任务性能和模拟器可靠性的评估协议。发现世界模型正从任务特定的动态预测器演变为机器人学习的预测基础设施，同时揭示了接触建模、幻觉控制、动作对齐和闭环使用基准测试等开放挑战。

Conclusion: 世界模型正在成为机器人学习的关键预测基础设施，但需要解决接触建模的准确性、幻觉控制、动作表示对齐以及闭环基准测试等挑战，以充分发挥其潜力。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation depends on the ability to anticipate how actions reshape objects, contacts, and scene geometry before execution. Learned world models provide this capability by predicting task-relevant future evolution under robot intervention, yet the term now spans latent dynamics models, action-conditioned video generators, three- and four-dimensional scene predictors, physics-informed simulators, and predictive modules inside vision-language-action systems. This breadth has fragmented the literature and obscured the design choices that matter for manipulation. We survey world models for robotic manipulation through three questions: what future representation is predicted, how prediction is connected to action, and when prediction is used in the robot-learning pipeline. We operationally define a world model as an action-conditioned predictive system and distinguish it from perception modules, inverse models, policies, rewards, and value functions. We then organize existing work into five representation families, develop a functional taxonomy that separates integrated prediction-action models from explicit predictive planners, and characterize infrastructure roles including synthetic experience generation, candidate filtering, search-based evaluation, learned environments, and outcome verification. We further map these roles across pretraining, post-training, and inference adaptation, review 34 manipulation datasets, and synthesize evaluation protocols for predictive fidelity, task performance, and simulator reliability. This survey shows that world models are evolving from task-specific dynamics predictors into predictive infrastructure for robot learning, while exposing open challenges in contact modeling, hallucination control, action alignment, and benchmarking under closed-loop use.

</details>


### [599] [Ontology-Guided Reasoning for Affordance-Based Explanations of Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00117)
*Amar Halilovic,Vahidin Hasic,Senka Krivic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于本体引导推理的机器人导航可解释性方法，通过分析环境中物体的可供性状态变化来解释导航决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类环境中，机器人仅检测到路径被阻塞是不够的，还需要理解周围物体的可供性、可能的状态变化，以及哪些变化能让机器人安全继续前进。现有方法缺乏对可行动解释的推理能力。

Method: 通过构建局部可供性本体，表示附近实体、它们的可供性、可供性状态和定性空间关系，然后评估假设的物体-可供性状态变化作为候选解释因素。

Result: 在机器人图书管理员场景的轻量级基准测试中，该方法比仅基于语义的基线更准确地识别相关解释因素，并且在语义干扰增加时保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 可供性本体不仅能作为环境的语义描述，还能作为可解释性和可靠机器人自主性的推理基础，为机器人提供可操作的解释。

Abstract: This paper proposes ontology-guided reasoning for affordance-based explanations of robot navigation. In human environments, it is not sufficient for a robot to detect that its route is blocked. It must also reason about what nearby objects afford, which state changes are possible, and which of these changes would allow it to continue safely. We address this problem by representing nearby entities, their affordances, affordance states, and qualitative spatial relations in a local affordance ontology and by evaluating hypothetical object--affordance state changes as candidate explanation factors. This yields explanations that are not only semantically grounded but also actionable. We instantiate the approach in a lightweight benchmark centered on a robot librarian scenario and evaluate it on procedurally generated navigation cases. The results show that ontology-guided reasoning identifies relevant explanation factors more accurately than a semantic-only baseline and remains robust as semantic clutter increases. Overall, the paper argues that affordance ontologies can serve not merely as semantic descriptions of the environment, but as reasoning foundations for explainability and reliable robot autonomy.

</details>


### [600] [V2I Work Zone Geometry Reconstruction with Pose-Conditioned UWB Range Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00119)
*Jiaxi Liu,Hangyu Li,Yang Cheng,Rui Gana,Junwei You,Weizhe Tang,Peng Zhang,Steven T. Parker,Xiaopeng Li,Bin Ran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于姿态条件、置换等变预测去噪器的多锚点UWB测距方法，用于提高工作区几何重建的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠的工作区映射对联网自动驾驶车辆的安全导航至关重要。基于锥形UWB路侧单元的布局推断虽然成本效益高，但在实际部署中面临突发异常值、非视距误差、锚点排序问题和车辆姿态不确定性等挑战。

Method: 采用姿态条件、置换等变预测去噪器，包含共享锚点时间预测捕获动态、对称集合聚合处理无序缺失锚点、姿态条件残差解码引入运动几何先验。采用两阶段训练策略：先学习观测范围预测，再用NLOS加权监督微调去噪器。

Result: 方法在真实世界V2I UWB数据和模拟基准测试中显著提高了测距精度、锥形定位和工作区几何重建性能，在NLOS主导场景下保持稳健，对锚点重索引和适度丢失具有鲁棒性，测量加权场MSE相比原始输入降低了66.9%。

Conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了UWB测距中的实际挑战，显著提高了工作区几何重建的可靠性，为CAV在复杂环境下的安全导航提供了有力支持。

Abstract: Reliable work zone mapping is important for connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to navigate safely and smoothly through work zone areas. Cone-mounted ultra-wideband (UWB) roadside units (RSU) offer a cost-effective way for work zone layout inference, as roadside anchors and vehicle tags provide direct vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) range constraints for work zone geometry reconstruction. However, UWB range estimation is degraded by bursty outliers, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) errors, arbitrary anchor-ordering issues, and vehicle pose uncertainties in practical field deployments. To address these challenges, this study proposes a pose-conditioned, permutation-equivariant predictive denoiser for multi-anchor UWB ranging. The model employs shared anchor-wise temporal prediction to capture range dynamics, symmetric set aggregation to handle unordered and missing anchors, and pose-conditioned residual decoding to incorporate vehicle motion as a geometric prior. A two-stage training strategy first learns prediction from observed ranges, and then fine-tunes the denoiser with NLOS-weighted supervision. The method is evaluated on rare real-world V2I UWB field data collected with a CAV, as well as on controlled large-scale simulation benchmarks for ablative insights. Results show that the proposed method substantially improves range accuracy, cone localization, and work zone geometry reconstruction in challenging NLOS-dominated regimes, remains robust to anchor re-indexing and moderate anchor dropout, and reduces measurement-weighted field MSE by 66.9% relative to the raw input.

</details>


### [601] [Modeling Robotics Dataset Construction as an Artifact-Based Build Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00162)
*Leon Pohl,Lukas Beer,George Sebastian,Mirko Maehlisch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Bagzel是一个基于Bazel的ROS bag数据集构建工具，将机器人数据转换建模为基于工件的构建过程，显著减少了迭代工作流中的运行时开销，支持增量构建和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人系统生成大量多模态传感器数据，但将ROS bag记录转换为机器学习数据集通常由临时顺序脚本处理，导致工程开销大、迭代周期慢。需要一种更高效、可复现的数据集构建方法。

Method: 将数据集构建建模为基于依赖图的工件构建过程，实现为Bagzel - 一个开源的Bazel扩展，支持增量数据集生成（包括nuScenes格式导出）。还开发了Bagzel-xattr用于服务器端摘要管理。

Result: 在所有评估的执行模式中，Bagzel都减少了运行时，在迭代工作流中收益最大（在20.4GB数据集上，热构建加速386.26倍，增量构建加速7.21倍）。Bagzel变体在5.1到20.4GB的数据集规模下显示出比基线更好的扩展性，Bagzel-xattr相比Bagzel平均减少5.9%的运行时。

Conclusion: 将机器人数据集构建建模为基于工件的构建过程，在保持确定性构建设计支持可复现性的同时，显著减少了数据集更新延迟。Bagzel已开源。

Abstract: Robotic systems generate large volumes of multimodal sensor data, but converting ROS bag recordings into machine learning datasets is often handled by ad hoc sequential scripts, creating engineering overhead and slow iteration cycles. We model dataset construction as an artifact-based build process over a dependency graph and implement this approach in Bagzel, an open-source Bazel extension for reproducible, incremental dataset generation (including nuScenes-format export). We compare Bagzel and Bagzel-xattr (server-side digest management) against a sequential rosbag2nuscenes baseline. Bagzel reduces runtime in all evaluated execution modes, with the largest gains in iterative workflows (up to 386.26x in warm builds and 7.21x in incremental builds on a 20.4 GB dataset). Across dataset sizes from 5.1 to 20.4 GB, Bagzel variants show markedly better scaling behavior than the baseline, especially in warm and incremental modes. Bagzel-xattr provides additional gains, with a mean runtime reduction of 5.9% compared to Bagzel in the input granularity study. Overall, modeling robotics dataset construction as an artifact-based build process substantially reduces dataset update latency while maintaining a deterministic build design that supports reproducibility. Bagzel is publicly available at https://github.com/UniBwTAS/bagzel.

</details>


### [602] [Safe2Drive: Evaluating Safe Driving Behaviors of E2E Autonomous Driving Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00191)
*Nishad Sahu,Kalpana Panda,Congyuan Yu,Changzhong Qian,Shounak Sural,Ragunathan Rajkumar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Safe2Drive (S2D) 是一个专注于安全关键场景的自动驾驶评估基准，包含100个常见但具挑战性的场景，并引入安全驾驶评分(SDS)来评估端到端自动驾驶策略的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管端到端自动驾驶策略在闭环模拟中取得了高驾驶分数，但它们在常见安全关键场景中的表现仍不明确。研究旨在评估这些策略在真实世界安全威胁下的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了Safe2Drive (S2D)基准，包含100个基于Bench2Drive的场景扩展，重点关注三种常见道路危险：施工区域、行人乱穿马路和被遮挡的弱势道路使用者。引入安全驾驶评分(SDS)，在原有评估指标基础上增加了碰撞前刹车、施工区域物体接触、车道居中和平稳性检查。

Result: 评估两个最先进的策略(LEAD和SimLingo)发现：在S2D上它们的驾驶分数大幅下降(LEAD从94.70降至39.95；SimLingo从85.07降至41.00)，安全驾驶评分也很低(LEAD 11.85，SimLingo 15.27)。这些策略表现出脆弱的安全驾驶行为，如对施工区域理解不足、闯红灯、对行人刹车过晚或缺失。

Conclusion: 研究表明，即使在与训练集相同的CARLA城镇中测试，端到端自动驾驶模型也缺乏安全行为推理能力。这突出了当前评估方法的局限性，需要更全面的安全评估基准。

Abstract: Recent end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving policies achieve high driving scores in closed-loop simulations. Yet it remains unclear whether these policies handle common safety-critical scenarios. We present Safe2Drive (S2D), a set of Bench2Drive-aligned scenario extensions focused on three frequent families of road hazards: work zones, pedestrian jaywalking, and occluded vulnerable road users (VRUs). Safe2Drive adds 100 common but challenging scenarios and introduces SafeDriving Score (SDS), a safety-centric metric that augments prior evaluators with pre-crash braking, work zone-object contact, lane centering, and smoothness checks. Evaluating two state-of-the-art policies (LEAD and SimLingo) on S2D, we find that their driving scores drop sharply relative to their reported Bench2Drive baselines (LEAD: from 94.70 DS on Bench2Drive to 39.95 DS on S2D; SimLingo: from 85.07 DS on Bench2Drive to 41.00 DS on S2D) and that SDS on S2D is low (11.85 for LEAD and 15.27 for Sim-Lingo). These results are consistent with brittle safe-driving behaviors such as poor work-zone understanding, red-light violations, and late or absent braking for pedestrians. This study highlights a lack of safe behavioral reasoning in E2E models even when tested on CARLA towns that are part of the training set. We plan to release the code and videos for all 100 S2D scenarios.

</details>


### [603] [Cuttlebot: a platform demonstration for complex, autonomous, bio-inspired swimmers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00197)
*Alexander Nicholas White,Ang Leo Li,Alexander Yin,Derrick Roseman,Valeria Saro-Cortes,Hannah Wiswell,Aimy Wissa,Mihai Duduta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CORE的自主机器人平台，能够驱动六个人工肌肉并感知视觉和空间信息，并开发了受乌贼启发的Cuttlebot机器人，用于深海探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着深海作业和资源开发的兴趣增加，需要开发生态敏感且环境耐用的机器人。介电弹性体驱动器人工肌肉因其压力和温度耐受性以及柔软特性适合此类系统，但难以与机器人系统集成。

Method: 开发了CORE自主机器人平台，能够驱动六个人工肌肉并集成视觉和空间感知。基于该平台开发了Cuttlebot机器人，采用乌贼启发的设计，使用波动鳍推进方式在三维空间游泳，配备四个主要人工肌肉鳍和一个触手式软抓取器。

Result: Cuttlebot在系留和非系留游泳测试中表现出最高2.5厘米/秒的平移速度和10度/秒的旋转速度。CORE系统能够向人工肌肉输入专门的控制信号，可控地输出六轴力和扭矩。

Conclusion: 这项工作为开发复杂的生物启发式游泳机器人用于海洋探索和监测提供了平台，通过Cuttlebot这一领先示例奠定了基础。

Abstract: Increasing interest in deep-sea operations and resources motivates the development of ecologically sensitive but environmentally durable robots. Dielectric elastomer actuator artificial muscles are good candidates for powering such systems due to their pressure and temperature tolerance and soft makeup, but they are difficult to integrate with robotic systems. This work presents an autonomous robotic platform: the CORE, capable of driving six artificial muscles while sensing visual and spatial information. To validate the platform, we developed the Cuttlebot - a cuttlefish-inspired robot that swims in three dimensions using undulatory fin locomotion. The Cuttlebot has four primary artificial muscles in its fins in addition to a tentacle-inspired soft gripper. The robot was evaluated in a series of tethered and untethered swimming tests, demonstrating a top speed of 2.5 centimeters per second translation and 10 degrees per second rotation. Furthermore, the CORE system was capable of driving specialized control signals into the artificial muscles to controllably output force and torque in six axes. This work provides a platform for developing complex, bio-inspired swimming robots for ocean exploration and monitoring, laying the foundation with our leading example: the Cuttlebot.

</details>


### [604] [Series-Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator applied to the lean motion of a bicycle simulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00201)
*Christina Kohler,Michiel Plooij,Nuria Peña-Perez,Arend L. Schwab,Heike Vallery*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SPINEA（Series Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator）是一种新型致动器，通过单个弹性元件同时实现串联弹性致动器（SEA）和并联弹性致动器（PEA）的双重功能，从而在紧凑设计中实现高扭矩和精确扭矩跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计用于高扭矩、高保真触觉交互的机器人具有挑战性。现有的串联弹性致动器（SEA）和并联弹性致动器（PEA）各有优势但难以兼顾，而将两者结合通常需要单独的弹性元件或离合器，增加了系统复杂性。

Method: SPINEA通过非线性传动实现，其中电机和负载具有不对齐的旋转轴并通过弹性连接。这种几何结构使单个弹性元件能同时承担串联和并联角色，从而在紧凑设计中实现高扭矩和精确扭矩跟踪。

Result: 将SPINEA应用于触觉自行车模拟器的倾斜致动，实验结果显示其具有低阻抗和精确的扭矩跟踪能力，在固定自行车架时可达4.25Hz，在有骑手骑行时可达4Hz。

Conclusion: SPINEA成功地将SEA和PEA的优势集成到单个弹性元件中，实现了紧凑、高性能的致动解决方案，其优势可扩展到其他需要紧凑高性能致动的应用中。

Abstract: Designing robots for high-torque, high-fidelity haptic interaction is challenging. Parallel Elastic Actuators (PEAs) use elastic elements in parallel to smaller motors to complement torques, and Series Elastic Actuators (SEAs) use elastic elements in series to decouple motor impedance and improve force control. Recent work combines SEAs and PEAs to obtain both benefits but requires separate elastic elements or clutching. This paper presents the Series Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator (SPINEA), which merges SEA and PEA such that a single elastic element takes on dual roles simultaneously, parallel and series. This is achieved by a nonlinear transmission in which the motor and load have misaligned rotation axes and are elastically connected. This geometry enables both high peak torque and precise torque tracking. We apply SPINEA to actuate lean of a haptic bicycle simulator, which requires high moments and precise rendering for safe and realistic rider interactions. We realized a prototype and performed experiments, both with an external excitation setup and with riders cycling. Our results confirm SPINEA's low impedance and precise torque tracking, up to 4.25 Hz with the bicycle frame fixed and up to 4 Hz with riders. The benefits may transfer to other applications requiring compact, high-performance actuation.

</details>


### [605] [Continuous Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00229)
*Yueh-Hua Wu,Tatsuya Matsushima,Kei Ota*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出"连续推理"作为视觉-语言-动作模型的新推理媒介，通过结构化连续思维作为共享上下文来提升动作生成的鲁棒性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言作为推理媒介与连续控制的粒度不匹配：文本和显式子目标在任务级粒度操作，而VLA策略需要在更细的时间尺度上选择动作。现有方法在推理步骤和实际动作之间存在弱耦合问题，需要一种可共享、可验证且与时间扩展控制结构对齐的VLA推理媒介。

Method: 提出连续推理方法：1) 预测结构化连续思维作为推理媒介；2) 将其作为共享上下文用于分块结构化动作生成；3) 将连续推理实例化为共享高斯潜在接口；4) 使用自验证目标训练，其中指数移动平均教师必须成功消费学生的推理来预测目标动作。

Result: 连续推理显著提升了LIBERO-PRO的鲁棒性，在真实机器人上表现优异：在TX-G2（AgiBot G2兼容变体）上平均子任务成功率比π0.5提高40.4%，在HSR上提高26.3%。

Conclusion: VLA中的推理不仅仅是增加额外标记，而是需要一个可共享、可验证的内部动作语言。连续推理通过结构化潜在表示实现了这一目标，为VLA模型提供了更有效的推理媒介。

Abstract: Natural language is a powerful reasoning medium for language and vision-language models, but it is mismatched to the granularity of continuous control. Text and explicit subgoals operate at task-level granularity, whereas vision-language-action (VLA) policies must choose actions at a much finer temporal scale; a single reasoning step can therefore span many action chunks while remaining only weakly coupled to the action needed now. This suggests a different question for VLA: what should play the role of language? We argue that a useful VLA reasoning medium must be shareable across model instances, verifiable through downstream action improvement, and aligned with temporally extended control structure.
  Based on this view, we propose Continuous Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action. Our model first predicts continuous reasoning in the form of a structured set of continuous thoughts, then reuses them as shared context for chunk-structured action generation. Better action prediction alone does not certify good reasoning: if the same internal medium cannot be shared across model instances and independently verified through improved downstream control, the added latent may simply become a model-private shortcut that helps on seen behaviors without supporting generalizable control. We therefore instantiate continuous reasoning as a shared Gaussian latent interface and train it with a self-verification objective in which an exponential-moving-average teacher must successfully consume the student's reasoning when predicting target actions.
  Empirically, Continuous Reasoning improves LIBERO-PRO robustness and performs strongly on real robots, raising mean subtask success over π0.5 by 40.4% on TX-G2, an AgiBot G2-compatible variant, and 26.3% on HSR. This suggests that reasoning in VLA is less about extra tokens than about a shareable, verifiable internal language for action.

</details>


### [606] [HOIST: Humanoid Optimization with Imitation and Sample-efficient Tuning for Manipulating Suspended Loads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00252)
*Songyang Liu,Shunyu Yao,Dingyuan Huang,Shuai Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HOIST 方法通过结合模仿学习和样本高效强化学习，优化人形机器人对悬挂负载的操控，提高放置精度和停止行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人操控悬挂负载具有挑战性，因为只能通过全身运动和间歇接触影响欠驱动、振荡的负载。纯模仿学习无法优化最终放置精度，而纯强化学习在真实人形机器人上既不安全又样本效率低下。

Method: HOIST 首先通过VR遥操作演示微调高层视觉-语言-动作策略，并通过全身控制器执行命令。然后使用VLA rollout和迭代批处理强化学习来改进放置精度和停止行为。

Result: 在仿真和真实人形机器人上的实验表明，HOIST优于纯模仿学习和额外演示基线；与纯VLA rollout相比，减少了19.9厘米的平移放置误差和3.56度的原始角度误差。

Conclusion: HOIST展示了人形机器人在欠驱动物料搬运任务中的潜力，通过结合模仿学习和样本高效强化学习实现了安全、高效的悬挂负载操控。

Abstract: Manipulating suspended payloads with humanoid robots is challenging because the robot can only influence an underactuated, oscillatory load through whole-body motion and intermittent contact. Imitation learning provides safe initial behavior but does not directly optimize final placement, while reinforcement learning from scratch is unsafe and sample-inefficient on real humanoids. We present HOIST-Humanoid Optimized with Imitation and Sample-efficient Tuning for manipulating suspended loads. HOIST first finetunes a high-level vision-language-action (VLA) policy from virtual-reality (VR) teleoperation demonstrations and executes its commands through a whole-body controller. It then uses VLA rollouts and iterative batched RL to improve placement accuracy and stopping behavior. Experiments in simulation and on a real humanoid show that HOIST improves over imitation-only and additional-demonstration baselines; compared with pure VLA rollouts, HOIST reduces translational placement error by 19.9 cm and raw angular error by 3.56 degrees, demonstrating the potential of humanoids for underactuated material-handling tasks.

</details>


### [607] [Per-Group Error, Not Total MSE: Fine-Tuning Vision-Language-Action Models for 11-DoF Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00253)
*Pau Montagut Bofi,Mario García Blasco,Tessa Pulli,Markus Vincze*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 在异质关节空间的移动操作机器人上微调VLA模型时，总MSE最低的检查点并非实际表现最佳，因为不同关节组（机械臂、夹爪、头部、移动底盘）的预测难度不同，容易预测的关节会掩盖仍然失败的关节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决在异质关节空间移动操作机器人上微调视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型时的一个反直觉现象：总均方误差（MSE）最低的模型检查点在实际机器人上的表现并不是最好的。这主要是因为将异质关节组（机械臂、夹爪、头部、移动底盘）合并为单一评估指标时，容易预测的关节会掩盖那些仍然预测失败的关节。

Method: 方法包括：1）在丰田HSR（11自由度）机器人上微调SmolVLA（450M参数，仅动作专家）模型；2）与更强的预训练基线π₀.₅（3.3B参数）比较；3）进行分组误差分析（机械臂、夹爪、头部、移动底盘）；4）对π₀.₅进行专家专用微调（仅训练动作头，骨干网络冻结）；5）进行60次真实机器人试验（每个模型20次）评估实际性能。

Result: 结果发现：1）SmolVLA中移动底盘收敛最慢，限制了整体性能；2）π₀.₅专家专用微调（3k步）总MSE低于基线，但机械臂精度下降；3）真实机器人试验显示，π₀.₅ 80k（4.0/4分）显著优于两个微调变体（专家专用3k：3.75/4；HSR-SmolVLA：3.5/4；Mann-Whitney p ≤ 0.010），尽管专家专用3k的总MSE最低；4）这种性能差异与离线机械臂组误差最一致，而不是总MSE或底盘组误差。

Conclusion: 结论是对于具有异质动作空间的机器人，分组误差是比总MSE更可靠的检查点选择信号。研究强调了在评估VLA模型时需要单独考虑不同关节组的性能，而不是依赖聚合的单一指标。

Abstract: Fine-tuning Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for mobile manipulators with heterogeneous joint spaces can produce a counterintuitive result: the checkpoint with the lowest aggregate MSE is not the one that performs best on the real robot. We argue this is a predictable consequence of collapsing heterogeneous joint groups (arm, gripper, head, wheeled base) into a single metric, where easy-to-predict joints can mask joints that still fail.
  We fine-tune SmolVLA (450M, action-expert only) on the 11-DoF Toyota HSR and compare it against $π_{0.5}$ (3.3B), a stronger pretrained baseline. Per-group analysis exposes two patterns: in SmolVLA, the mobile base converges slowest and limits overall performance. In expert-only fine-tuning of $π_{0.5}$ (training only the action head, backbone frozen), total MSE drops below the baseline but arm accuracy degrades. On 60 real-robot trials (20 per model), $π_{0.5}$ 80k (4.0/4) significantly outperforms both fine-tuned variants (expert-only 3k: 3.75/4; HSR-SmolVLA: 3.5/4; Mann-Whitney $p \leq 0.010$), despite expert-only 3k having the lowest total MSE. This separation is most consistent with the offline arm-group error, not total MSE or base-group error. We conclude that per-group error is a more reliable signal than total MSE for checkpoint selection on robots with heterogeneous action spaces. Code: https://github.com/paumontagut/per-group-mse-vla

</details>


### [608] [ScaRF-SLAM: Scale-Consistent Reconstruction with Feed-Forward Models and Classical Visual SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00307)
*Yuhao Zhang,Yifu Tao,Frank Dellaert,Maurice Fallon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出解耦框架，将经典特征SLAM与几何基础模型结合，用SLAM进行稳健跟踪，用GFM专门建图，避免几何预测误差影响位姿估计，实现高质量稠密重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接将GFM预测用于跟踪对模型能力和不确定性高度敏感，几何预测不准确会负面影响位姿估计，需要解决这一限制。

Method: 使用经典视觉SLAM进行低延迟跟踪，GFM专门用于建图；将建图锚定到SLAM位姿并优化深度尺度；构建子地图并保持尺度一致性；进行投影点云融合；在线更新子地图。

Result: 在室内环状丰富数据集上，轨迹精度优于现有方法，重建精度提升10%-20%，每10米段重建误差约2厘米；在大型室外数据集上，每30米段误差10厘米。

Conclusion: 解耦框架成功整合经典SLAM与GFM，避免几何预测误差传播到位姿估计，同时施加几何约束，实现了更高质量和更一致的稠密重建。

Abstract: Recent works have explored unifying SLAM with geometric foundation models (GFMs). However, directly using GFM predictions for tracking is highly sensitive to model capability and uncertainty, as geometric inaccuracies in the predictions can adversely affect pose estimation. To address this limitation, we present a decoupled framework that integrates classical feature-based SLAM with GFMs, which achieves higher quality and more consistent dense reconstruction. In brief, we use classical visual SLAM for robust low-latency tracking and use GFMs exclusively for mapping. By anchoring mapping to poses produced by the SLAM module and optimizing across depth scales, the proposed design avoids propagating inaccuracies from GFM predictions into pose estimation while imposing geometric constraints on the reconstruction. The system builds submaps from multiple posed keyframes and enforces scale consistency via lightweight frame and submap scale optimization. It also performs projection-based point cloud fusion within each submap, and updates submaps online to reflect trajectory updates from the feature-based SLAM. To evaluate tracking and reconstruction of our method, we introduce a loop-rich, building-scale indoor dataset with accurate sensor trajectories and LiDAR ground-truth. Experiments show that our approach achieves superior trajectory accuracy while improving reconstruction precision by 10%-20% over existing methods, with about 2 cm reconstruction error per 10 m chunk on building-scale dataset. On large-scale outdoor datasets, it attains 10 cm error per 30 m chunk (w.r.t LiDAR ground-truth models).

</details>


### [609] [DRL-Based Pose Control for Double-Ackermann Robots Under Actuation Uncertainties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00313)
*Oussama Zaim,Mélodie Daniel,Aly Magassouba,Miguel Aranda,Olivier Ly*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究针对双阿克曼转向移动机器人的姿态控制问题，通过改进DRL框架ManeuverNet，从位置控制扩展到全姿态控制，并采用sim-to-sim-to-real方法提升策略在仿真到真实环境转移中的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在真实机器人部署中存在仿真与现实动力学差异的挑战，特别是对于非完整约束的双阿克曼转向移动机器人。现有方法在简化执行器模型训练时，在更严格评估条件下从PyBullet到Gazebo的转移性能显著下降（成功率从100%降至25%），需要提高策略的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Method: 1. 扩展ManeuverNet框架，从位置控制升级为全姿态控制；2. 采用sim-to-sim-to-real方法，将Gazebo中观察到的执行器效应整合到PyBullet训练环境；3. 使用SAC和CrossQ算法的多环境DRL训练，学习对建模不准确性具有鲁棒性的策略。

Result: 1. 在Gazebo中成功率从25%提升至92%；2. 在更严格阈值下仍保持69%的成功率；3. 成功转移到真实机器人且无需额外调参；4. 显著缩小了不同仿真器间的性能差距。

Conclusion: 通过将执行器不确定性纳入训练环境并采用多环境DRL方法，可以有效提升双阿克曼转向移动机器人姿态控制策略的鲁棒性，实现从仿真到真实环境的成功转移，为解决仿真与现实差异问题提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Robust deployment of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) policies on real robots remains challenging due to discrepancies between simulation and real-world dynamics. We address this issue in the context of maneuvering with double-Ackermann-steering mobile robots, which introduce additional constraints due to their non-holonomic nature. Building upon the DRL framework ManeuverNet, we extend its objective from position control to full pose control, resulting in a more challenging task. We further investigate the impact of actuation-related uncertainties on policy transfer. The use of simplified actuation models during training of the extended policy can lead to poor generalization, shown by a success rate drop from 100% in PyBullet to 25% in Gazebo under stricter evaluation conditions. To address this limitation, we adopt a sim-to-sim-to-real approach, where actuation effects observed in Gazebo are incorporated into the PyBullet training environment. Using multi-environment DRL with SAC and CrossQ, we learn policies that remain robust despite modeling inaccuracies. This approach can significantly reduce the performance gap across simulators, achieving up to 92% success rate in Gazebo and maintaining 69% under stricter thresholds, with successful transfer to a real robot without additional tuning.

</details>


### [610] [Belief Consistency Between Foundation-Model Evidence and Geometric Perception in Persistent Robotic Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00318)
*Christoffer Heckman,Harel Biggie,Brendan Crowe,Nicholas Roy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新的地图更新算子，通过每类校准的提交门和每事件冲突丢弃窗口，解决几何感知通道与基础模型通道融合时的可靠性校准和冲突处理问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶机器人地图系统在融合几何感知通道（可靠性好）和基础模型通道（语义信息丰富但可靠性未校准）时，存在两个问题：1）基础模型通道的每类可靠性未校准；2）缺乏机制检测两个通道在特定时刻的冲突。这导致地图精度下降。

Method: 提出包含两个协作机制的地图更新算子：1）每类校准的提交门，用于评估基础模型通道的可靠性；2）每事件冲突丢弃窗口，当基础模型通道的声明与几何通道在声明时刻相矛盾时，拒绝提交该声明。

Result: 在KITTI-360和ScanNet数据集上评估，使用oracle几何通道（全景真值）和现成的在线语义分割器（Mask2Former）。新算子显著提高了地图精度：KITTI中汽车提交精度达99.7%（对比校准-only算子的43.9%），平均每类IoU为0.522（对比0.180）。在保持更高精度的同时，保留了更多组合真阳性，且性能优于单一组合VLM提示。

Conclusion: 该框架在oracle和现成分割器几何通道上均能达到部署质量，且对基础模型替换具有不变性，有效解决了多通道地图融合中的可靠性校准和冲突检测问题。

Abstract: Persistent maps used by autonomous robots increasingly fuse a geometric perception stack whose assertions are well-characterized with a foundation-model channel that produces semantic claims without calibrated reliability about the same scene. Contemporary mapping systems integrate the two channels by treating the foundation-model channel as an additional voter into a per-element posterior, uncalibrated for its own per-class reliability and without machinery to flag when the two channels contradict each other at a given moment. We propose an update operator with two cooperating mechanisms: a per-class calibrated commit gate, and a per-event conflict-drop window that refuses to commit foundation-model claims contradicted by the geometric channel at the moment of the claim. We evaluate on KITTI-360 and ScanNet, with an oracle geometric channel (panoptic ground truth) and an off-the-shelf online semantic segmenter (Mask2Former) to demonstrate real-world performance. The operator produces substantially more accurate committed maps (KITTI is car commit precision 99.7% vs. 43.9% for the calibration-only operator; mean per-class IoU 0.522 vs. 0.180), retains more compositional true positives at higher precision than a monolithic compositional VLM prompt. The framework operates at deployment quality across both oracle and off-the-shelf-segmenter geometric channels, and is invariant under foundation-model substitution.

</details>


### [611] [FAIR^2 Drones: An AI-Ready Standard for Cross-Domain Wildlife Drone Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00355)
*Jenna Kline,Kilian Meier,Vandita Shukla,Edouard G. A. Rolland,Elena Iannino,Lucie Laporte-Devylder,Constanza Andrea Molina Catricheo,Blair Costelloe,Elizabeth Campolongo,Henrik S. Midtiby,Devis Tuia,Benjamin Risse,Ulrik P. S. Lundquist,Anders Lyhne Christensen,Fabio Remondino,Thomas Richardson,Tanya Berger-Wolf*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FAIR^2 Drones是一个统一的数据集标准，旨在连接生态学、机器人学和计算机视觉领域，通过标准化无人机平台元数据和标注规范，促进跨学科数据重用和协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前无人机生态学数据收集成本高昂，但大多数数据集仅服务于单一研究社区，限制了跨学科重用。缺乏统一标准导致不同领域之间的数据难以互操作和共享。

Method: 基于现有FAIR和AI-ready数据框架，添加必要的平台元数据和标注规范，创建统一的无人机数据集标准。提供开源验证工具、参考实现，并扩展多模态功能，将无人机图像与相机陷阱、GPS、声学等互补传感器数据连接。

Result: 提出了FAIR^2 Drones标准，使数据集能同时支持生态分析、机器人算法开发和计算机视觉基准测试。通过标准化跨学科元数据，最大化昂贵野外部署的科学回报，加速环境监测领域的跨领域协作。

Conclusion: FAIR^2 Drones框架通过统一标准解决了无人机生态学数据跨学科重用的障碍，为生态学、机器人学和计算机视觉的交叉研究提供了基础设施，有望提高数据收集投资的回报并促进跨领域合作。

Abstract: Animal ecology data collection using drones represents a substantial investment of time, expertise, and financial resources. Yet most existing datasets serve only a single research community, limiting interdisciplinary reuse. We propose a unified drone dataset standard, FAIR^2 Drones, that bridges ecology, robotics, and computer vision by building on existing FAIR and AI-ready data frameworks while adding essential platform metadata and annotation specifications. Our standard enables datasets to simultaneously support ecological analysis, robotics algorithm development, and computer vision benchmarking. We provide open-source validation tools, reference implementations, and multimodal extensions linking drone imagery with complementary sensors such as camera traps, GPS, and acoustics. By standardizing metadata across disciplines, this framework maximizes the scientific return on investment for costly field deployments and accelerates cross-domain collaboration in environmental monitoring.

</details>


### [612] [Constrained Whole-Body Tracking for Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00374)
*Daniel Morton,Pranit Mohnot,Marco Pavone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ConstrainedMimic：一个结合强化学习和控制理论的实时约束执行框架，用于人形机器人全身运动控制，确保安全并满足训练后指定的约束条件


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然强化学习在人形机器人全身敏捷控制方面取得了显著进展，但确保安全性并满足训练后指定的约束条件仍然是一个挑战。需要一种能够在RL跟踪策略中实时执行约束的框架。

Method: 提出ConstrainedMimic控制框架，结合操作空间控制和控制屏障函数（CBFs），利用全身运动学和动力学进行实时约束执行。该框架能够满足对运动学参考运动和底层动力学的任意运行时约束。

Result: 在Unitree G1机器人（模拟）的全身运动跟踪和遥操作实验中，成功实现了碰撞避免（包括机器人自身和外部障碍物）、关节限制和质心稳定性约束。方法完全可微分，支持CPU、GPU和TPU运行，部署频率可达300-500Hz。

Conclusion: ConstrainedMimic能够在不显著限制策略能力的情况下，通过保持与当前接触模式和跟踪目标的一致性来强制执行约束。该方法为强化学习控制的机器人提供了安全可靠的约束执行解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have demonstrated impressive whole-body agility for humanoid robots, yet ensuring safety and satisfying constraints -- particularly those specified after training -- remains a challenge. Towards this goal, we present ConstrainedMimic, a control framework that leverages whole-body kinematics and dynamics for real-time constraint enforcement within RL tracking policies. By integrating principles from operational space control and control barrier functions (CBFs), we enable the satisfaction of arbitrary runtime constraints on both the kinematic reference motion and the underlying dynamics. In whole-body motion-tracking and teleoperation experiments on a (simulated) Unitree G1 with a learned policy, we demonstrate collision avoidance (both with the robot body and external obstacles), joint limits, and center of mass stability constraints. By remaining consistent with the current contact mode and tracking objectives, we minimally restrict the capabilities of the policy when constraints are active. Our method is fully differentiable, runs on CPU, GPU, and TPU, and can be deployed at up to 300-500 Hz. All software will be freely available upon publication.

</details>


### [613] [Behavior Cloning of MPC for 3-DOF Robotic Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00383)
*Theo Guegan,Dexter Wen Jie Teo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 行为克隆可有效降低3自由度机械臂MPC策略的计算负担，推理延迟减少3倍，成功率84.98%，但严格容差下存在精度差距


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MPC虽然提供强稳定性和鲁棒性，但对实时系统计算负担大。研究应用行为克隆来近似MPC策略，以实现3自由度机械臂的实时控制。

Method: 提出结合逆运动学和MPC的基线控制器，评估从经典回归算法到深度学习模型（包括深度MLP和RNN）的神经网络架构，以推导计算高效的替代策略。分析泛化能力、稳定性考虑和不同架构选择的权衡。使用在线和离线评估来评估准确性、计算效率和与原始MPC策略的保真度。

Result: 行为克隆能有效降低3自由度机械臂MPC策略的计算负担，在宽松容差下实现84.98%的成功率，推理延迟减少3倍。静态架构优于时序变体，证实瞬时状态观察对此任务足够。但在严格容差下观察到精度差距，表明行为克隆能捕获全局最优轨迹，但需要进一步研究以最小化终端稳态误差。

Conclusion: 行为克隆可有效近似MPC策略，显著降低计算负担，适合实时控制。静态架构表现更好，但严格容差下的精度差距表明需要进一步研究以提升终端精度。

Abstract: While Model Predictive Control (MPC) provides strong stability and robustness, it imposes a significant computational burden on real-time systems. This paper investigates the application of Behavior Cloning to approximate MPC policies for the real-time control of a 3-degree-of-freedom robotic manipulator. We present a baseline controller combining Inverse Kinematics with MPC and evaluate neural network architectures, ranging from classical regression algorithms to deep learning models including Deep MLPs and RNNs, to derive computationally efficient surrogate policies. We analyze generalization capabilities, stability considerations, and the trade-offs inherent in different architectural choices. Our empirical study employs both online and offline evaluations to assess performance regarding accuracy, computational efficiency, and fidelity to the original MPC policy. Our results demonstrate that Behavior Cloning can effectively reduce the computational burden of MPC policies for 3-DOF robotic manipulators, achieving a 3x reduction in inference latency with a 84.98% success rate under relaxed tolerances. Notably, we find that static architectures outperform temporal variants, confirming the sufficiency of instantaneous state observations for this task. However, we observe a precision gap under strict tolerances, which suggest that while Behavior Cloning captures the global optimal trajectory, further research is needed to minimize terminal steady-state error.

</details>


### [614] [SoFiE: Soft Finger Exoskeleton for Intelligent Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00397)
*Magnus Malthe Sigsgaard Nielsen,Nicklas Nikolaj Grønvall,Xiaofeng Xiong,Saravana Prashanth Murali Babu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SoFiE是一个模块化软手指外骨骼，用于辅助食指屈曲抓握，采用3D打印柔性材料制造，具有肌腱驱动和被动伸展机制，集成了拉伸传感和磁力触觉传感，实现无束缚、自适应控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为手部功能减退者提供辅助解决方案，开发轻量、低轮廓、模块化的软可穿戴机器人系统，实现可靠的姿态估计和触觉感知。

Method: 采用3D打印柔性材料制造模块化软外骨骼，通过DC电机驱动肌腱实现主动屈曲，使用柔性导电弹簧提供被动伸展并作为本体感觉传感器（StretchSense），引入磁力触觉传感（MagSense）估计接触力和物体柔顺性，嵌入式微控制器实现无束缚控制。

Result: 系统能可靠估计姿态，区分不同刚度的材料，在不同抓握任务中产生独特的传感器特征，验证了作为模块化、软性、辅助可穿戴机器人概念验证的可行性。

Conclusion: SoFiE展示了模块化软手指外骨骼的设计、制造和传感概念，为开发安全、自适应的辅助可穿戴机器人系统提供了基础。

Abstract: Soft wearable robotic systems have emerged as a promising solution for assisting individuals with reduced hand function. This paper presents SoFiE, a modular soft finger exoskeleton designed to assist index-finger flexion during grasping tasks. The proposed system is primarily fabricated using 3D-printed flexible materials, enabling a lightweight, low-profile, and modular design. Actuation is achieved through a tendon-driven mechanism powered by a compact DC motor, while passive extension is provided by a compliant conductive spring. This element, termed StretchSense, also functions as a proprioceptive sensor by exhibiting resistance changes under deformation. Furthermore, a novel tactile sensing approach, MagSense, is introduced, using a magnet and magnetometer pair embedded in a soft fingertip structure to estimate contact force and object compliance. The system is fully untethered and controlled by an embedded microcontroller. In addition, actuator-level sensing through motor encoder feedback enables estimation of the system state, providing a foundation for safe and adaptive control strategies. Experimental validation demonstrates the capability of the system to provide reliable pose estimation, distinguish between materials with different stiffness, and generate distinct sensor signatures across different grasping tasks. This paper details the design, fabrication, and sensing concepts of the proposed exoskeleton as a proof of concept toward modular, soft, and assistive wearable robotics.

</details>


### [615] [Literary Emotions in Motion: A Soft Robotics Installation for Tactile Storytelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00418)
*Carolina Silva-Plata,Abraham Villavicencio-Carmona,Miguel Silva Plata,Stefan Escaida,Ruben Fernandez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个交互式软体机器人艺术装置，通过语义情感分析控制软体气动模块的刚度变化，结合LED灯光强度，探索多感官耦合对情感感知的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体机器人在艺术领域的应用日益增多，但如何通过触觉交互为观众提供超越视觉或听觉的具身参与体验仍是一个挑战。本研究旨在探索如何将语义情感分析映射到软体机器人的物理特性（刚度）中，创造有意义的情感互动体验。

Method: 1) 开发了称为"软模块"的硅胶气动致动器，采用薄膜层设计进行形态控制；2) 使用自然语言模型从六种预设情感中识别两种主导情感；3) 将情感映射到七个六边形排列的致动器：中央致动器代表主要情感，周围六个代表次要情感；4) 通过用户研究（10名参与者）评估刚度和LED光强的多感官耦合对情感感知的影响。

Result: 1) 机械表征显示，薄膜层的形态控制扩展了可实现的刚度范围，同时保持了简单和低成本的制造；2) 用户研究表明，刚度调制与颜色变化相结合，能够支持在软体机器人装置中创造情感上有意义且引人入胜的触觉交互体验。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了通过语义情感分析控制软体机器人刚度的可行性，并结合视觉线索（LED光强）创造了有效的多感官情感互动体验。这种软体机器人艺术装置为观众提供了新颖的具身参与方式，扩展了软体机器人在艺术和人机交互领域的应用潜力。

Abstract: Soft robotics is increasingly explored in artistic contexts, where tactile interaction provides audiences with embodied engagement beyond visual or auditory signals. This work presents an interactive installation that maps semantic emotion analysis of narrative text into variable stiffness of soft pneumatic modules. A natural language model identifies two dominant emotions from a predefined set of six, driving the inflation of seven hexagonally arranged soft actuators. The central actuator represents the primary emotion, while the surrounding ones express the secondary. We develop and mechanically characterize silicone actuators, called soft modules, featuring a thin membrane layer, demonstrating how this morphological control expands the achievable stiffness range while preserving simplicity and low-cost fabrication. A user study with ten participants further evaluates how multisensory coupling of stiffness and LEDs intensity influences emotional perception. The results suggest that stiffness modulation accompanied by color change can support emotionally meaningful and engaging tactile interaction in soft robotic installations.

</details>


### [616] [ROG-Grasp: Root-Oriented Geometry for Robotic Grasping and Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00449)
*Zijian An,Augustus Sroka,Ran Yang,Bill Cai,Satoru Eto,Brian Poon,Kelvin Cai,Shijie Geng,Feng Liu,Yiming Feng,Lifeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ROG-Grasp：基于几何的机器人抓取与放置框架，通过RGB-D感知从根表面几何估计作物方向，实现定向约束的操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 收获后农业加工中，需要将农产品以一致的方向抓取和放置，定向感知操作至关重要

Method: 使用YOLO根检测器和点云平面拟合推断根法线，生成稳定抓取姿态和定向约束的笛卡尔运动规划

Result: 在番茄和洋葱实验中，孤立和杂乱场景下均实现高成功率与稳定执行时间；相比VLA策略更可靠、准确且执行更快

Conclusion: 几何驱动感知对实际定向控制操作任务有效，为农业加工提供可靠解决方案

Abstract: Orientation-aware manipulation is essential in post-harvest agricultural processing, where produce must be grasped and placed in consistent configurations. This paper presents ROG-Grasp, a geometry-based robotic grasping and placement framework that estimates the produce orientation from root surface geometry using RGB-D perception. A YOLO-based root detector and point cloud plane fitting are used to infer the root normal, enabling stable grasp pose generation and orientation-constrained Cartesian motion planning. Experiments on tomatoes and onions demonstrate high success rates and stable execution time in both isolated and cluttered scenarios. Compared with vision-language-action (VLA) policies, the proposed method achieves more reliable and accurate grasp completion with faster execution. These results highlight the effectiveness of geometry-driven perception for practical orientation-controlled manipulation tasks. A video of our paper is available online https://youtu.be/Ir2UtGODdMo.

</details>


### [617] [Adaptive PD Gains for Energy-Conscious Control in Physical Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00459)
*Danyal Saqib,Francisco Andrade Chavez,Marie Charbonneau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应PD控制器，通过限制机器人的机械能来实现安全的人机交互，无需外部力传感器或关节扭矩传感


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的力控制和扭矩控制方法需要外部力传感器或关节扭矩传感，这在许多机器人上不可用。能量基方法虽然提供了替代方案，但现有方案实现复杂且需要稳定性验证。因此需要一种简单可靠的控制器来实现安全的人机交互。

Method: 提出自适应比例-微分（PD）控制器，能够限制机器人的动能和势能，通过参数可精确控制能量上限和过渡特性，并提供了稳定性证明和稳定性保证条件。

Result: 在PAL Robotics的TALOS机器人上进行了仿真和硬件测试，验证了控制器的顺应性和能量限制行为符合预期。

Conclusion: 该自适应PD控制器提供了一种无需额外传感器即可实现安全人机交互的解决方案，具有简单实现和稳定性保证的优点。

Abstract: Compliant force or torque control are approaches often investigated to achieve safe physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). However, these approaches have limitations. Force control requires a robot to be equipped with external force sensors to track the amplitude and direction of applied forces. Torque control requires torque sensing or estimation in each joint. As this is not available on every robot, energy-based approaches offer a promising alternative. Such approaches aim to achieve safe pHRI by limiting the mechanical energy of the robot. Current schemes leveraging an energy-based approach tend to have a complex implementation, and some may require further stability verification. We hence propose an adaptive proportional-derivative (PD) controller that can limit a robot's energy under any given limit to achieve safe pHRI. The proposed controller can limit both the kinetic and potential energy of a robot, and the behaviour of the controller gains can be shaped using various parameters, defining precisely the cutoff limit and sharpness. We construct a stability proof for the controller and define a condition to ensure the controller's stability. The proposed controller's behaviour and compliance are tested on the TALOS robot from PAL Robotics both in simulation and on hardware, verifying the expected compliant and energy-limiting behaviour of the controller.

</details>


### [618] [A passive universal grasping mechanism based on an everting shell](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00470)
*Mythra V. S. Balakuntala,Safvan Palathingal,G. K. Ananthasuresh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 一种基于弹性双稳态壳翻转的被动式整体柔顺抓取机构，能够抓取任意形状的刚性物体，通过壳的翻转使抓取臂包裹物体形成封闭空间，直到再次驱动时释放物体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计一种无需复杂控制系统的被动抓取机构，能够自适应地抓取不同形状和大小的刚性物体，通过柔顺结构减少对物体的作用力。

Method: 采用双稳态弹性壳的翻转机制，结合梁段构成的抓取臂。当物体接触时，双稳态壳翻转，驱动抓取臂包裹物体形成封闭空间。抓取臂具有分布柔顺性，能够适应物体形状。

Result: 该机构能够抓取最大尺寸和重量的任意形状刚性物体。抓取臂的刚度决定有效载荷，尺寸决定最大可抓取物体。机构保持抓取状态直到再次驱动释放。

Conclusion: 这种基于双稳态壳翻转的被动柔顺抓取机构提供了一种简单有效的抓取解决方案，能够自适应不同形状物体，无需复杂控制系统，具有实际应用潜力。

Abstract: A passive monolithic compliant grasping mechanism that works based on the eversion of an elastically deformable bistable shell is conceptualized. It comprises grasping arms made of beam segments that work in conjunction with the everting shell. The grasper is capable of picking up a stiff object of any shape up to a maximum size and weight. The bistable shell everts upon contact with the object to enable the grasping arms envelop the object forming an enclosure. The mechanism then stays in that configuration until it is actuated again to turn the shell back to its original configuration and thereby opening the enclosure to release the object. The stiffness of the arms decides the payload of the mechanism. The size of the arms decides the largest object that can be grasped and held. The arms have distributed compliance so that they can conform to the shape of the object without applying undue force on it.

</details>


### [619] [PaCo-VLA: Passivity-Shielded Compliance Prior for Contact-Rich Vision-Language-Action Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00515)
*Haofan Cao,Zhaoyang Li,Zhichao You,Liang Guo,Tianrui Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PaCo-VLA：一种被动屏蔽的合规性先验框架，将视觉语言动作模型输出作为任务级合规性建议，通过高频被动屏蔽确保接触丰富操作的安全性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触丰富的操作需要高级语义推理和高频接触动力学的安全调节。虽然视觉语言动作模型提供了前所未有的语义泛化能力，但其低速率输出缺乏力敏感任务所需的可靠性，存在语义到控制的差距。

Method: 引入PaCo-VLA框架，将VLA输出视为任务级合规性建议（语义绑定、任务阶段和导纳调度），通过高频被动屏蔽（能量罐记账和边界检查）来管理这些建议，防止无效、过时或未验证的模型预测绕过底层接触物理。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界的连接器插入实验中，PaCo-VLA相比未屏蔽的VLA基线实现了更高的精度，即使在对抗性合规性变化下也能保持零被动违规，在导纳端口建立了可证明的采样被动运行时契约。

Conclusion: PaCo-VLA框架为在接触丰富领域部署基础模型提供了一个运行时接口，通过解耦架构实现了语义贡献与几何捷径的因果评估，确保了安全可靠的接触操作。

Abstract: Contact-rich manipulation demands both high-level semantic reasoning and the safe regulation of high-frequency contact dynamics. While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide unprecedented semantic generalization, their low-rate outputs lack the reliability required for direct plant authority in force-sensitive tasks. To bridge this semantic-to-control gap, we introduce PaCo-VLA, a passivity-shielded compliance prior that recasts the VLA interface. Rather than trusting VLAs with direct motor commands, PaCo-VLA treats network outputs as task-level compliance proposals: semantic bindings, task stages, and admittance schedules. A high-frequency, proposal-independent passivity shield governs these proposals through energy-tank accounting and boundary checks, preventing invalid, stale, or unverified model predictions from bypassing low-level contact physics. This decoupled architecture also enables causal evaluation, isolating semantic contributions from geometric shortcuts. Extensive simulated and real-world connector-insertion experiments demonstrate that PaCo-VLA achieves superior precision over unshielded VLA baselines, sustaining zero passivity violations even under adversarial compliance shifts. This framework establishes a provably sampled-passive runtime contract at the admittance port and provides a runtime interface for deploying foundation models in contact-rich domains.

</details>


### [620] [DriveAnchor: Progressive Anchor-based Flow Learning for Autonomous Driving Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00519)
*Limin Yan,Haoyun Tang,Yutao Qiu,Hongqing Liu,Haoyu Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DriveAnchor是一个三阶段自动驾驶规划框架，通过词汇化轨迹形状、能量场引导和强化学习微调，实现了行为多样性、可控性和安全性，推理时间仅2.06毫秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动驾驶规划方法在行为多样性、可控性和安全性方面存在不足。DriveAnchor旨在通过结构化管道解决这些问题，实现可组合的规划系统。

Method: 三阶段框架：1) 演示流预训练：使用最远点采样构建2398个轨迹形状的词汇表，替代非结构化高斯先验；2) 引导流后训练：联合训练能量场模块与流匹配，仅基于静态道路几何将锚点重定位到用户指定的走廊多边形；3) 奖励精炼流微调：应用零阶强化学习，将每个锚点输出与避碰目标对齐，在锚点空间进行方向搜索。

Result: 在200万个保留驾驶场景上评估，近距碰撞率降低89%，平均奖励提高32%，模仿精度无下降。在NVIDIA Drive Orin上推理时间2.06毫秒。已通过真实车辆测试验证，适合生产部署。

Conclusion: DriveAnchor通过三阶段可组合管道，在保持模仿精度的同时显著提升了安全性和奖励性能，实现了行为多样性、可控性和安全性的平衡，为自动驾驶规划提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We present DriveAnchor, a three-stage framework for autonomous driving planning that achieves behavioral diversity, controllability, and safety in a composable pipeline. Demonstration Flow Pretraining replaces the unstructured Gaussian prior with a vocabulary of 2,398 trajectory shapes constructed by farthest-point sampling, structurally grounding behavioral diversity in vocabulary coverage. Guided Flow Post-training jointly post-trains an Energy Field module with flow matching (FM), conditioning the Energy Field on static road geometry alone, to relocate anchors toward user-specified corridor polygons before flow generation, adding controllability without differentiable guidance; after Stage 2, new corridor presets require only Energy Field updates, not FM retraining. Reward-Refined Flow Fine-tuning applies zeroth-order reinforcement learning to align each anchor's output with collision-avoidance objectives: because the flow-matching model is a deterministic feedforward network in single-step mode, each anchor uniquely determines the output trajectory, reducing reward optimization to a direction search in anchor space without log-likelihood computation or ODE-to-SDE conversion. Evaluated on approximately 2 million held-out driving scenarios, DriveAnchor reduces near-range collision rates by 89% and improves mean reward by 32% without degradation in imitation accuracy, with 2.06 ms inference on NVIDIA Drive Orin. DriveAnchor has been validated through real-world vehicle testing, confirming its practicality for production deployment.

</details>


### [621] [PACE: Phase-Aware Chunk Execution for Robot Policies with Action Chunking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00537)
*Junnan Nie,Jiayi Li,Jiachen Zhang,Junyi Lao,Chenghao Liu,Tianle Zhang,Songfang Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PACE（Phase-Aware Chunk Execution）是一种训练无关的测试时执行方法，通过分析预测动作块的相位信息动态选择执行时域，提高机器人任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作和基于扩散的机器人策略通常使用动作分块（action chunking），但部署时需要选择执行时域（execution horizon）。实验表明成功率与执行时域呈任务依赖和非单调关系，固定的执行时域不可靠。

Method: PACE从预测的动作块本身在线选择执行时域，利用操作轨迹的相位相关运动结构，通过识别预测速度曲线中的低速过渡点作为重新规划边界。该方法无需重新训练或访问策略内部，即插即用。

Result: 在50个RoboTwin2.0任务中，PACE将平均成功率从57.8%提升至64.2%。在真实机器人实验中，ALOHA和Franka平台的任务得分从60.7提升至77.7，成功率从50.7%提升至70.4%。

Conclusion: PACE能够自适应调整不同操作阶段的执行时域，在过渡阶段缩短执行时域，在连贯运动时保持较长执行，显著提高机器人任务执行性能。

Abstract: Recent vision-language-action and diffusion-based robot policies often use action chunking, where each policy query predicts a sequence of future actions and the robot executes an open-loop prefix before re-querying. While this interface improves local motion continuity, deployment still requires choosing the execution horizon: how much of each predicted chunk should be executed before acquiring a new observation. However, our experiments show that success is strongly task-dependent and non-monotonic with respect to the execution horizon, making a single constant horizon an unreliable deployment rule. We propose PACE (Phase-Aware Chunk Execution), a training-free test-time execution method that selects the execution horizon online from the predicted chunk itself. PACE exploits the phase-dependent kinematic structure of manipulation trajectories by identifying low-speed transition points in the predicted speed profile and using them as candidate replanning boundaries. Because PACE uses only the predicted action chunk, it is plug-and-play and requires no retraining or access to policy internals. We validate PACE through large-scale evaluations in both simulation and real-robot settings. On 50 RoboTwin2.0 tasks, PACE raises the average success rate from 57.8% to 64.2%. In real-robot experiments on bimanual ALOHA and single-arm Franka platforms, PACE improves the average task score from 60.7 to 77.7 and the average success rate from 50.7% to 70.4%. Ablations and rollout-level analyses show that PACE adapts execution horizons across manipulation phases, shortening near transitions while preserving longer execution during coherent motion.

</details>


### [622] [Dynamic Resilient Spatio-Semantic Memory with Hybrid Localization for Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00576)
*Zhijie Yan,Shufei Li,Ze Zhang,Xin Liu,Yuhang Zheng,Zuoxu Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DREAM是一个实时机器人移动操作框架，在未知动态室内环境中构建在线时空语义体素记忆，通过姿态图感知的内存剪枝保持长期观测历史有界，结合语言条件3D检索和多模态语义验证，显著提高长期任务成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统依赖预建地图、静态场景假设或高精度相机姿态，在目标物体移动或姿态估计修正时会导致场景信息过时或错位，需要一种在动态环境中保持几何一致、语义可查询且计算有界的场景表示方法

Method: 集成激光雷达-惯性-视觉SLAM后端，构建在线时空语义体素记忆；引入姿态图感知的冗余感知内存剪枝(RMP)在姿态修正后更新历史观测；结合语言条件3D检索、开放词汇图像检测和多模态大语言模型语义验证进行目标定位和重获取

Result: 在四个动态室内实验室场景的实机实验中，将长期任务成功率从DynaMem的40%-60%提高到55%-70%，同时保持内存占用0.37-0.63GB，在线内存更新时间0.43-0.53秒

Conclusion: DREAM框架能够在未知动态室内环境中实现可靠的移动操作，通过在线时空语义记忆和智能内存管理，显著提高了长期任务的成功率，同时保持了计算效率

Abstract: Reliable mobile manipulation in dynamic indoor environments requires a scene representation that remains geometrically consistent, semantically queryable, and computationally bounded as the environment changes. Existing systems often rely on pre-built maps, static-scene assumptions, or highly accurate camera poses, which can lead to stale or misaligned scene information when target objects are relocated or pose estimates are corrected. This paper presents DREAM, a real-robot mobile manipulation framework that integrates perception, memory, localization, navigation, and manipulation in previously unseen indoor environments without a pre-built map. DREAM constructs an online spatio-semantic voxel memory from RGB-D observations registered by a LiDAR-inertial-visual SLAM backend. It further introduces pose-graph-aware Redundancy-Aware Memory Pruning (RMP) to update historical observations after pose corrections while keeping long-horizon observation history bounded. For target localization and reacquisition, DREAM combines language-conditioned 3D retrieval, open-vocabulary image detection, and multimodal large language model based semantic verification.
