Real-robot experiments in four dynamic indoor laboratory scenes show that DREAM improves long-horizon task success rates from 40%-60% with DynaMem to 55%-70%, while maintaining a memory footprint of 0.37-0.63 GB and an online memory-update time of 0.43-0.53 s across scenes.

</details>


### [623] [Global-Local Attention Decomposition for Terrain Encoding in Humanoid Perceptive Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00637)
*Shengcheng Fu,Yang Zhang,Zhanxiang Cao,Liyun Yan,Yizhi Chen,Yunpeng Yin,Yue Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GLAD（全局-局部注意力分解）是一种用于人形机器人地形感知的编码方法，通过分离全局地形上下文和局部立足点几何信息，在稀疏立足点地形上实现可靠运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有感知策略在稀疏立足点地形和受限环境中表现不佳，传统编码器往往将地形感知和立足点选择两个感知任务纠缠在一起，导致性能受限。

Method: 提出GLAD方法，通过基于机器人中心高程图的粗细编码器实现：全局注意力分支使用注意力池化总结周围地形上下文，状态条件局部注意力分支稀疏化并编码精确的立足点相关几何信息。

Result: GLAD在挑战性间隙、踏脚石和楼梯等场景中实现可靠运动，学习到的策略展现出地形响应行为，能够自主跟随狭窄路径和避开障碍。在Unitree G1人形机器人上使用车载LiDAR实现零样本仿真到现实迁移。

Conclusion: GLAD通过显式注意力分解有效分离地形感知和立足点选择任务，防止细粒度空间线索稀释并减少训练开销，在稀疏立足点和障碍丰富领域实现鲁棒的零样本仿真到现实迁移。

Abstract: Although reinforcement learning has significantly advanced humanoid locomotion, perceptive policies still struggle on sparse-foothold terrain and constrained environments. Success in these scenarios requires both broad terrain awareness and precise foothold selection, two perceptual roles that conventional encoders often entangle. To address this challenge, we propose Global-Local Attention Decomposition (GLAD) for terrain encoding in humanoid locomotion. Realized by a coarse-to-fine encoder over a robot-centric elevation map, GLAD explicitly separates these objectives: a global attention branch utilizes attention pooling to summarize the surrounding terrain context, while a state-conditioned local attention branch sparsifies and encodes precise foothold-relevant geometry. This explicit attention decomposition prevents the dilution of fine-grained spatial cues while reducing training overhead. Experiments demonstrate that GLAD enables reliable locomotion over challenging gaps, stepping stones, and stairs. Furthermore, the learned policy exhibits emergent terrain-responsive behaviors, autonomously following narrow paths and avoiding obstacles under simple velocity commands without explicit navigation planners. In real-world deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot using onboard LiDAR, the proposed method achieves robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer across diverse sparse-foothold and obstacle-rich domains.

</details>


### [624] [SKIP: Sparse Keyframe Interpolation Paradigm for Efficient Embodied World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00664)
*Ziheng He,Yixiang Chen,Ning Yang,Zhanqian Wu,Qisen Ma,Yuan Xu,Jiabing Yang,Peiyan Li,Xiangnan Wu,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Jing Liu,Nianfeng Liu,Yan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SKIP提出稀疏关键帧插值范式，通过识别任务相关关键帧并插值生成中间帧，大幅提升机器人世界模型推理效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人世界模型需要在像素空间逐帧生成，计算成本高，但直接丢弃帧会丢失关键任务事件（如接触、抓取等），影响下游策略学习

Method: SKIP框架：1) 利用机器人感知多模态特征识别任务相关关键帧；2) 用稀疏视频扩散模型生成关键帧；3) 通过学习的间隙预测器和动作条件插值器重建缺失帧

Result: 在LIBERO上，SKIP生成密集rollout比密集基线快4.16倍，视觉保真度提升，FVD降低89.0%。生成的视频作为策略训练数据有效，仅替换真实演示时成功率下降很小

Conclusion: SKIP通过稀疏关键帧插值范式，在保持任务相关事件的同时大幅提升世界模型推理效率，为机器人视频生成提供了高效解决方案

Abstract: Embodied world models have emerged as a promising paradigm in robotics by predicting how robot actions affect the surrounding scene. However, the rollout inference remains computationally expensive in pixel space, as long-horizon manipulation videos typically have to be generated frame by frame. This cost cannot be easily reduced by indiscriminately dropping frames, since downstream policies rely on complete preservation of sparse task-relevant events such as approach, contact, grasp, and release. To address this challenge, we propose Sparse Keyframe Interpolation Paradigm (SKIP), an event-preserving sparse-to-dense framework that avoids dense frame-by-frame generation. SKIP first identifies task-relevant keyframes by leveraging robot-aware multimodal features. It then synthesizes only these keyframes with a sparse video diffusion model. A learned gap predictor and an action-conditioned interpolator subsequently reconstruct the missing intervals according to the robot actions. On LIBERO, SKIP generates dense rollouts $4.16\times$ faster than a dense baseline while improving visual fidelity and reducing aggregate FVD by $89.0\%$. Importantly, SKIP-generated videos are effective policy-training data. Even when they fully replace real demonstrations, $π_{0.5}$ success drops only $1.3$ pp in LIBERO simulation and $6.7$ pp on the real robot, whereas fully dense frame-by-frame generation collapses by $48$ to $58$ pp.

</details>


### [625] [Shape Your Body: Value Gradients for Multi-Embodiment Robot Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00702)
*Nico Bohlinger,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将通用多体值函数转化为可重用的机器人设计模型，通过冻结值函数作为可微代理优化候选机器人构型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 避免为每个机器人重新运行强化学习协同设计循环，通过预训练的多体值函数实现机器人设计的快速优化和分析

Method: 首先在多个机器人设计上训练体态感知的策略和值函数，然后使用冻结的值函数作为可微代理，通过值梯度优化候选机器人构型

Result: 在多种机器人设计场景中验证有效，包括扰动单机器人、跨形态类别的未见机器人，单模型最多在50个机器人上训练，设计空间超过1100个连续体态参数

Conclusion: 值梯度不仅能优化完整机器人构型，还能识别性能限制的设计和控制参数，实现新机器人设计的优化和分析

Abstract: We propose to turn generalist multi-embodiment value functions into reusable models for robot design. Instead of running a new reinforcement learning co-design loop for each robot, we first train an embodiment-aware policy and value function across many robot designs. After training, the frozen value function is used as a differentiable surrogate to optimize candidate embodiments through value gradients. We evaluate our approach across different robot design settings, from perturbed single robots to held-out robots across morphology classes, with single models trained on up to 50 robots and design spaces of over 1100 continuous embodiment parameters. Beyond optimizing complete embodiments, we show that value gradients can identify performance-limiting design and control parameters, enabling both the optimization and the analysis of new robot designs.

</details>


### [626] [BEVIO: Efficient Bird's-Eye-View based Sparse-Update Visual-Inertial Odometry for Lunar Day-Night Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00709)
*Mohit Singh,Shehryar Khattak,Ashish Goel,Michael Paton,Kostas Alexis,Issa A. Nesnas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BEVIO：一种基于鸟瞰图的视觉惯性里程计，能在极低视觉更新频率（0.25Hz）下实现可靠的月球车昼夜自主导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行星探测车在极端资源限制下运行时，视觉更新频率极低，传统VIO性能受限。特别是在昼夜光照变化大、特征匹配困难的自照明条件下，需要更鲁棒的视觉惯性里程计方案。

Method: 提出基于鸟瞰图（BEV）的图像匹配方案，该方案对大帧间运动具有更强的鲁棒性，在显著视觉外观变化下仍能实现可靠的特征匹配。

Result: 在加州Plaster City进行的长期昼夜部署实验中，使用半尺寸月球车进行高保真真实感和实时机器人实验验证。方法能在0.25Hz极低视觉更新率下实现可靠的昼夜自照明穿越。

Conclusion: BEVIO方法特别适合计算和功率受限的月球车导航，为极端资源环境下的可靠视觉惯性里程计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) provides smooth, high-rate state estimates and has been widely used for robotic navigation in both terrestrial and planetary applications. However, its performance is typically dependent on the frequency of visual updates, which is a challenge for planetary rovers operating under extreme resource constraints and low frame rates. This work investigates enabling reliable VIO with very sparse visual updates for lunar rover applications, addressing both day and night-time operations where feature associations become especially difficult under self-illumination conditions. We propose a Bird's Eye View (BEV)-based image matching scheme that remains robust to larger inter-frame motions and more reliable feature matching despite significant visual appearance changes. We extensively evaluate our proposed approach, BEVIO, through high-fidelity photorealistic lunar and real-time robotic experiments conducted using a half-scale lunar rover, in a long-term day-night deployment at Plaster City, CA, USA. The results demonstrate that our method enables reliable day and nighttime self-illuminated traverses at visual update rates as low as 0.25 Hz, underscoring its suitability for navigation on power- and compute-limited lunar rovers.

</details>


### [627] [Infeasible optimization problems and the hierarchical augmented Lagrangian method in imitation learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00730)
*Roland Andrews,Justin Carpentier,Ajay Sathya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文针对模仿学习中硬约束可能导致不可行的问题，提出基于增广拉格朗日方法的改进方案，确保学习策略趋近于最接近可行解，并在驾驶场景中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习在机器人策略训练中很有效，但最近工作中引入的硬约束有时会导致优化问题不可行，从而引发训练不稳定或困难。作者旨在解决这种约束不可行的情况。

Method: 基于增广拉格朗日方法在不可行情况下的理论结果，提出一种简单改进方案。该方法驱动学习策略趋近于最接近可行的约束模仿学习问题的解。

Result: 在具有总加速度约束和行人安全约束的玩具驾驶示例中验证了方法的有效性。该场景中自然会出现不可行性，但方法仍能学习到安全策略。

Conclusion: 提出的增广拉格朗日方法改进方案能有效处理模仿学习中的约束不可行问题，确保学习策略具有期望的安全性和稳定性特性。

Abstract: Imitation learning (IL) is an effective approach to train complex robotics policies. Recent works have introduced hard constraints into imitation-learning optimization problems to ensure safety, stability, and robustness of the learned policy. However, we argue that these constraints are sometimes infeasible, which can lead to unstable or difficult training dynamics. We study a simple remedy for such situations based on recent theoretical results on the augmented Lagrangian method in infeasible settings. We show that our approach drives the learned policy toward the solution of a closest-feasible constrained IL problem with desirable properties. The method is illustrated on a toy driving example with a total-acceleration constraint and pedestrian-safety constraints, a setting in which infeasibility can naturally arise while still allowing a safe learned policy.

</details>


### [628] [Beyond Pure Sampling: Hybrid Optimization Mechanisms for Non-Convex Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00737)
*Yuichiro Aoyama,Minchan Jung,Akash Ratheesh,Evangelos A. Theodorou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了基于最大熵差分动态规划(ME-DDP)的非凸模型预测控制优化框架，通过结合梯度利用和基于逆Hessian矩阵采样的双重优化机制，有效避免局部最优解，在机器人导航任务中展现出优于传统方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人导航中非线性动力学、多障碍物等导致的非凸成本景观使得基于梯度的方法容易陷入局部最优解，这是机器人学中的一个基本挑战。

Method: 提出ME-DDP框架，包含双重优化机制：(1)使用DDP利用成本景观梯度；(2)通过从动作价值函数逆Hessian特征的政策中采样来破坏优化过程。研究了三种ME-DDP变体：单峰高斯、多峰高斯和Stein变分DDP。

Result: 在低维系统中，ME-DDP框架一致优于MPPI；在高维系统中，MPPI偶尔能发现更激进的机动，但ME-DDP方法保持更高、更稳定的成功率。硬件实验验证了框架在四旋翼飞行器密集非凸障碍场导航中的实际效果。

Conclusion: ME-DDP框架通过结合确定性优化和采样策略，有效解决了非凸MPC优化问题，在复杂环境中展现出鲁棒性能，适合实际机器人部署。

Abstract: This paper investigates the optimization mechanisms of non-convex Model Predictive Control (MPC) using the Maximum Entropy Differential Dynamic Programming (ME-DDP) framework. Navigating non-convex cost landscapes induced by nonlinear dynamics, multiple obstacles, etc. remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, where gradient-based methods frequently converge to suboptimal local minima. We demonstrate a dual-step optimization mechanism designed to overcome these traps. (1) an initial phase of using DDP to exploit the gradient of the cost landscape, followed by (2) disruption of the optimization via sampling from policies characterized by the inverse Hessian of the action-value function. We provide a rigorous analysis of this sampling mechanism of three ME-DDP variants: Unimodal Gaussian ME-DDP, Multimodal Gaussian ME-DDP, and Stein Variational DDP. Furthermore, with navigation tasks of four robotic systems under cluttered environments, we conduct extensive benchmarking of three variants of the ME-DDP, against deterministic DDP, and one of the most successful sampling-based schemes, Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control with three policy parameterizations and update laws that correspond to those of ME-DDPs.
  The results show that in low-dimensional systems where the cost landscapes are relatively simple and local information is sufficiently representative, our framework consistently outperforms MPPIs. In high-dimensional systems, MPPI can occasionally discover aggressive maneuvers that enable it to steer the systems faster than DDP-based methods, whereas our method maintains a higher, more stable success rate.
  Finally, we validate the practical efficacy of the framework through hardware experiments with a quadrotor navigating a dense, non-convex obstacle field, confirming the robustness of the proposed framework for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [629] [STEM: Semantic Target Search and Exploration using MAVs in Cluttered Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00762)
*Nikhil Sethi,Max Lodel,Laura Ferranti,Robert Babuška,Javier Alonso-Mora*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用语义引导的视点规划器来最小化无人机在非结构化3D环境中目标搜索和探索时间的新框架，通过主动感知管道传播语义优先级，并使用LLM相似性评分作为语义优先级输入


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么专注于结构化环境中的2D语义导航（在复杂3D环境中效果不佳），要么专注于杂乱空间中的机器人探索（缺乏高效目标搜索所需的语义推理），需要克服这些限制

Method: 开发了组合规划器生成高效语义探索计划，优先选择可能发现目标的视点；开发主动感知管道将观察对象的语义优先级传播到相邻边界体素中，计算边界视点的语义信息增益；利用基于LLM的相似性评分作为语义优先级输入

Result: 在两个不同的模拟环境中的评估表明，该方法始终优于基线方法，能快速找到目标同时保持合理的探索时间；真实世界无人机实验展示了该方法处理实际约束的能力，如有限电池寿命、小传感器范围和语义不确定性

Conclusion: 该框架成功克服了现有方法的局限性，通过语义引导的视点规划在非结构化3D环境中实现了高效的目标搜索，在实际约束条件下表现出良好的性能

Abstract: Autonomous target search is crucial for deploying Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) in emergency response and rescue missions. Existing approaches either focus on 2D semantic navigation in structured environments -- which is less effective in complex 3D settings, or on robotic exploration in cluttered spaces -- which often lacks the semantic reasoning needed for efficient target search. This paper overcomes these limitations by proposing a novel framework that utilizes a semantically-guided viewpoint planner to minimize target search and exploration time in unstructured 3D environments using an MAV. Specifically, we develop a combinatorial planner that generates efficient semantic exploration plans by prioritizing viewpoints that likely lead to the target. To guide the planner towards the target, an active perception pipeline is developed that propagates semantic priorities of observed objects into neighboring frontier voxels for computing semantic information gains of frontier viewpoints. In addition, we demonstrate how LLM-based similarity scores can be leveraged as semantic priority input to our pipeline. Evaluations in two distinct simulation environments show that the proposed method consistently outperforms baselines by quickly finding the target while maintaining reasonable exploration times. Real-world experiments with an MAV further demonstrate the method's ability to handle practical constraints like limited battery life, small sensor range, and semantic uncertainty.

</details>


### [630] [SafeVLA-Bench: A Benchmark for the Success-Safety Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00773)
*Jialiang Fan,Weizhe Xu,Oleg Sokolsky,Insup Lee,Fanxin Kong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SafeVLA-Bench是一个后置安全评估框架，用于评估现有视觉语言动作基准中的安全性能，发现高任务成功率并不代表安全执行，存在大量成功但不安全的情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA基准仅测量任务是否完成，但二进制成功指标会隐藏安全相关的轨迹行为，如过度接触、干扰旁观物体、不稳定抓持或机器人自接触等问题。

Method: 提出SafeVLA-Bench框架，将任务感知安全要求形式化为信号时序逻辑规范，并报告原生成功率与两个不安全成功指标：Succ-But-Unsafe（成功但违反安全的比例）和Violation Severity Index（有界最坏违规深度评分）。

Result: 在LIBERO和RoboCasa-365基准上评估9个策略，发现高任务成功率不意味着安全执行：高成功率桌面基准仍有13-15%的不安全事件率，RoboCasa-365中36-56%的成功轨迹至少违反一个安全条款。

Conclusion: 需要超越二进制成功指标来评估VLA策略的安全性，SafeVLA-Bench提供了系统化的安全评估框架，揭示了现有策略在安全执行方面的不足。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) benchmarks measure whether a policy completes a requested manipulation task, but binary success can hide safety-relevant trajectory behavior: reaching the goal while applying excessive contact, disturbing bystander objects, destabilizing the held object, or entering robot self-contact. We present SafeVLA-Bench, a post-hoc safety-evaluation framework for existing simulator-based VLA benchmarks. It formalizes task-aware safety requirements as Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications and reports native success with two unsafe-success metrics: Succ-But-Unsafe (SBU), the fraction of rollouts that both succeed and violate safety, and Violation Severity Index (VSI), a bounded worst-violation depth score. We instantiate SafeVLA-Bench on LIBERO and RoboCasa-365, evaluating nine policy-benchmark entries across tabletop and kitchen manipulation tasks. High task success does not imply safe execution: high-SR tabletop baselines still leave 13 to 15 percent unsafe-episode rates,and 36 to 56 percent of successful RoboCasa-365 rollouts violate at least one active safety clause. Project page: https://safevla.org.

</details>


### [631] [Coarse-to-Fine Compositional Diffusion for Long-Horizon Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00837)
*Byoungwoo Park,Utkarsh A. Mishra,Jaemoo Choi,Juho Lee,Yongxin Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CoFi提出了一种从粗到细的组合扩散方法，通过分离全局结构形成和局部细节优化，在长时程生成任务中提高全局一致性和局部质量，同时减少计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组合生成方法主要依赖局部一致性，但局部兼容的计划仍可能形成不合理的全局结构。现有改进方法计算成本高，难以扩展到大规模或高维度的局部计划。

Method: CoFi采用从粗到细的推理时间采样器：首先将局部去噪估计对齐到共享的粗粒度结构，形成全局骨架；然后将骨架扩散到中间噪声水平，再用预训练的局部先验去噪，恢复局部细节同时保持全局一致性。

Result: 在长时程机器人规划、全景图像生成和长视频生成任务中，CoFi相比现有组合基线方法，不仅提高了全局一致性和局部样本质量，还减少了2-8倍的去噪器评估次数。

Conclusion: CoFi通过分离全局结构形成和局部细节优化，有效解决了组合生成中的全局一致性问题，同时显著降低了计算成本，为大规模结构化数据生成提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion models provide strong priors for generating structured data, but many tasks require outputs beyond the scale on which these models are typically trained. Compositional generation addresses this by composing overlapping local plans from a pretrained short-horizon prior into a long-horizon output. However, standard composition primarily enforces agreement between neighboring local plans, yielding local consistency without directly specifying the global structure of the full composition. As a result, locally compatible plans may still form an implausible route, task sequence, or temporal evolution. Existing methods improve global coherence by repeatedly propagating local consistency signals or by adding inference-time optimization, but these procedures become expensive as the number or dimensionality of local plans increases. We propose Coarse-to-Fine Compositional Diffusion (CoFi), an inference-time sampler that separates global structure formation from local detail refinement. CoFi first aligns local denoised estimates around a shared coarse structure, producing a global scaffold that captures the long-range task-level arrangement. It then diffuses this scaffold to an intermediate noise level and denoises it with the same pretrained local prior, restoring local fine structure while preserving the scaffold-induced global coherence. Across long-horizon robotic planning, panoramic image generation, and long video generation, CoFi not only improves both global coherence and local sample quality over prior compositional baselines, but also requires 2-8x fewer denoiser evaluations.

</details>


### [632] [From Cues to Horizons: Dynamic Risk Horizon Profiling for Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00857)
*Xinyi Ning,Zilin Bian,Dachuan Zuo,Semiha Ergan,Kaan Ozbay*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种风险水平剖面（RHP）模块，用于风险感知的车辆轨迹预测，通过连续可学习的势场模型量化未来风险分布，在高速公路和城市道路数据集上均显著提升了预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险感知轨迹预测方法大多仅将历史风险信息作为辅助信号，忽略了风险的未来演变和不确定性。需要一种能够量化未来风险分布的方法来提升预测的准确性和可靠性。

Method: 提出风险水平剖面（RHP）模块，采用连续可学习的势场模型计算周围物体在时空上的接近程度，从而描绘未来各个时间水平上的风险分布。该模块能够自适应识别人类驾驶员感知的关键时刻，以支持更好的轨迹预测。

Result: 在高速公路数据集highD上，5秒RMSE降低了25.0%；在城市道路数据集SHRP2上，5秒minFDE降低了29.1%。结果表明该方法在短时和长时预测上均有优异表现，且在高速公路和城市场景中具有良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: RHP模块能够实现更真实的自驾车路径规划和策略选择，从而支持更安全的自动驾驶和更先进的驾驶辅助系统。该方法在风险感知轨迹预测方面取得了显著改进。

Abstract: Accurate and reliable vehicle trajectory prediction is essential for safe autonomous driving. Recent studies have incorporated safety risk into trajectory prediction to quantify dangers posed by surrounding agents. However, most risk-aware approaches use past risk information as a secondary signal to help guide decisions, overlooking its future evolution and uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a risk horizon profiling (RHP) module that incorporates a continuous, learnable potential field model for risk-aware trajectory prediction. The RHP module calculates the spatial-temporal proximity of surrounding objects to profile risk distributions across future horizons, which supports better trajectory prediction by adaptively identifying what human drivers perceive as critical moments. We evaluate our method on two datasets from different driving settings, highD for highway corridors and SHRP2 for urban streets, which cover diverse risk scenarios including safe, near-crash, and crash events. Compared to the baseline methods, our framework achieves a 25.0\% reduction in 5s RMSE on the highD dataset and a 29.1\% reduction in 5s minFDE on SHRP2. These results indicate strong performance for both short and long horizon prediction and robust generalization across highway and urban scenarios. The proposed method enables more realistic AV path planning and strategic selection, thereby supporting safer autonomous driving and more advanced driver-assistance systems. The source code for this work is available at: https://github.com/bilab-nyu/RHP

</details>


### [633] [Generative Multi-Robot Motion Planning via Diffusion Modeling with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00933)
*Suk Ki Lee,Venkata Sai Deepak Mutta,Hyunwoong Ko*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 多机器人协调运动规划框架：结合去中心化扩散模型生成轨迹与多智能体强化学习价值引导，通过梯度引导减少机器人间冲突


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在共享环境中协调多个机器人需要生成可行的轨迹并考虑智能体间的交互。集中式规划难以扩展，而去中心化方法无法有效处理智能体间的交互。

Method: 1) 每个机器人使用在单智能体运动数据上训练的扩散模型独立生成候选轨迹；2) 通过多智能体强化学习训练的集中式价值函数，采用基于梯度的引导（指数倾斜公式）来调整去噪过程，使轨迹偏向多智能体回报更高的方向

Result: 在模拟迷宫环境中，四个移动机器人的实验结果显示，提出的价值引导扩散规划将智能体间干扰率从55.4%降低到41.8%，表明可以在保持去中心化轨迹生成可扩展性的同时实现有效协调

Conclusion: 多智能体强化学习价值引导可以有效地将协调引入去中心化生成规划器中，无需完全联合的多机器人模型，同时保持了去中心化方法的可扩展性优势

Abstract: Coordinating multiple robots in shared environments requires generating feasible trajectories for each agent while accounting for interactions among agents. Centralized planning approaches become difficult to scale as the number of robots increases, while decentralized approaches that allow each agent to plan independently do not inherently account for inter-agent interactions. This paper presents a framework for coordinated multi-robot motion planning that combines decentralized generative trajectory planning with multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL)-based coordination. Each robot independently generates candidate trajectories using a diffusion model trained on single-agent motion data, leveraging the generative model's ability to produce feasible and diverse trajectories. To reduce conflicts between agents, a centralized value function trained via MARL guides the reverse diffusion process through gradient-based steering, enabling interaction-aware trajectory generation without centralized joint planning or retraining of the generative model. This guidance follows an exponential tilting formulation, in which the value function biases the denoising distribution toward trajectories with higher expected multi-agent return. The framework is evaluated in a simulated maze environment with four mobile robots. Experimental results show that the proposed value-guided diffusion planning reduces the inter-agent interference rate from 55.4% to 41.8%, demonstrating that coordination can be effectively achieved while preserving the scalability of decentralized trajectory generation. These results suggest that MARL-based value guidance can effectively introduce coordination into decentralized generative planners without requiring a fully joint multi-robot model.

</details>


### [634] [Threading Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Model Inference in Low-Cost Smart Agricultural Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00966)
*Keith Truongcao,Christopher Nhu,Zijian An,Phong Nguyen,Siwei Cai,Lifeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出针对低成本机器人系统的RTAC完整系统级实现，通过优化线程架构提升VLA模型的实时控制性能，在农业产品操作任务中验证了控制稳定性和速度的显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型面临推理速度慢、难以进行精细运动调整的挑战，限制了工业应用。虽然RTAC算法理论上能解决这些问题，但将其从伪代码转化为稳定、低成本的机器人部署仍存在困难。

Method: 开发了针对低成本机器人操作系统的完整RTAC系统级实现，优化了策略推理和控制管道的线程实现，降低端到端延迟并提升响应性，同时保持底层策略不变。

Result: 在蒜头和核桃等农产品操作任务中，实验结果表明自定义线程实现相比RTAC基础实现显著提升了控制稳定性和速度。

Conclusion: 通过系统级优化实现了RTAC在低成本机器人上的稳定部署，为解决VLA模型实时控制瓶颈提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Action (VLA) models continue to face challenges such as slow inference speed and difficulty performing fine-grained motion adjustments, limiting their widespread adoption in industry. While the Real-Time Action Chunking (RTAC) algorithm has been proposed to address these bottlenecks, bridging the gap between the algorithm provided in pseudocode to a stable, real-world deployment on a low-cost robotic arm remains a challenge. In this work, we present a complete system-level implementation of RTAC tailored for a low-cost robotic manipulation system. We advance beyond the original high-level pseudocode by optimizing the threading implementation for the policy inference and control pipeline, reducing end-to-end latency and improving responsiveness without modifying the underlying policy. We evaluate this system on tasks involving the manipulation of agricultural produce, specifically garlic bulbs and walnuts. Experimental results demonstrate that our custom threading implementation significantly improves control stability and speed compared to the base implementation of RTAC.

</details>


### [635] [Make Your VLA More Robust Without More Data By Interleaving Motion Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00985)
*Dan BW Choe,Sundhar Vinodh Sangeetha,Samuel Coogan,Shreyas Kousik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MPVI框架通过将基于模型的运动规划与VLA模型结合，无需额外训练即可显著提升移动操作任务的长时程鲁棒性，在BEHAVIOR-1K基准测试中任务进度提升113%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型在长时程移动操作任务中表现不佳，主要面临两个挑战：1) 需要在整个空间分布的子任务序列中保持对高层目标的进展；2) 早期执行错误会在任务时间范围内快速累积。尽管已有大量人类遥操作数据进行微调，但仅靠更多数据无法解决这些问题。

Method: 提出MPVI框架：Motion Planner / VLA Interleaving，通过模型驱动的运动规划与VLA模型交替工作来提高鲁棒性。该框架利用开放词汇对象检测、前沿探索和运动规划来定位和导航到远处或被遮挡的目标物体。关键创新是可靠的模块切换机制，通过基于VLM的完成检查和本体感受触发器实现。

Result: 在BEHAVIOR-1K基准测试中，MPVI框架相比顶级的端到端VLA基线实现了113%的任务进度提升，显著改善了长时程移动操作任务的性能。

Conclusion: MPVI框架成功展示了如何通过集成模型驱动的运动规划与VLA模型，无需额外训练即可显著提升移动操作任务的鲁棒性和性能，为解决长时程任务中的挑战提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown remarkable progress for mobile manipulation, but their performance on long-horizon tasks remains poor. These tasks are especially challenging because (1) progress toward high-level goals must be maintained across extended sequences of spatially distributed subtasks, and (2) early execution errors compound rapidly over the task horizon. These challenges persist despite finetuning on large human teleoperated mobile manipulation data, indicating that more data alone may not resolve the problem. To address these challenges, we propose MPVI: Motion Planner / VLA Interleaving, a framework that integrates model-based motion planning with VLAs to improve robustness without further training. The proposed integration enables localization and navigation to distant or occluded target objects through cluttered scenes using open-vocabulary object detection, frontier exploration and motion planning. However, such integration is non-trivial, requiring reliable switching between modules; we show one way forward via VLM-based completion checking with proprioceptive triggers. We evaluate our approach on the BEHAVIOR-1K benchmark and demonstrate 113% improvement in task progress over a top end-to-end VLA baseline. Additional details are available at the project page: https://mpvi.netlify.app/.

</details>


### [636] [OSCAR: Obstacle Survival Curves for Adaptive Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00990)
*Hshmat Sahak,Aoran Jiao,Nicholas Rhinehart,Tim Barfoot*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OSCAR是一个自适应生存建模框架，用于处理图导航中的临时障碍物阻塞问题。它通过学习障碍物类别的剩余清除时间分布，动态计算等待阈值，平衡等待与绕路的决策，在模拟和真实机器人实验中均表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人在已知路线图上导航时，遇到临时障碍物阻塞关键边时会产生昂贵的导航错误。标准反应式避障只处理局部运动，而固定的等待或绕路规则忽略了不同障碍物类型持续时间的差异。需要一种能够根据障碍物类型自适应决策的方法。

Method: OSCAR框架假设在遇到障碍物时可获得类别标签，机器人从在线经验中学习类别条件的剩余清除时间分布（包括右删失观测）。这些生存模型被集成到时间依赖的图规划器中，维护障碍物记忆并在每个阻塞边计算耐心阈值（等待多久再选择替代路线）。

Result: 在模拟中，学习策略的目标到达时间收敛到与使用真实清除分布的神谕策略相差1%以内，每个障碍物类别仅需少于20次观测。在真实世界部署中，策略在50个导航片段中持续在线改进，自适应调整耐心阈值。

Conclusion: OSCAR通过自适应生存建模有效解决了图导航中的临时障碍物问题，能够根据障碍物类型学习清除时间分布并优化等待与绕路的平衡决策，在模拟和真实环境中均验证了其有效性。

Abstract: A mobile robot following a graph of known routes can make costly navigation errors when a temporary obstacle blocks a critical edge: waiting too long behind a parked cart wastes time, but immediately rerouting around a person who would move in a few seconds is also inefficient. Standard reactive obstacle avoidance addresses local motion around obstacles, while fixed wait-or-reroute rules ignore how long different obstacle types tend to persist. We propose OSCAR: an adaptive survival-modeling framework for graph-based navigation with temporary blockages. Assuming obstacle class labels are available at encounter time, the robot learns class-conditioned residual clearance-time distributions from online experience, including right-censored observations when it reroutes before observing clearance. These survival models are integrated into a time-dependent graph planner that maintains obstacle memory and computes a patience threshold at each blocked edge: how long to wait before taking an alternate route. The method continuously updates its clearance estimates across episodes and uses them to balance waiting against rerouting. We evaluate the approach in simulation and on a real mobile robot in a university atrium with obstacles including people, chairs, bins, and tubes. In simulation, the learned policy's time-to-goal converges to within 1% of an oracle with access to ground-truth clearance distributions after fewer than 20 observations per obstacle class, outperforming all heuristic baselines. Real-world deployment confirms that the policy improves online, adapting its patience thresholds from experience across 50 navigation episodes.

</details>


### [637] [GraspGen-X: Cross-Embodiment 6-DOF Diffusion-based Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00998)
*Beining Han,Yu-Wei Chao,Erwin Coumans,Clemens Eppner,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Jia Deng,Stan Birchfield,Adithyavairavan Murali*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种跨形态的6自由度机器人抓取方法，通过扩散模型和扫掠体积启发式编码，实现了对新型抓取器和物体的零样本泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有6自由度抓取模型主要针对特定抓取器设计，缺乏对新型抓取器形态和物理抓取过程的泛化能力。需要开发能够适应不同抓取器形态的跨形态抓取方法。

Method: 扩展基于扩散模型的6自由度抓取生成模型，使其能够以抓取器表示作为条件。提出扫掠体积启发式方法来编码抓取器形态。使用程序化生成的抓取器和包含20亿次抓取的大规模数据集进行训练。

Result: 在仿真实验中，模型在零样本泛化到新型真实世界抓取器和物体方面表现最佳。模型还作为适应新型抓取器的良好初始化基础。消融实验证明了扫掠体积表示和程序化抓取器训练数据集的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法在跨形态6自由度抓取方面实现了显著的零样本泛化能力，在真实世界新型抓取器上的表现超越了基准方法，展示了跨形态泛化的有效性。

Abstract: We study cross-embodiment 6-DOF robot grasping. Unlike prior works, we require the model not only to generalize to novel objects / scenes but also to novel gripper morphologies and physical grasping processes. Our method extends diffusion model based generative 6-DOF grasping models to condition on the additional gripper's representation. We propose a swept-volume heuristic for encoding the gripper. We train our cross-embodiment model with procedural grippers and a large-scale dataset of 2 Billion grasps. In simulation experiments, our model has the best zero-shot generalization to novel real-world grippers and objects over baseline methods. Our model also serves as a good initialization for fine-tuning to adapt to novel grippers. In ablations, we demonstrate the efficiency of our sweep-volume gripper representation and our procedural gripper training dataset. Last, we show zero-shot generalization to real-world novel grippers for 6-DOF grasping, surpassing baselines in cross-embodiment generalization.

</details>


### [638] [AI-IoT-Robotics Integration: Survey of Frameworks, Emerging Trends, and the Path Toward Connected Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01015)
*Ranulfo Bezerra,Satoshi Tadokoro,Kazunori Ohno*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出一个整合AI、IoT和机器人的统一框架，强调边缘SLM与云端LLM的混合系统在分布式认知和自主决策中的作用，为下一代AI-IoT-机器人生态系统提供技术路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI、IoT和机器人的融合已成为实时智能系统的基础，但现有研究主要集中在两两组合（如AIoT、IoRT），缺乏将三者完全整合的统一设计框架。需要系统化地整合这三个领域的最新进展，特别是边缘SLM和云端LLM在分布式认知中的作用。

Method: 1. 对AI、IoT和机器人领域的最新进展进行综合调查；2. 提出一个模块化的系统架构；3. 分析互操作性和反馈控制中的持续差距；4. 按集成深度对现有工作进行分类；5. 强调混合SLM-LLM系统与IoT基础设施和机器人代理的耦合。

Result: 1. 识别了AI-IoT-机器人生态系统中的关键挑战和机遇；2. 提出了一个模块化、可解释、能在动态环境中学习的系统架构；3. 展示了混合SLM-LLM系统如何解决实时适应性、可扩展性和可靠性问题；4. 为连接机器人和物理AI的新兴范式提供了概念和技术路线图。

Conclusion: 通过整合AI、IoT和机器人技术，特别是利用边缘SLM和云端LLM的混合系统，可以构建下一代模块化、可解释且能适应动态环境的AI-IoT-机器人生态系统。这项工作为连接机器人和物理AI的新兴范式铺平了道路。

Abstract: The convergence of Artificial Intelligence, the Internet of Things, and Robotics is no longer a futuristic vision; it is rapidly becoming the foundation of real-time, intelligent, and context-aware systems. AI enables perception and reasoning, IoT provides scalable sensing and communication, and robotics delivers embodied actuation. Despite significant progress in pairwise combinations such as AIoT and the Internet of Robotic Things (IoRT), there remains a lack of unified design frameworks that fully integrate all three. This survey synthesizes the state-of-the-art across these domains, emphasizing the emerging role of Small Language Models (SLMs) at the edge and Large Language Models (LLMs) in the cloud for distributed cognition and autonomous decision-making. We propose a modular system architecture that aligns with these trends, analyze persistent gaps in interoperability and feedback control, and classify existing work by integration depth. Our review highlights how hybrid SLM-LLM systems, when coupled with IoT infrastructure and robotic agents, can address challenges in real-time adaptation, scalability, and reliability. This work offers a conceptual and technical roadmap for designing next-generation AI-IoT-Robotic ecosystems that are modular, interpretable, and capable of learning within dynamic environments, paving the way for the emerging paradigm of Connected Robotics and Physical AI.

</details>


### [639] [$τ_0$-WM: A Unified Video-Action World Model for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01027)
*Pengfei Zhou,Shengcong Chen,Di Chen,Jiaxu Wang,Rongjun Jin,Bingwen Zhu,Yike Pan,Songen Gu,Kuanning Wang,Shufeng Nan,Xingyu Qiu,Chenhao Qiu,Pu Yang,Yunuo Cai,Jianxiong Gao,Yifan Li,Yanwei Fu,Xiangyu Yue,Zhi Chen,Jianlan Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: τ₀-WM是一个统一视频-动作世界模型，集成了策略学习、视频预测和动作评估，通过共享视频扩散骨干实现未来预测，在机器人操作任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作需要能够生成可执行动作的模型，同时能在物理执行前预测和评估未来后果。现有方法通常将策略学习、视频预测和动作评估分开处理，缺乏统一的未来预测框架。

Method: 基于共享视频扩散骨干构建τ₀-WM，提供两个互补接口：1) 视频动作模型联合预测未来视觉潜变量和连续动作块；2) 动作条件视频模拟器将候选动作块展开为多视角未来并预测任务进展分数。使用模态特定监督掩码在约27,300小时的真实机器人数据上训练。

Result: 在具有挑战性的长视野和细粒度机器人操作任务上，τ₀-WM表现出优于其他相关基线的性能。

Conclusion: τ₀-WM成功整合了策略学习、视频预测和动作评估，通过统一的未来预测框架为机器人操作提供了有效的解决方案，在推理时通过测试时计算和重去噪一致性等技术进一步提升了性能。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation requires models that generate executable actions while anticipating and evaluating their future consequences before physical execution. We present $τ_0$-World Model ($τ_0$-WM), a unified video-action world model that integrates policy learning, video prediction, and action evaluation within a single future-predictive framework. Built on a shared video diffusion backbone, $τ_0$-WM provides two complementary interfaces. First, a video action model jointly predicts future visual latents and continuous action chunks from multi-view observations, language instructions, and robot state. Second, an action-conditioned video simulator rolls out candidate action chunks into multi-view futures and predicts dense task-progress scores. The model is trained on approximately $27{,}300$ hours of real-robot teleoperation, UMI-style interaction, egocentric human videos, and rollout or failure trajectories using modality-specific supervision masks. At inference time, $τ_0$-WM uses test-time computation to sample action candidates, rank them with re-denoising consistency, and invoke simulator-based rectification for low-quality candidates. On challenging long-horizon and fine-grained robotic manipulation tasks, $τ_0$-WM shows superior performance over other relevant baselines.

</details>


### [640] [Position: Good Embodied Reward Models Need Bad Behavior Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01036)
*Ran Tian,Yilin Wu,Andrea Bajcsy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该立场论文主张，要获得可靠的具身奖励模型，社区必须投资"坏"的机器人数据：失败、次优、易出错甚至危险的行为。当前具身奖励模型主要基于成功行为训练，导致系统性地高估人类评估者会惩罚的行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身奖励模型主要基于成功行为训练，导致系统性地高估人类评估者会惩罚的行为，包括不安全交互、执行不良和仅表面满足任务的捷径策略。这源于负面具身数据的稀缺性，这些数据收集成本高，在现有机器人数据集中常被过滤或保留。

Method: 分析了三个最先进的具身奖励模型，发现它们存在系统性问题。主张社区应策划和发布"坏"机器人数据，构建合成坏数据生成引擎，开发更去中心化的物理评估系统，并设计细粒度具身奖励模型评估基准。

Result: 研究表明，即使少量暴露于真实的"坏"行为数据也能改善与人类偏好的一致性，并减少代价高昂的误报。这证明了负面具身数据对奖励模型对齐的重要性。

Conclusion: 具身AI社区必须投资于"坏"机器人数据的收集和共享，以构建更可靠的具身奖励模型。通过数据多样性、合成数据生成、改进评估系统和设计更好的基准，可以显著提高奖励模型与人类价值观的一致性。

Abstract: This position paper argues that to obtain reliable embodied reward models, the community must invest in ``bad'' robot data: failed, suboptimal, error-prone, and even hazardous behaviors. While reward models are central to any foundation model's lifecycle, today's embodied reward models are trained primarily on successful behaviors. We analyze three state-of-the-art embodied reward models and find that they systematically over-reward behaviors that real human evaluators would penalize, including unsafe interactions, poor execution, and shortcut strategies that only superficially satisfy tasks. We attribute these failures to a key data gap: the scarcity of negative embodied data which is costly to collect and often filtered out or withheld in existing robotics datasets. Furthermore, we show that even modest exposure to real bad behavior data can improve alignment with human preferences and reduce costly false positives. We therefore call on the embodied AI community to curate and release their bad robot data, build synthetic bad data generation engines, develop more decentralized physical evaluation systems, and design benchmarks for fine-grained embodied reward model evaluations.

</details>


### [641] [Robust Integrated Planning and Control for Quadrotors in Dynamic Environments via NMPC with CBF Penalties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01038)
*Zeinab Shayan,Mohammadreza Izadi,Reza Faieghi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合非线性模型预测控制与控制障碍函数的多旋翼无人机鲁棒集成规划控制策略，通过指数惩罚提高可行性，并采用高增益扰动观测器和卡尔曼滤波增强系统鲁棒性，实现了动态环境中安全避障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NMPC-CBF方法在严格输入约束下存在可行性问题，且缺乏对动态障碍物和外部扰动的鲁棒处理。需要一种既能保证安全避障，又能应对实际环境不确定性的实用框架。

Method: 1. 提出NMPC-CBF框架，将CBF作为指数惩罚项嵌入优化问题，提高可行性；2. 使用高增益扰动观测器估计和补偿外部扰动；3. 采用卡尔曼滤波器实时预测障碍物运动，实现动态避障；4. 通过惩罚权重在跟踪精度和避障激进性之间权衡。

Result: 相比传统NMPC和硬约束NMPC-CBF方法，该方法在Gazebo仿真和硬件实验中表现出更好的可行性、安全性和鲁棒性。成功实现了动态环境中多旋翼无人机的安全飞行。

Conclusion: 这是首个经过硬件验证的NMPC-CBF集成规划控制框架，为动态环境中四旋翼无人机的安全部署提供了实用解决方案，通过软约束和鲁棒性增强实现了可行性、安全性和性能的良好平衡。

Abstract: This paper presents a new robust integrated planning and control (IPC) strategy for multirotor uncrewed aerial vehicles. We propose a nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) formulation that embeds control barrier functions (CBFs) as exponential penalties, improving feasibility while ensuring smooth obstacle avoidance under tight input bounds. The penalty weights provide a practical tuning knob to trade off tracking accuracy against avoidance aggressiveness. We enhance the system robustness by employing a high-gain disturbance observer (HGDO) to estimate and compensate for external disturbances. We also incorporate a Kalman filter (KF) for computationally efficient, real-time prediction of obstacle motion, enabling avoidance of moving obstacles. Comparative studies against both conventional NMPC and NMPC with hard CBF constraints, validated in Gazebo and hardware experiments, demonstrate superior feasibility, safety, and robustness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware-validated NMPC-CBF IPC framework, offering a practical step toward safe quadrotor deployment in dynamic environments.

</details>


### [642] [Learning Multi-Modal Trajectory Policies for Data-Efficient Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01047)
*Zijia Chen,Yuenan Hou,Xinhua Jiang,Yu Li,Weijie Li,Li Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MATE是一个基于混合专家系统的多模态轨迹预测框架，通过跨模态余弦路由器和温度控制路由等技术，在数据稀缺场景下实现更稳定的专家分配和更好的轨迹预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Transformer的策略在处理视觉观察、语言指令和轨迹表示等异构输入时，通常在共享参数空间中处理，导致模态干扰和表示学习效率低下，尤其在数据稀缺场景下问题更严重。传统混合专家系统的路由机制对跨模态表示差异敏感，导致不稳定的专家分配和专家崩溃问题。

Method: 提出MATE框架，包含：1) 多模态混合专家架构，实现细粒度子令牌特征解耦；2) 跨模态余弦路由器，实现稳定且尺度不变的跨模态专家分配；3) 温度控制路由和随机噪声注入，改善专家平衡并防止在稀缺演示下过早路由崩溃。

Result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，MATE在数据稀缺条件下始终优于先前工作，平均成功率比轨迹引导的对比方法提高了4.75%。真实世界机器人乒乓球实验表明，预测的轨迹能为下游机器人执行提供有用指导，验证了算法的实际可行性。

Conclusion: MATE通过创新的多模态混合专家架构和稳定的路由机制，有效解决了异构模态融合中的干扰问题，在数据稀缺场景下实现了更优的机器人轨迹预测性能，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation requires the effective integration of heterogeneous inputs, including visual observations, language instructions, and trajectory representations, to generate accurate actions. Existing transformer-based policies typically process these heterogeneous modalities within a shared parameter space, which often leads to modality interference and inefficient representation learning, especially in data-scarce scenarios. While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) offers a scalable solution through expert specialization, conventional routing mechanisms are often sensitive to such cross-modal representation discrepancies, resulting in unstable expert assignment and expert collapse. In this work, we propose MATE (Multi-ModAl TrajEctory Policies), a novel trajectory prediction framework built upon MoE. Specifically, we introduce a Multi-Modal MoE architecture to achieve fine-grained sub-token feature decoupling, and design a cross-modal cosine router for stable and scale-invariant expert assignment across heterogeneous modalities. We further employ temperature-controlled routing and stochastic noise injection to improve expert balance and prevent premature routing collapse under scarce demonstrations. Experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that our MATE consistently outperforms prior work under data scarcity. It achieves a 4.75% improvement in average success rate over the trajectory-guided counterpart. Real-world experiments on robotic ping-pong also suggest that the predicted trajectories can provide useful guidance for downstream robotic execution, further indicating the practical feasibility of our algorithm.

</details>


### [643] [Expanding Spatial and Temporal Context for Robotic Imitation Learning With Scene Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01072)
*Jianing Qian,Qinhe Peng,Emmanuel Panov,Leonor Fermoselle,Dinesh Jayaraman,Bernadette Bucher,Tarik Kelestemur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于场景图记忆的模仿学习方法，通过结构化记忆机制处理大尺度部分可观测环境中的长期推理任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实环境（如家庭、办公室）通常因空间尺度大而严重部分可观测，且许多任务需要执行一系列子任务，要求机器人能进行长期推理

Method: 使用场景图作为显式结构化记忆机制，维护动态场景图捕捉物体中心关系及其随时间演变，使智能体在任务执行中保留相关历史上下文

Result: 在模拟移动操作和真实桌面操作实验中，该方法显著提升了策略性能，特别是在需要长期推理和部分可观测下鲁棒泛化的场景中

Conclusion: 场景图作为结构化记忆机制能有效增强模仿学习在部分可观测环境中的长期推理能力，提升策略性能和泛化鲁棒性

Abstract: Imitation learning enables robots to learn how to execute tasks via observation. However, real-world environments like homes and offices are often severely partially observed due to their large spatial scales. In addition, many tasks involve executing a series of subtasks requiring autonomous robots to reason over extended time horizons. To address these challenges, we propose using scene graphs as an explicit and structured memory mechanism in imitation learning. By maintaining a dynamic scene graph that captures object-centric relationships and their evolution over time, our method allows the agent to retain relevant historical context during task execution to efficiently reason over incrementally accrued scene information. Our experiments on simulated mobile manipulation and real-world tabletop manipulation demonstrate that our approach substantially improves policy performance, particularly in settings that demand long-term reasoning and robust generalization under partial observability.

</details>


### [644] [Beyond Task Success: Behavioral and Representational Diagnostics for WAM and VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01095)
*Hung Mai,Bin Zhu,Tuan Do*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究通过诊断框架比较世界-动作模型（WAM）与视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，发现WAM在目标对象行为上有所改进但推理成本更高，且未来预测的有效性取决于具体架构设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前不清楚WAM的未来预测是否带来超越任务成功的行为改进，需要研究WAM是否真正改变机器人行为和内部表示以支持控制。

Method: 提出模型无关的诊断框架，包含行为展开分析（测量动作动态一致性、目标对象进展、干扰物影响、运行时成本）和稀疏自编码器特征分析（表征记忆、反应、预测性表示）。

Result: 在LIBERO和RoboTwin2.0上评估7种策略，发现WAM改进对象级行为和目标选择性，但推理成本更高；顺序WAM显示最清晰的预测结构，辅助和联合WAM分别压缩或纠缠未来信息。

Conclusion: WAM设计需要保留行为可操作性的未来表示以实现高效操作，仅任务成功指标不足以揭示关键行为差异。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies and World-Action Models (WAM) represent two increasingly important paradigms for robotic manipulation. However, it remains unclear whether future prediction in WAMs leads to behaviorally meaningful improvements beyond final task success. In this paper, we ask whether WAMs merely add future prediction, or whether they change robot behavior and internal representations in ways that are actionable for control. We introduce a model-agnostic diagnostic framework that compares WAMs and VLAs through two complementary lenses: behavioral rollout analysis and sparse-autoencoder-based feature analysis. The behavioral protocol measures action dynamics consistency, target-object progress, distractor disturbance, and runtime cost. The feature-space protocol characterizes internal representations as memorized, reactive, or predictive, revealing whether models encode future-oriented structure. Across LIBERO and RoboTwin2.0, we evaluate 7 policies spanning direct VLAs and joint, sequential, and auxiliary WAMs. Our results show that success alone hides key differences: WAMs often improve object-level behavior and target selectivity, but their gains depend on architecture and incur higher inference cost. Sequential WAMs show the clearest predictive structure, while auxiliary and joint WAMs respectively compress or entangle future information. These findings suggest future directions for WAMs design to preserve behaviorally actionable future representations for efficient manipulation.

</details>


### [645] [Implicit Drifting Policy: One-Step Action Generation via Conditional Expert Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01098)
*Zemin Yang,Yaoyu He,Yiming Zhong,Yuhao Zhang,Xinge Zhu,Yao Mu,Qingqiu Huang,Yuexin Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: IDP是一种单步模仿学习框架，通过隐式提取专家几何结构来恢复动作校正机制，避免了显式向量场估计，解决了迭代采样延迟问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散或流匹配的生成式动作策略在行为克隆中表现出色，但其迭代采样过程不适合高频机器人控制。虽然最近的单步公式减轻了延迟，但丢弃了中间轨迹演化提供的动作校正机制。直接通过显式估计训练时漂移场来恢复这一机制在数学上不适定，因为条件演示数据极其稀疏

Method: IDP从观察相似的专家动作的局部变化中提取条件专家几何，并与全局参考几何比较以分离条件特定约束。这种局部几何结构自适应地加权标量势目标，结合专家邻近的终端评估，在训练期间直接在单步生成器上强制执行流形约束

Result: 在2D、3D和真实世界操作任务上的广泛评估表明，IDP有效保持了有效动作流形的遵循，优于显式漂移方法，并与强单步基线方法实现了竞争性性能

Conclusion: IDP通过隐式提取专家几何结构，成功地将训练时校正机制引入单步策略学习，避免了数学不适定问题，为高频机器人控制提供了有效的单步模仿学习解决方案

Abstract: Generative action policies based on diffusion or flow matching excel in behavior cloning, yet their iterative sampling is prohibitive for high-frequency robot control. While recent one-step formulations alleviate this latency, they inevitably discard the intermediate trajectory evolution that provides crucial action correction. Directly recovering this mechanism by explicitly estimating a training-time drifting field is mathematically ill-posed due to extreme conditional demonstration sparsity. We introduce Implicit Drifting Policy (IDP), a one-step imitation learning framework that brings the training-time correction of Drifting into policy learning without explicit vector field estimation. IDP extracts a conditional expert geometry from the local variation of observation-similar expert actions, and compares it against a global reference geometry to isolate condition-specific constraints. This local geometric structure adaptively weights a scalar potential objective. Combined with an expert-proximal terminal evaluation, IDP directly enforces manifold constraints on the one-step generator during training. Extensive evaluations across 2D, 3D, and real-world manipulation tasks show IDP effectively maintains adherence to valid action manifolds, improving upon explicit drifting methods and achieving competitive performance with strong one-step baselines.

</details>


### [646] [Tether-Aware Dynamic Collision Avoidance for USV-HROV Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01112)
*Yang Gu,Ziyang Hong,Xuanlin Chen,Hao Wei,Cheng Wang,Shujie Yang,Yulin Si*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于USV跟踪HROV时的系绳感知动态避障方法，通过系绳安全感知平面域和系绳张力感知速度障碍法，在避障同时保障系绳安全和减少系绳张力风险


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: USV跟踪HROV进行海底电缆检查时，动态避障面临挑战：系绳可能与过往船只刮擦，而规避动作会增大USV-HROV分离距离，增加系绳张力风险并影响HROV操作

Method: 1) 引入系绳安全感知平面域表示系绳与障碍船只的三维碰撞风险，无需显式系绳形状模型；2) 开发系绳张力感知速度障碍法，实现安全避障同时减少系绳张力可能性；3) 与视线制导集成，协调HROV跟踪和避障

Result: Gazebo仿真表明，该方法能避开动态障碍船只，同时保持系绳安全，并在USV规避机动期间减少系绳张力的可能性

Conclusion: 提出了一种有效的系绳感知动态避障方法，解决了USV跟踪HROV时的避障挑战，在保障系绳安全和减少张力风险方面表现良好

Abstract: Heterogeneous marine robotic systems composed of an unmanned surface vehicle (USV) and a hybrid remotely operated vehicle (HROV) have shown great potential for subsea cable inspection. In such missions, the USV tracks the HROV at the surface while supplying power and communication through an umbilical tether. However, dynamic collision avoidance for the USV during HROV tracking is challenging because the submerged tether may scrape against passing vessels, while evasive maneuvers can enlarge the USV--HROV separation, thereby increasing the likelihood of tether tautness and compromising HROV operations. To address these challenges, this work proposes a tether-aware dynamic collision avoidance method for a USV tracking an HROV. First, a tether safety-aware planar domain is introduced to represent the three-dimensional collision risk between the tether and obstacle vessels without an explicit tether shape model. Second, a tether tautness-aware velocity obstacle method is developed to achieve safe avoidance while reducing the likelihood of tether tautness. Finally, the method is integrated with line-of-sight guidance to coordinate HROV tracking and collision avoidance. Gazebo-based simulations show that the proposed method avoids dynamic obstacle vessels while maintaining tether safety and reducing the likelihood of tether tautness during USV evasive maneuvers.

</details>


### [647] [ImagineUAV: Aerial Vision-Language Navigation via World-Action Modeling and Kinodynamic Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01205)
*Xuchen Liu,Jiawei Huang,Shihao Xia,Bingxi Liu,Jinqiang Cui,Jiankun Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ImagineUAV：一种基于想象力的无人机视觉语言导航框架，通过级联世界-动作建模来生成未来观测并推断6自由度动作，解决了几何不一致和动力学不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机视觉语言导航（VLN）需要将自由形式的指令映射到部分可观测环境下的6自由度飞行，但现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型存在几何不一致和动力学不匹配的脆弱性问题。

Method: 提出ImagineUAV框架，采用级联世界-动作建模：1）使用潜在视频扩散模型生成指令条件化的未来观测（想象环境演化）；2）通过动作提取器从想象观测中推断6自由度动作；3）运动学规划器将估计优化为无碰撞轨迹；4）步进蒸馏推理管道确保实时执行。

Result: 仅用13亿参数，ImagineUAV在基准测试和真实飞行中超越了之前的VLN和VLA基线模型，验证了想象力驱动空中导航的实用性。

Conclusion: 通过显式想象环境演化来推断动作的想象力驱动方法，能够有效解决无人机视觉语言导航中的几何不一致和动力学不匹配问题，实现高效实用的空中导航。

Abstract: Vision-language navigation (VLN) for UAVs demands grounding free-form instructions into 6-DoF flight under partial observability. While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel at semantic reasoning, they suffer from brittleness due to geometric inconsistency and dynamics mismatch. To address this, we propose ImagineUAV, an imagination-driven framework leveraging cascaded world-action modeling. Instead of direct regression, ImagineUAV employs a latent video diffusion model to generate instruction-conditioned future observations, explicitly imagining environmental evolution, from which 6-DoF motions are inferred via an action extractor. A kinodynamic planner then refines these estimates into collision-free trajectories. Additionally, a step-distilled inference pipeline ensures real-time execution. With only 1.3B parameters, ImagineUAV outperforms prior VLN and VLA baselines on benchmarks and real-world flights, validating the practicality of imagination-driven aerial navigation.

</details>


### [648] [Training-Free Imitation Learning with Closed-Form Diffusion Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01238)
*Raghav Mishra,Ian R. Manchester*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CFDP 是一种免训练扩散策略，使用演示数据集推导的闭式分数实现实时模仿学习，在移动CPU上实现毫秒级推理，性能媲美需要数小时训练的神经基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于扩散的策略虽然性能优秀，但离线训练时间长，拖慢了数据收集和策略部署循环。需要一种能快速部署、免训练的方法来加速模仿学习流程。

Method: 提出闭式扩散策略(CFDP)，通过从演示数据集直接推导闭式分数函数，无需训练即可生成策略。该方法可作为可组合基元，支持数据驱动的推理时编辑。

Result: CFDP在移动CPU上实现毫秒级实时推理，速度快于神经扩散策略。在模仿学习基准测试中，与需要数小时训练的神经基线性能相当。还能作为基元编辑预训练神经扩散策略。

Conclusion: CFDP提供了训练时间和性能之间的有利权衡，实现了免训练扩散策略，加速了模仿学习的部署循环，并可作为可组合基元增强现有方法。

Abstract: While diffusion-based policies have impressive performance and expressivity, their long offline training slows down the data collection and policy deployment loop. We introduce Closed-Form Diffusion Policies, a class of training-free diffusion-based policies for imitation learning using the closed-form score derived from the demonstration dataset. We deploy CFDP with real-time inference with a mobile CPU in hardware experiments, showing it can successfully perform imitation directly from the dataset in milliseconds and with faster inference than neural diffusion policies. In experiments on imitation learning benchmarks, we show that CFDP is competitive against neural baselines that require hours of training, providing a favorable tradeoff between training time and performance. Finally, we show how closed-form diffusion policies act as a composable primitive that enables data-driven inference-time editing of pre-trained neural diffusion policies, including policy guidance and novel demonstration augmentation.

</details>


### [649] [OneVLA: A Unified Framework for Embodied Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01241)
*Lingfeng Zhang,Xiaoshuai Hao,Yingbo Tang,Lei Zhou,Shuyi Zhang,Jinkun Liu,Hongsheng Li,Chenhao Zhang,Qiang Zhang,Hangjun Ye,Xiaojun Liang,Long Chen,Wenbo Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OneVLA是一个统一视觉语言动作模型，将导航和操作任务整合到单一框架中，通过统一动作头和渐进训练策略实现跨任务正迁移，在仿真和真实环境中达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型受限于任务特定架构，只能专注于导航或操作中的一种任务，这阻碍了通用机器人智能体的发展。需要一种统一架构来整合这两种基础能力。

Method: 1. 设计统一动作头，能够生成导航和操作动作，无需任务特定变体；2. 提出多阶段渐进训练策略，包括精选数据构建和思维链微调，促进两个领域之间的正迁移和相互增强。

Result: 在仿真和真实环境中的大量实验表明，OneVLA实现了最先进的性能，显著优于专门的单任务模型和现有的跨任务模型。

Conclusion: OneVLA通过统一导航和操作这两种核心能力，为真正的通用机器人系统铺平了道路。模型和源代码将公开发布。

Abstract: Navigation and manipulation are fundamental capabilities of embodied intelligence, enabling robots to interpret natural language commands and interact physically with their surroundings. However, current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain constrained by task-specific architectures, specializing in either navigation or manipulation, which hinders the development of general-purpose robotic agents. To bridge this gap, we introduce OneVLA, a unified architecture that integrates these distinct tasks into a single, cohesive framework. Specifically, we design a unified action head capable of generating both navigation and manipulation actions without requiring task-specific variants. Furthermore, we propose a multi stage progressive training strategy-incorporating curated data construction and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fine-tuning that facilitates strong positive transfer and mutual reinforcement between the two domains. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that OneVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming both specialized single-task and existing cross-task models. By unifying these core capabilities, OneVLA paves the way for truly general-purpose robotic systems. The model and source code will be publicly released.

</details>


### [650] [DeepIPCv3: Event-Aware Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion for Sudden Pedestrian Crossing Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01277)
*Oskar Natan,Andi Dharmawan,Aufaclav Zatu Kusuma Frisky,Jazi Eko Istiyanto,Jun Miura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DeepIPCv3提出了一种结合LiDAR点云和动态视觉传感器(DVS)事件流的自动驾驶框架，通过Transformer跨模态注意力机制解决传统帧式传感器在动态行人横穿场景中的感知延迟和运动模糊问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶系统主要依赖帧式传感器，在高度动态场景（特别是突然的行人横穿）中存在感知延迟和运动模糊问题，这构成了关键的安全漏洞。需要解决这些传感器固有的局限性以提高系统安全性。

Method: 提出DeepIPCv3多模态自动驾驶框架，结合LiDAR的密集3D空间几何信息和DVS的微秒级异步事件流。采用Transformer启发的跨模态注意力机制动态关联不同模态，通过混合策略网络将融合的潜在表示映射到安全局部路径点和可执行控制命令。

Result: 在自定义多模态数据集上的离线评估显示，DeepIPCv3实现了最先进的预测性能。通过有效消除曝光失败和运动模糊，LiDAR和DVS融合产生了最低的轨迹和控制命令误差，能够在各种光照条件下实现高度反应性、数学有界的规避机动。

Conclusion: DeepIPCv3通过融合LiDAR和DVS传感器，解决了传统自动驾驶系统在动态行人横穿场景中的感知延迟和运动模糊问题，显著提高了系统的反应能力和安全性，特别是在各种光照条件下都能实现可靠的规避机动。

Abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems predominantly rely on frame-based sensors, which suffer from inherent perception latency and motion blur during highly dynamic encounters, specifically sudden pedestrian crossings. To address this critical safety vulnerability, we propose DeepIPCv3, a novel multi-modal autonomous navigation framework that synergizes the dense 3D spatial geometry of LiDAR point clouds with the microsecond-level asynchronous event streams of a Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS). We introduce a Transformer-inspired cross-modal attention mechanism to dynamically correlate these distinct modalities, allowing the network to instantaneously prioritize high-speed dynamic updates without sacrificing structural scene awareness. The fused latent representations are then mapped to safe local waypoints and executable control commands via a hybrid policy network that blends heuristic trajectory tracking with direct neural predictions. Due to the severe physical risks associated with live testing of these sudden crossing scenarios, the framework is rigorously evaluated offline using a custom multi-modal dataset collected across both well-illuminated noon and challenging evening conditions. Extensive comparative and ablation studies demonstrate that DeepIPCv3 achieves state-of-the-art predictive performance. By effectively eliminating exposure failures and motion blur, the proposed LiDAR and DVS fusion yields the lowest trajectory and control command errors, enabling highly reactive, mathematically bounded evasive maneuvers regardless of ambient illumination. To support future research, we will release the codes to our GitHub repo at https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPCv3.

</details>


### [651] [PSG-Nav: Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation via Multiverse Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01313)
*Rufeng Chen,Yue Chang,Xiaqiang Tang,Hechang Chen,Sihong Xie*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PSG-Nav提出了一种概率场景图导航方法，通过构建3D概率场景图来建模感知不确定性，采用多宇宙决策推理最优导航地标，并通过证据经验校准器进行在线终身适应，在多个基准测试中取得了新的最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放词汇导航中的感知不确定性（语义模糊性和模型错误）导致现有方法局限于局部最优确定性方法，缺乏对多个复合可能性的复杂导航决策，而这些决策对于获得全局更好的解决方案至关重要。

Method: 1) 构建3D概率场景图，使用完整的语义分类分布来建模感知不确定性；2) 提出多宇宙决策，从联合分布中采样多个最可能的世界设置，基于地标与多宇宙的兼容性评估导航地标；3) 引入证据经验校准器，通过将检测结果与过去成功和失败的记忆进行交叉验证，实现在线终身适应以减轻由于认知不确定性导致的误报。

Result: 在MP3D、HM3D和HSSD等广泛使用的基准测试上进行了广泛实验，分别实现了66.1%、44.8%和67.9%的成功率，建立了新的最先进结果。

Conclusion: PSG-Nav通过概率场景图建模感知不确定性、多宇宙决策推理和在线终身适应机制，显著提升了开放词汇导航的性能，为解决感知不确定性下的复杂导航决策提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary navigation requires embodied agents to manage significant perception uncertainty stemming from semantic ambiguity and model errors.
  However, most existing works settle for local optimal deterministic approaches, depriving complex navigation decision-making over multiple composite possibilities that are critical for globally better solutions.
  In this paper, we propose Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation (PSG-Nav), which constructs a 3D Probabilistic Scene Graph that uses full semantic categorical distributions to account for perception uncertainty.
  To efficiently use the local distributions to compose and reason about the optimal navigation landmarks, we propose Multiverse Decision to sample multiple most likely world settings from the joint distribution, and evaluate navigation landmarks based on the compatibility between landmarks and multiverses.
  To mitigate false positives due to epistemic uncertainty in open-vocabulary navigation, we introduce the Evidential Experience Calibrator, which enables online lifelong adaptation by cross-validating detections against memories of past successes and failures.
  Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks MP3D, HM3D, and HSSD demonstrate that PSG-Nav establishes new state-of-the-art results, achieving Success Rates of 66.1%, 44.8%, and 67.9%, respectively. Code is available at: https://psg-nav.github.io/

</details>


### [652] [S2M-Trek: From Single to Multi-Sphere Transport via Per-Frame Deep Sets on a Wheel-Legged Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01332)
*Zong Chen,Xuebin Li,Jinpeng Xiao,Shaoyang Li,Ben Liu,Min Li,Zhouping Yin,Yiqun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究解决了多自由滚动球体在轮腿四足机器人上的动态运输问题，提出了Per-Frame Deep Sets（PFDS）编码器来处理帧间置换对称性，实现了五个球体的无掉落运输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决多自由滚动球体在移动机器人上的动态运输问题。现有方法无法处理球体身份不明确带来的帧间置换对称性，导致强化学习在训练中停滞不前。

Method: 提出了Per-Frame Deep Sets（PFDS）编码器，在每一历史帧内进行置换不变池化，再进行时间读取。该方法被证明具有Gframe不变性并能通用逼近连续Gframe不变策略。

Result: PFDS在五个随机种子下都能达到五个球体阶段，实现100%无掉落运输，而基线方法在训练预算相同的情况下最多只能处理两个球体。

Conclusion: PFDS编码器有效解决了多球体运输中的帧间置换对称性问题，并通过蒸馏为TactSet提供了紧凑的触觉表示，为动态多物体操作提供了解决方案。

Abstract: We study the problem of scaling dynamic loco-manipulation from a single free-rolling sphere to multiple spheres transported simultaneously on the back of a wheel-legged quadruped, without fences, grippers, or mechanical stops. Multiple identical free-rolling spheres form an unordered set with no persistent identity: their ordering may change independently at each history frame, creating a \emph{per-frame permutation symmetry} that standard history-concatenation set encoders do not explicitly enforce -- these encoders impose only a shared, diagonal permutation symmetry over the full history. We show that this symmetry mismatch leads to a concrete failure mode in curriculum-based reinforcement learning. Within the same PPO training budget, flat MLPs and branch-wise encoders plateau at or below the two-sphere stage, while a history-concatenation Deep Sets baseline (\HCDS) fails to progress past the two-sphere stage in our runs unless ball-to-slot assignments are randomised during training, suggesting that it exploits slot indices as a curriculum shortcut rather than learning identity-free multi-sphere dynamics. We propose \textbf{Per-Frame Deep Sets (\PFDS)}, which performs permutation-invariant pooling within each history frame before temporal readout; we prove that \PFDS is $\Gframe$-invariant and universally approximates continuous $\Gframe$-invariant policies. A $2{\times}2$ ablation over encoder architecture and slot randomisation separates the architectural and data-augmentation pathways, and \PFDS reaches the five-sphere stage with 100\% no-drop transport in simulation across all five random seeds. We further distill the \PFDS teacher into \TactSet via DAgger, replacing privileged sphere-state observations with a $16{\times}16$ Boolean union contact map, yielding a compact and naturally $\Gframe$-invariant tactile representation.

</details>


### [653] [ActMVS: Active Scene Reconstruction with Monocular Multi-View Stereo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01367)
*Guo Pu,Yixuan Han,Zhouhui Lian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ActMVS是首个单目主动重建框架，通过视图因子图构建和全局深度优化，实现实时生成高质量、全局一致的密集深度图，使单目机器人/UAV能够进行安全轨迹规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动重建方法依赖深度传感器，增加了平台成本和重量。当前单目场景重建方法都是离线的，无法提供机器人/UAV导航所需的实时全局一致密集深度图。需要一种仅使用视觉的单目解决方案来推进空间智能。

Method: 提出ActMVS框架，集成视图因子图构建用于信息化的多视图立体深度预测，结合全局深度优化，实现在线生成高质量、全局一致的密集深度图。

Result: 在Replica数据集上的实验表明，性能可与RGB-D方法竞争，使单目机器人/UAV能够在重建过程中保持可靠的占据地图以进行安全轨迹规划。

Conclusion: ActMVS是首个单目主动重建框架，通过视图因子图构建和全局深度优化，实现了仅使用单目视觉的高质量实时深度估计，为机器人/UAV的自主导航提供了轻量级解决方案。

Abstract: Active scene reconstruction enables robots/UAVs to autonomously plan trajectories and reconstruct environments without costly manual data acquisition. Unlike passive methods, active reconstruction requires real-time construction of high-confidence occupancy maps for collision-free navigation. Existing approaches rely on depth sensors for occupancy map updates, increasing platform cost and weight. To advance spatial intelligence, we aim for a vision-only monocular solution. However, current monocular scene reconstruction methods operate offline and fail to deliver globally consistent dense depth at the frame rates required for robots/UAVs navigation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ActMVS, the first framework for monocular active reconstruction. Our framework integrates a view factor graph construction for informed Multi-View Stereo depth prediction, along with a global depth optimization, to enable the online generation of high-quality, globally consistent dense depth maps. This enables monocular robots/UAVs to maintain reliable occupancy maps for safe trajectory planning during reconstruction. Experiments on Replica datasets demonstrate performance competitive with RGB-D methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/TrickyGo/ActMVS.

</details>


### [654] [Autopilot-Preserving Residual Q-Learning with HJB-Inspired Finite-Action Risk Filtering for Fixed-Wing UAV Command Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01397)
*Mehmet Iscan,Batuhan Temiz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于HJB残差的学习型监督器，置于传统自动驾驶仪之上，通过选择有界残差调整指令来提升固定翼无人机在恶劣风况下的路径跟踪性能，相比基线自动驾驶仪减少86.77%的RMS误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动驾驶仪在强侧风与急转弯结合等恶劣条件下适应能力有限，而直接控制执行器的强化学习策略存在探索风险。需要一种既能提升性能又保持自动驾驶仪稳定性的方法。

Method: 在不变的自动驾驶仪上方放置学习型监督器，从有限有界动作集中选择对空速、高度和航向指令的残差，通过控制-李雅普诺夫和控制-屏障启发的有限动作防护进行筛选，并保持无操作回退选项。

Result: 在相同12状态运行时环境下，HJB残差方法将平均RMS路径跟踪误差降至44.809米，相比基线自动驾驶仪(338.617米)减少86.77%，相比表格Q学习残差(88.809米)减少49.54%。

Conclusion: 提出的自动驾驶仪保留型残差指令监督设计在保持自动驾驶仪完整性的同时显著提升了路径跟踪性能，但存在空速误差增加等权衡，为实际应用提供了完整基准。

Abstract: A fixed-wing UAV must hold airspeed, altitude, and heading references under wind, gusts, and turbulence, channels coupled so that correcting one can degrade another. Classical autopilots stabilize the airframe well but adapt poorly when a hard crosswind meets an aggressive turn, while reinforcement-learning (RL) policies acting directly on the surfaces concentrate exploration risk at the actuator interface. We place a learned supervisor above an unchanged autopilot rather than inside it: it selects a residual from a finite, bounded action set on the commanded airspeed, altitude, and heading; the modified reference is projected into an admissible command envelope before reaching the autopilot, which stays the only actuator-facing controller. What is new is how the residual is chosen. HJB residual scores candidates with a semi-discrete value-iteration critic in the spirit of the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation, ranks them by a no-op-relative Hamiltonian advantage, and filters them through a control-Lyapunov- and control-barrier-inspired finite-action shield that always keeps a no-op fallback. On a shared 12-state runtime holding the plant, autopilot, and actuator model fixed, so the comparison is at the package level, HJB residual lowers mean RMS path-tracking error to 44.809 m, against 338.617 m for the baseline autopilot and 88.809 m for a tabular-Q residual, an 86.77% reduction over the baseline and 49.54% over Q-learning. The gain concentrates where the baseline fails worst and comes with a measured rise in airspeed error, so no method dominates every metric. We present this autopilot-preserving residual command-supervision design and benchmark with its trade-offs reported intact.

</details>


### [655] [A Sonar-Visual Dataset for Cross-Modal Underwater Robot Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01398)
*Weitung Chen,Phil Tinn,Per Gunnar Auran,Martin Ludvigsen,Peter Halland Haro*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SOVIS是一个用于水下跨模态感知的声纳-视觉配对数据集，包含超过76,000帧配对数据，支持跨模态预测研究，并在鱼类检测任务上展示了比单目相机基线7倍的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下机器人通常同时使用相机和声纳进行感知，但受限于声纳-视觉配对数据集不足，跨模态预测学习研究较少。

Method: 1) 构建SOVIS数据集，包含在特隆赫姆峡湾6个地点17次潜水中收集的超过76,000帧配对数据；2) 开发端到端管道清洗和同步跨模态传感器数据；3) 创建交互式标注工具加速配对数据标注。

Result: 使用小部分标注数据进行了概念验证的跨模态鱼类检测任务，在mAP@0.10指标上比单目相机基线提高了7倍。

Conclusion: SOVIS是推进跨模态水下感知研究的第一步，为从单目图像进行密集声纳预测等研究方向奠定了基础。

Abstract: Underwater robots typically use both cameras and sonar for perception to leverage the rich semantic details of vision and the robust range measurements of acoustics. However, learning to map between these modalities via cross-modal prediction remains underexplored due to limited sonar-visual paired datasets. We present SOVIS, a sonar-visual dataset for cross-modal underwater perception. SOVIS comprises over 76,000 paired frames collected across 17 dives at six sites in the Trondheimfjord, supported by an end-to-end pipeline that cleans and synchronizes the cross-modal sensor data. We also introduce an interactive annotation tool designed to accelerate the labeling process for this paired data. Finally, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept cross-modal fish detection task using a small subset of labeled data, achieving a 7x improvement in mAP@0.10 over a monocular camera baseline. SOVIS serves as the first step toward advancing cross-modal underwater perception research, enabling research directions such as dense sonar prediction from monocular images.

</details>


### [656] [LEGS: Fine-Tuning Teleop-Free VLAs for Humanoid Loco-manipulation in an Embodied Gaussian Splatting World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01458)
*Hojune Kim,Timothy Chen,Jiankai Sun,Lars W. Osterberg,Qianzhong Chen,Ke Wang,Mac Schwager*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LEGS提出了一种混合模拟器，将网格前景与3D高斯泼溅重建的背景相结合，通过程序化运动基元生成器合成大规模标注演示数据，无需人工遥操作，在Unitree G1人形机器人上取得了优于人工演示训练的VLA策略效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练人形机器人的视觉-语言-动作策略面临高昂的人工遥操作演示采集成本和复杂性，且现有在模拟器中微调的VLA策略难以有效迁移到真实世界的全身运动操控任务中。

Method: LEGS是一种混合模拟器，将机器人、物体和道具的网格前景与通过手持场景捕获重建的光真实感3D高斯泼溅背景合成。使用程序化运动基元生成器合成大规模标注演示，无需人工遥操作，并通过确定性两阶段颜色校准对齐渲染的3DGS图像与机器人部署相机。

Result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上，针对三个难度递增的拾取放置任务和三种VLA骨干网络，纯LEGS数据训练的策略在所有实验中均匹配或超越人工遥操作演示训练的策略。同时，LEGS显著优于仅使用网格的模拟基线，证明了光真实感渲染对合成数据迁移的关键作用。

Conclusion: LEGS通过光真实感背景合成和程序化演示生成，显著降低了人形机器人视觉-语言-动作策略的训练成本（比遥操作低15倍以上），同时提升了策略的泛化能力和对场景变化的鲁棒性，为人形机器人全身运动操控提供了有效的模拟训练解决方案。

Abstract: Training vision-language-action (VLA) policies for humanoid loco-manipulation is constrained by the high cost and complexity of collecting human teleoperation demonstrations. VLA policies fine-tuned in simulators have, until now, failed to transfer effectively in humanoid loco-manipulation tasks. We present LEGS (Loco-manipulation via Embodied Gaussian Splatting), a hybrid simulator that composites a mesh foreground (robot, objects, props) over a photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) background reconstructed from a handheld scene capture. LEGS uses a procedural motion-primitive generator to synthesize labeled demonstrations at scale without human teleoperation, and a deterministic two-stage color calibration to align the rendered 3DGS image to the robot's deployment camera. On a Unitree G1 humanoid robot, across three pick-and-place tasks of increasing whole-body difficulty and three VLA backbones (psi_0, pi_0.5, GR00T N1.6), a policy trained purely on LEGS data matches or exceeds one trained on human teleoperation demos on every experiment. It also outperforms a mesh-only simulation baseline that ablates the effect of the 3DGS background, showing that photorealistic rendering is a key enabler for synthetic data transfer. Humanoid motion is recorded independently of scene appearance in LEGS, allowing the same auto-generated demonstrations to be re-rendered under new backgrounds and object meshes--covering a new scene at more than 15x lower cost than teleoperation--to augment training data for robustness to scene variations. Under combined object-and-scene appearance shift, the policy trained on re-rendered LEGS-AUG data maintains task success while the baseline trained on teleoperation data fails entirely. Our project page is located at https://legsvla.github.io/.

</details>


### [657] [Crazyflow: An Accurate, GPU-Accelerated, Differentiable Drone Simulator in JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01478)
*Martin Schuck,Marcel P. Rath,Yufei Hua,AbhisheK Goudar,SiQi Zhou,Angela P. Schoellig*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Crazyflow是一个高性能无人机仿真器，比现有仿真器快一个数量级，能模拟数千个4000架无人机组成的集群，支持从模型驱动到数据驱动、从梯度优化到采样优化、从单机到多机系统的算法开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然空中机器人仿真器在保真度、可微分性和集群模拟等方面已有发展，但仍缺乏一个能够统一这些领域的平台，以支持大规模合成数据生成和多样化的算法开发需求。

Method: 开发Crazyflow仿真器，支持多级仿真抽象，兼容所有开源Crazyflie模型，提供轻量级系统识别流程，并实现前所未有的仿真速度。

Result: 单机仿真速度比现有最先进仿真器快一个数量级，能模拟数千个4000架无人机组成的集群；真实实验显示支持分析梯度策略学习（实现亚厘米轨迹跟踪精度）和采样避障（每秒超5亿步）；实现飞行中强化学习（0.38秒内从零训练恢复策略成功稳定无人机）。

Conclusion: Crazyflow作为一个开源资源，通过同时提升精度、速度和可微分性，为合成数据生成提供了平台，并为在线执行中学习和优化的大规模并行化开辟了新的算法开发可能性。

Abstract: High-quality, large-scale synthetic data from simulations is becoming a cornerstone for pushing the capabilities of robot algorithms. While aerial robotics simulators have evolved to support specialized needs such as fidelity, differentiability, and swarms independently, a unified platform that can synthesize data across all these domains is missing. In this work, we propose Crazyflow, a simulator designed to push the limits of aerial-robotics algorithm development, from model-based to data-driven methods, gradient-based to sampling-based approaches, and single-agent to multi-agent systems. Compared to existing state-of-the-art drone simulators, it achieves speeds more than an order of magnitude faster for a single drone and can simulate thousands of swarms of 4000 drones each. Real-world experiments show Crazyflow supports both analytical-gradient-based policy learning, achieving sub-centimeter trajectory tracking accuracy without domain randomization, and sampling-based obstacle avoidance at speeds exceeding half a billion steps per second. Breaking the traditional train-then-deploy paradigm, we show that its unprecedented speed even enables in-flight reinforcement learning; we demonstrate this by throwing a physical drone into the air and training a recovery policy from scratch in 0.38 seconds, successfully stabilizing the drone. Crazyflow supports multiple levels of simulation abstraction, is directly compatible with all open-source Crazyflie models, and enables rapid reconfiguration across custom drone platforms and applications by providing a light-weight system identification pipeline. By pushing accuracy, speed, and differentiability simultaneously, Crazyflow serves as an open-source resource for synthetic data generation, with emerging capabilities for large-scale parallelization for online, in-execution learning and optimization, opening the door to novel algorithm development.

</details>


### [658] [Spatio-Temporal Reconnection for Multi-Robot Networks using Adaptive Prescribed-Time CBFs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01526)
*Hao Liu,Yupeng Yang,Yanze Zhang,Wenhao Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出自适应规定时间控制障碍函数框架，让多机器人系统能在可调整的规定时间内暂时断开连接并重新连接，提高任务效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多机器人系统中，保持持续的通信图连接通常限制过强，特别是在机器人通信范围有限但工作环境大的情况下。允许机器人暂时断开连接后再重新连接，既能保证团队及时信息共享，又能提高任务执行效率。

Method: 提出自适应规定时间控制屏障函数框架，使机器人能在可调整且可行的规定时间内暂时断开连接并重新进入通信范围。同时引入重新连接触发机制，综合考虑任务执行和重新连接紧迫性，为决定何时重新连接提供原则性方法。

Result: 理论分析证明了在规定有限时间内收敛到满足条件的重新连接。实验结果验证了所提自适应PT-CBF的性能，显示出改进的任务效率和满足条件的重新连接。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应PT-CBF框架为多机器人系统提供了灵活高效的通信管理方案，在保证信息共享的同时显著提高了任务执行效率。

Abstract: In multi-robot systems, maintaining persistent communication graph connectivity is often overly restrictive, especially when robots have limited communication ranges but operate in large environments. Instead, allowing robots to temporarily disconnect and later reconnect is often more desirable for efficient task execution while still ensuring timely information sharing across the team. In this paper, we propose an adaptive prescribed-time control barrier function (adaptive PT-CBF) framework that enables robots to temporarily disconnect and re-enter the communication range within an adjustable and feasible prescribed time. Moreover, we introduce a reconnection triggering mechanism that jointly considers task execution and reconnection urgency, thereby providing a principled way to decide when reconnection should occur. Theoretical analysis justifies convergence to the satisfying reconnection within a prescribed finite time. Experimental results validate the performance of our proposed adaptive PT-CBF with improved task efficiency and satisfying reconnections.

</details>


### [659] [Hierarchical Object Representation for Spatial Robot Perception: Points, Meshes, and Superquadrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01545)
*Ceng Zhang,Wan Su,Mohamed Samshad,Gregory S. Chirikjian,Rajat Talak*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种分层对象表示方法，用于3D场景图中的对象几何表示，支持高保真重建、重定位和碰撞检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景图方法通常使用简化的几何模型（如部分点云或3D边界框），缺乏对对象几何的精细表示，这限制了其在机器人导航、重定位等任务中的应用。

Method: 提出四层分层对象表示：从原始传感器数据到密集3D网格，再到超二次曲面等分析基元。开发了从RGB-D图像流构建该表示的管道。

Result: 在HOPE、ReplicaCAD、Kimera-Multi和NUS校园数据集上验证了管道在室内外环境中的有效性。基于超二次曲面的地图对齐方法优于当前最先进的ROMAN方法。

Conclusion: 分层对象表示能够为3D场景图提供可扩展的几何表示，支持高保真重建、鲁棒重定位和高效碰撞检测，适用于密集杂乱环境中的机器人导航。

Abstract: Hierarchical 3D Scene Graphs (3DSG) have emerged as an actionable and scalable representation for long-term autonomy incorporating metric, semantic, and topological information in the scene. However, the question of geometric representation of objects in 3DSG has been overlooked as most methods use simplified geometric models such as partial point clouds or 3D bounding boxes. In this work, we introduce a hierarchical object representation that can be leveraged for high-fidelity object-level reconstruction, object-based robust re-localization or map alignment, and efficient and analytical collision checking for safe robot navigation planning in dense and cluttered environments. The representation is structurally organized into four distinct layers, progressively abstracting the scene from raw sensor data to dense 3D meshes to analytical primitives such as superquadrics, which provide a sparse and analytical representation for object geometry. We develop a pipeline that builds the hierarchical object representation from RGB-D image stream captured by a robot, and demonstrate its working in real-world open-set object scenes in both indoor and outdoor environments. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets including HOPE, ReplicaCAD, Kimera-Multi, and NUS Campus Dataset collected using Unitree B2 Robot validate our pipeline in both indoor and outdoor environments. We show that our superquadric-based map alignment method outperforms the current state-of-the-art object based map alignment method ROMAN. Our code can be found at https://github.com/perceptica-robotics/Hickory.

</details>


### [660] [Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation: Optimal Transport and Graph-Driven Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01565)
*Xiang Fang,Wanlong Fang,Changshuo Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HSAN是一个用于连续环境视觉语言导航的突破性框架，通过分层语义场景图、最优传输拓扑规划和图感知强化学习，显著提升了长视野任务的导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLN-CE方法在长视野任务中存在场景理解有限、规划效率低下和决策框架不够鲁棒的问题，需要新的解决方案来提升导航性能和泛化能力。

Method: 1.构建动态分层语义场景图，利用视觉语言模型捕捉从对象到区域再到区域的多层次环境表示；2.采用基于最优传输（Kantorovich对偶）的拓扑规划器选择长期目标，平衡语义相关性和空间可达性；3.使用图感知强化学习策略进行精确的低级控制，导航子目标并避障。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的VLN-CE数据集上进行了广泛实验，HSAN实现了最先进的性能，在导航成功率和未见环境泛化方面都有显著提升。

Conclusion: HSAN通过整合谱图理论、最优传输和先进的多模态学习，解决了传统静态地图和启发式规划器的局限性，为VLN-CE提供了新的理论保证和实用框架。
